faqs.question: Are Technocrats Institute of Technology admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Technocrats Institute of Technology admissions 2026 is open. The accepts application through online mode. Students must qualify the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course.

faqs.question: Is Technocrats Institute of Technology a private or public institute?
faqs.answer: Technocrats Institute of Technology is a private institute. The institute is affiliated with the Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya (RGPV). TIT Bhopal is accredited by NBA and NAAC B+ Grade. The institute is approved by the AICTE, UGC, DTE, PCI, MPPMC, BCI and MPNRC.

faqs.question: Why to choose Technocrats Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Technocrats Institute of Technology is one of eminent institute which offers quality education to the students. The institute has signed multiple MoUs with top international universities. The institute appoints well-trained and expert faculty members with years of experince.

faqs.question: Is Technocrats Institute of Technology hard to get?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is hard to get admission at Technocrats Institute of Technology. The institute accepts admission based on merit and entranceexams. The institute accepts national entrance exams like JEE Main, CMAT, GATE, CAT, and others.

college_info.intro:
Technocrats Institute of Technology comprises of 12 schools of study through which it offers UG, PG and PhD courses in Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Law, Science, and others. BTech and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the institute.
TIT- Technocrats Institute of Technology offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the institute covers core courses in the areas of ECE, CSE, Information Technology, Mechanical, Civil, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Technocrats Institute of Technology is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Business Analytics, Operations Management, Finance, and others. Below mentioned are the Technocrats Institute of Technology popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    Technocrats Institute of Technology, Bhopal offers 100% placement assistance. The institute maintains a 100% placement rate. The the highest package and average package offered during Technocrats Institute of Technology placements 2024 was INR 52 LPA and INR 9 LPA. Top companies visit TAT Bhopal placement such as TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, IBM, SAP, Airbus,  and Bank of America, among others.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Technocrats Institute of Technology comprises 12 institutes with about 17,000+ students and 1,469+ faculty members on campus. The institute offers undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral courses in disciplines such as Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, Commerce & Sciences, Law, and Nursing & Paramedical institutes. At the UG level, the institute provides BTech, BSc, BCA, BA, BA LLB, and others. At the PG level, the institute provides MBA, MCA, LLM, MCom, and others. Below mentioned are the Technocrats Institute of Technology courses along with the eligibility criteria and :

faqs.answer: A:    TIT - Technocrates Institute of Technology, Bhopal fee structure is designed to include both mandatory and optional components of fees. The components are common across all UG and PG courses. The mandatory fees include the tuition fee, registration fee, security deposit and others. However, the hostel fee and mess fees only apply to students who opt for residential facilities, which is entirely subjective. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Life at Technocrats Institute.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage varies year to year, but recently 80-85 percent of students got placed from Bhopal. The average package is around 3 LPA, and the highest package is reported 9.5 LPA. So the overall placement percentage of Technocrats Institute is quite good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Technocrats Institute of Technology has a very beautiful infrastructure, and Wi-Fi and smart classes are available in the college. The laboratories are designed very nicely according to AICTE standards. A 1000-seat auditorium is available. Hostel and mess are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: If you are looking for a private college in Bhopal for placement, then you can join it.

review_content.Placements: Placement at my college is decent. Companies like Capgemini, TCS, Accenture, KPIT, HCL, Hexaware, etc., will come to campus. The highest package is 50 LPA. I don't know about lowest salary package offered. The average package at my college is 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of my college is one of the best infrastructures in Bhopal. There is no Wi-Fi for students. Classroom and library are okay. There is also a hostel inside and outside the campus. The food in mess is bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college with average placement and its tuition feels

review_content.Placements: About 60 to 80 percent of students are placed each year. This year the highest package was around 50 LPA in Palo Alto (off-campus) and approximately 20 LPA (on-campus). Most tech companies came every year like Capgemini, Infosys, TCS, HCL, Wipro, SAP, EY, Uber, KPIT, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, with some of them having smart classes. Labs are also good, all the equipment needed is available here. The library is also good, all the books you need for your preparation are available. At the hostel, there are 6-seater rooms and 2-seater rooms with all the basic amenities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College fees are minimal, every student can afford to have good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students in every batch in B.Tech CSE. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, KPIT, and IBM. The highest package is 54 LPA at ZScaler. There are many specializations in the B.Tech course ( AIDS, AI, CSE, this AIML), and the management could be more student-friendly.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers well-maintained infrastructure and modern facilities that contribute to a productive learning environment. Classrooms are spacious. The hostel facilities are good and have 24/7 security. The hostel provides basic amenities such as furnished rooms, mess facility, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College life never comes again.

review_content.Placements: My college name is Technocrates Institute of Technology. From my college, almost 75% of students got placed in every year from computer science and engineering. The highest package provided by the college is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. Top companies are HCL, Tech Mahindra, TCS, Capgemini, Accenture, and many more. Almost 50% of students got internships in many companies. Top roles offered in my course are software developer, software engineer, technical support engineer, and so on.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has a big infrastructure, it has a big building in Bhopal. My college is fully furnished with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and high-tech library. My college has separate boys' and girls ' campuses. The quality of food is also very good, and the taste of food is also good. Medical and sports facilities are also available. College also provides us with so many tournaments, like cricket and football matches.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College is amazing. It provides the environment for studies as well as growth.

review_content.Placements: Placement of the college is very good. There are many companies in this college like Tata Consultancy Services, Capgemini, HCL, Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Sony, Hitachi, Ashoke Leyland, Cognizant Technology, and many other common companies come to the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus of the college is too much attractive. The campus is very wide, large, and beautiful. The campus of the college is around 35 acres of land, and the campus is full of greenery. They provided an environment for studies to the students of the colleges.

admission_process.title: Technocrats Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Technocrats Institute of Technology (TIT) admission 2025is currently open for various courses. Also known as Technocrats Group of Institutions, the institute provides a variety of programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Students can pursue these programmes in various fields including Engineering, Technology, Pharmacy, Management, Law, etc. Admission to the institute is primarily merit-based, however, the institute may take into consideration valid scores obtained by the candidate in the relevant entrance exam. Courses provided atTIT Technocratsare offered in affiliation withRGPV Bhopal. Interested students can read the following article to know more about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process of the institute.

TIT Technocrats course admissionis made on the basis of preset admission criteria of the desired programme. The institute shortlists students based on several parameters, including academic performance. Those seeking to get into the UG courses need to pass Class 12 in the relevant field, whereas, PG admissions require graduation in the relevant field. The programmes are offered in full-time mode. Students can check out the following table to know all about the eligibility & selection criteria for some of the popularTIT-Technocrats courses:

TIT-Technocrats admission involves several steps, such as application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students need to ensure that they fulfil the admission criteria of the desired course before applying. The process is mainly conducted online. Interested students can follow the step-by-stepTIT Bhopal admission processexplained below:
Step 1: Application Process

Visit the official website of the institute and fill out the admission enquiry form by providing the required details. Someone from the admission team will contact the candidate for further assistance.
Step 2: Selection Process
Students are mainly shortlisted based on their academic performance, however, valid entrance exam scores may also be taken into consideration if the institute deems it fit.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
To confirm a seat, students need to pay theTIT Bhopal admission feesand go through document verification.

faqs.question: Which companies generally recruit from Technocrats Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Technocrats Institute of Technology, Bhopal offers 100% placement assistance . The institute maintains a 100% placement rate . The the highest package and average package offered during Technocrats Institute of Technology placements 2024 was INR 52 LPA and INR 9 LPA . Top companies visit TAT Bhopal placement such as TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, IBM, SAP, Airbus, and Bank of America , among others.

faqs.question: Is Technocrats Institute of Technology hard to get?
faqs.answer: Technocrats Institute of Technology is a moderately competitive institute to get into , as its acceptance rate stands at 50%. This figure tells us that almost 50 out of every 100 applicants manage to get enrolled in the institute, which is more than half of all the applicants. Therefore, once an applicant fulfills Technocrats Institute of Technology admission requirements i.e., competitive grades, standardised test scores, English language requirements as well as relevant documents, they are most likely to secure an admission in the institute. However, students must not take this lightly and apply to the institute within the deadlines in order to get enrolled as a student.

faqs: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
description: TIT - Technocrates Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the TIT - Technocrates Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

TIT - Technocrates Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 848658 and 1464414 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 848658, B.Tech in Civil Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 848658.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the TIT - Technocrates Institute of Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech in Civil Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) and B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 848658, 1117179, and 1310782, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: Technocrats Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Life at Technocrats Institute.
reviews.review_text: Technocrats Institute of Technology has a very beautiful infrastructure, and Wi-Fi and smart classes are available in the college. The laboratories are designed very nicely according to AICTE standards. A 1000-seat auditorium is available. Hostel and mess are average.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for a private college in Bhopal for placement, then you can join it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college is one of the best infrastructures in Bhopal. There is no Wi-Fi for students. Classroom and library are okay. There is also a hostel inside and outside the campus. The food in mess is bad.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with average placement and its tuition feels
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, with some of them having smart classes. Labs are also good, all the equipment needed is available here. The library is also good, all the books you need for your preparation are available. At the hostel, there are 6-seater rooms and 2-seater rooms with all the basic amenities.

reviews.review_heading: College fees are minimal, every student can afford to have good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college offers well-maintained infrastructure and modern facilities that contribute to a productive learning environment. Classrooms are spacious. The hostel facilities are good and have 24/7 security. The hostel provides basic amenities such as furnished rooms, mess facility, etc.

reviews.review_heading: College life never comes again.
reviews.review_text: My college has a big infrastructure, it has a big building in Bhopal. My college is fully furnished with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and high-tech library. My college has separate boys' and girls ' campuses. The quality of food is also very good, and the taste of food is also good. Medical and sports facilities are also available. College also provides us with so many tournaments, like cricket and football matches.

reviews.review_heading: College is amazing. It provides the environment for studies as well as growth.
reviews.review_text: Campus of the college is too much attractive. The campus is very wide, large, and beautiful. The campus of the college is around 35 acres of land, and the campus is full of greenery. They provided an environment for studies to the students of the colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with decent placements and faculty but the strict fine system is the worst part.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure with well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, a library, and sports facilities. It also has industry-supported labs by Capgemini and KPIT that help students gain practical knowledge. The campus has two boys' hostels and a girls' hostel nearby. Hostel facilities are decent, though maintenance can sometimes be better. The canteen and mess food is average but manageable, and basic medical facilities are available on campus. Overall, the infrastructure su...

reviews.review_heading: College is amazing in everything.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is very good. There are many buildings available in the college. The area and the size of the college are around thirty-five acres. The college is located outside the city, and the average placement of this college is much better compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is world-class, like that of the Indian Institute of Technology. The college is white in colour. The area of the college is spread over 35 acres. The campus is full of greenery.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities available for my course are one of the best among all courses, with 24X7 hours of outstanding Wi-Fi, fully AC classrooms, and a good library. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is decent. The medical facilities are top-notch. There is a huge sports ground where you can play any games.

reviews.review_heading: This college is too good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is next level as compared to other colleges that are available in the college of Bhopal and in Madhya Pradesh. There are too many big and wide campuses of the college that create an encouraging and supportive environment for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is known for its placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure, including buildings, classrooms, labs, and the library, are all well-arranged with the latest books and equipment. The facilities provided in the hostel are good, and the food quality is not bad for a hostel. Medical facilities are there, but you will not get a career in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: This review contains an honest view of our college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure seems decent, and I don't roam around the campus too much. But overall the infrastructure is good and very well-maintained. The hostel facilities are not for boys and girls, so we have to rent a PG. Campus is full of Wi-Fi and air-conditioned classes also in some rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Better option in Bhopal for placements.
reviews.review_text: College campus is very beautiful with lush green gardens and well-maintained buildings and classrooms. In the library, every book is available, and AC is there. Labs are decent, but some equipment are not updated to the new version. Hostel facilities are good, and the quality of food is decent with a variety of options for snacks.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with lower fees.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are the facilities available in my department. There's not a single problem with them, as far as the library is concerned, except when you have to, when there are classes scheduled. Otherwise, you can't randomly go out there and do whatever you want to do. All the things, such as sports, games, medical facilities, canteen, and mess, are also good. There's no problem with related stuff.

data.description: Yes, Technocrats Institute of Technology faculty is very best among all the other college as they heir best on best faculty all over the India the faculty are highly qualified and professional. They do the best at what they are heired. They are fully supportive and helpful towards the student make they industry ready and make there future more brighter.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about TIT - Technocrates Institute of Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, Mindtree, IBM, SAP, Airbus, Bank of America, Amazon, Byju's, Cognizant, etc., visit our college for placements.
The placement process is good as it gives the opportunity to every student to get the job and get placed in any leading company.

college_info.intro: Gautam Buddha University provides wide range of UG and PG courses like BBA, MBA, BTech. Out of all, the University is well known for its four-year BTech programme. GBU BTech programme is offered in several specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Engineering, Information Technology, Food Processing and Technology among many others. These courses are offered for the duration of 4 years. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for GBU Greater Noida BTech programme. reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.

review_content.Placements: Since it's B.A. English course, we all know there are no placements for such a course. No companies come to hire students from the B.A. English course because it's obvious that it's a minor course. We don't wait for companies to come and give placements. If students want a placement, then they should join professional courses like B.Tech, B.Sc., etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com Hons.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.

review_content.Placements: No placement is provided by the university, they just provide some sort of internships, and no permanent placements are provided to us. All the students need to do a job on their own, and the GBU team don't even provide a way to earn. Some of their internships are also free.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University shortlists candidates for most of the courses based on GBU-ET. It is a university entrance exam conducted for admission to MBA, BTech, PhD, etc. National or state-level entrance exams such as GATE, CLAT, JEE Main, etc. are also accepted for a few courses. For courses such as BA, MA, MSc, MTech, etc., the admissions are based on merit in the last qualifying exam.
faqs.question: Q: How do I get admission to Gautam Buddha University?

faqs.answer: In order to apply for courses at Gautam Buddha University, the candidates have to meet the last educational qualification as per course requirement. However, for few of a courses the university conducts it's own entrance exam, GBU-ET. The syllabus for GBU-ET varies course-wise. Any candidate with good academic background and preparation can easily get into GBU Noida.

fees_overview.description: Students getting admitted in any of the programme of Gautam Buddha University must pay fees for admission into the programme. The fee structure at Gautam Buddha University is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of Gautam Buddha University admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. The fees vary anywhere between INR 20,000 - 10,80,000 depending upon the course chosen. Below is a table comprising the fee structure for different programs available at Gautam Buddha University.

review_summary.college_name: Gautam Buddha University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college experience and recommend Gautam Buddha University for higher studies.

content.Placements: In my course, B.Tech in computer science and engineering, placements are decent and above average. In my batch, around 40-50 percent of students have received a PPO till now from the college placement drive. The average package offered is 6 LPA, and the highest package offered is around 12 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, HCL, and Tech Mahindra. 70 percent of students got internships during the internship scheme. Full-stack web developer, software developer, and software engineer are the top roles offered by companies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This is a semi-government college.

content.Placements: Around 75 to 80 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package offered in this course is 7 to 8 LPA, and the minimum package is 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies in this course include HCL, Wipro, TCS, and Cognizant. Around 60 to 70 percent of students get internships from our course in companies like Wipro and others. The top roles offered in this course are Software Developer and App Developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi does not work properly. Lab chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classrooms are not perfect. Hostels have all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities. In sports, they focus on volleyball, while indoor games are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.

content.Placements: Since it's B.A. English course, we all know there are no placements for such a course. No companies come to hire students from the B.A. English course because it's obvious that it's a minor course. We don't wait for companies to come and give placements. If students want a placement, then they should join professional courses like B.Tech, B.Sc., etc.
content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.

content.Placements: No placement is provided by the university, they just provide some sort of internships, and no permanent placements are provided to us. All the students need to do a job on their own, and the GBU team don't even provide a way to earn. Some of their internships are also free.
content.Infrastructure: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Reality of Gautam Buddha university.

content.Placements: There is a GBU-ET exam that this university conducts for admission, and you can also take admission through JEE Main percentile. In GBU-ET, they ask 30 questions of each Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry at a moderate level. Average package is approximately 4-5 LPA. There are some top recruiting companies like Wipro, etc. 30-40% students get on-campus jobs, others off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is very much nice. Classes are equipped with AC. There are separate rooms for each boy in hostel, which have a table, chair, and almari. There are water coolers in every hostel and building. There are also gym and sports building.

faqs.answer: The biggest transition for a student is to get promoted from high school to college. Students having huge stress for their new life chapters must learn the ways to prepare before stepping into it. There are various factors to help you in getting organized and build a strong foundation for your success. It range from searching academic support to developing strong interpersonal skills. There are some activities to do in your freshman year.College is more than continuing your education. Studying is important, but other activities are equally important to experience in this modern competitive world. You have four years of your graduation to engineering college, but there are some primary things that you can do as a freshman. It will help you to find the other opportunities during the rest of your college career. Along with the opportunities, the first year of the college provides the chance to face various challenges too. Here are some significant steps to get prepared for your freshman year.1. Get involved with Extra-curricular2. Research possible college major3. Read as much as possible in freshman year4. Create a study plan in freshman year5. Meet with your guidance counselor

admission_process.title: GBU Noida Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GBU Noida Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

GBU admission to the UG and PG courses is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university considers national-level tests, but preference is given toGBU-ETcandidates. GBU-ET will be conducted at the various centres throughcomputer-based tests. The date will be published in advance before the examination. Besides, candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below arepopular GBU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)

GBU feefor different programmes ranges between INR 20,000 and INR 10.8 lakh. The university provides 50% scholarships in tuition fees for students belonging to SC/ST categories. Also, GBU has the option to avail the relaxation of 50% of the fees for students securing more than 80% in Class 12 and admitted into BTech - Civil, Electrical and Mechanical Engineering. Find below the GBU tuition fees along with the average salary for some of the programmes:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change

In any programme, the minimum number of students should be 15 or 50% of the total seat intake allocated to that programme. Students belonging to the Sport category can avail of the 5% relaxation in the respective qualifying examination. Seat reservation will be applicable as per the Government of U.P. and Gautam Buddha University. Find below the seat intake for popular programmes at GBU Noida:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change

Gautam Buddha University admissions usually begin inApril. Generally, the GBU admission process includes steps including the registration process, merit list release, counselling, and admission fee payment. Candidates must start by applying for the course of their choice. Below are the steps to follow to get a seat in GBU Noida:
1. Application Process:

Candidates who wish to receive admission to GBU Noida must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and pay the required application fee (INR 1,500 for General and INR 750 for SC/ ST candidates belonging to UP).
2. Selection:

Once the registration process is over, the university evaluates the applications of the candidates. The university selects candidates for most of the courses based on GBU-ET. It is a university entrance exam conducted for admission to MBA, BTech, PhD, etc. National or state-level entrance exams such asGATE, CLAT, JEE Main, etc. are also accepted for a few courses. For programmes such as BA, MA, MSc, MTech, etc., the admissions are based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university releases the results ofGBU-ET online.
3. Admission Confirmation:

Selected candidates need to come for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to bring the specified documents for verification. After the final selection is done, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seats at the university.
For more information about Gautam Buddha University check out the below videos:

courses_data.name: GBU Noida BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, CBSE 12th, ISC, UP 12th
courses_data.description: Gautam Buddha University offers four-year BTech programme spread across eight semesters. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for GBU Noida BTech programme. The university also offers lateral entry to BTech course.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for BTech at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Gautam Buddha University accepts JEE Main score for admission to BTech programme. The university also conducts GBU-ET for admission to BTech course. The exam is conducted in CBT mode. GBU-ET is conducted at designated centre. The date of exam and schedule is notified to candidates 15 days well in advance before the examination.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Gautam Buddha University BTech programme. Candidates need to complete three years/ two years Diploma exam with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for BTech (LE). Aspirants with BSc degree or DVoc can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech in Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University provides BTech programs requiring students to have passed 10+2 with Physics & Mathematics as compulsory subjects, plus Chemistry, Biotechnology, technical vocational subject. Minimum of 45% marks & 40% for SC/ST is required in these subjects combined. Admission is based on Gautam Buddha University Entrance Test or JEE Main scores.

faqs.question: Is it compulsory to appear for the GBU entrance test?
faqs.answer: GBU admission in all UG, PG and doctoral courses is based on the GBU entrance test performance. However, candidates holding national-level test scores are also considered for admission, only if the seats remain vacant after GBU-ET.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pass graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Gautam Buddha University MBA programme. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MBA programme spread across four semesters. The university offers MBA in Business Analytics & Data Science and General. Aspirants who have passed graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for MBA course. Admission to MBA course is based on GBU-ET score.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MA at Gautam Buddha University?

faqs.question: Does Gautam Buddha University offer MA?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MA course divided into four semesters. The university offers MA in Journalism and Mass Communication, Sanskrit, Public Policy and Governance, etc. The minimum requirement to apply for MA programme is graduation. faqs.question: Can I join two programmes at Gautam Buddha University, GBU at a time?
faqs.answer: The curriculum of all its academic activities has an international and cross-cultural focus. At present, the school offers three programmes in management, which are Master in Business Administration (2-year full time), Dual Degree BBA + MBA (with existing option), B.Com (H)and Doctoral Programme.

faqs.question: Can foreign students also seek admission in GBU?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University has made its presence globally and is open for admission in all UG, PG and doctoral programmes for foreign students. reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college experience and recommend Gautam Buddha University for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: It has a great and beautiful infrastructure, which is spread over 511 acres. It has facilities like a shopping complex and multiple cafes on campus. There are multiple playgrounds for different outdoor sports like cricket, football, and courts for lawn tennis. There is a separate indoor stadium for badminton, and other indoor sports are also available. Hostel provides single non-sharing and personal rooms with 24x7 electricity and internet connection through LAN. Mess food quality is good and hy...

reviews.review_heading: This is a semi-government college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi does not work properly. Lab chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classrooms are not perfect. Hostels have all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities. In sports, they focus on volleyball, while indoor games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.
reviews.review_text: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

reviews.review_heading: Reality of Gautam Buddha university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is very much nice. Classes are equipped with AC. There are separate rooms for each boy in hostel, which have a table, chair, and almari. There are water coolers in every hostel and building. There are also gym and sports building.

reviews.review_heading: Nice College and this college is semi government .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is best Wi-Fi are also working properly benches are also comfortable library is nice but classroom is also nice neat and clean in hostel there are all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, medical facilities are also available they are also concentrate on sport.

reviews.review_heading: A little bit expensive, but a nice college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi is working properly, but the lab chair is not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classroom is not perfect, it's a hostel, and there are all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate on volleyball. Indore games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is a little bit expensive for this course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi is also working properly. Labs and chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but classrooms are not perfect. In the hostel, there are all facilities like AC and Wi-Fi. Medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate on volleyball. Indoor games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is quite good and study is above average, and its study depends on students.
reviews.review_text: Gautam Buddha University campus is good and spacious, but the management of the campus is poor. All sports facilities are there: volleyball, badminton, cricket, tennis, etc. Tournaments are held for volleyball, cricket, and all. It is a very big university, so it helps the students to walk and feel relaxed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Computer Science and Technology (ICST Varanasi)
reviews.review_heading: Placements are not very good, and the infrastructure and facilities are also average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are not very good. They are above average. Labs, libraries, and classrooms are too big, and air conditioning is available in every class. The quality of food in the canteen and mess is good. Sports and games also take place on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Gbuian are the best in Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are also available via LAN, and the library is available for free in my college. the hostel is very well furnished, and the quality of food is very good, as a company from Gurgaon prepares food for students with the menu changing every week. Medical facilities, like a dispensary, are available in the college, and sports facilities, such as a stadium, are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Best college to take admission in CSE course for 2025.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in our college. Our college has different buildings for all departments, as it offers many different courses. Hostels in our college are also the best among the range of colleges in Greater Noida.

reviews.review_heading: GBU is the college for GBUians.
reviews.review_text: The department is very well-maintained and furnished. Wi-Fi facility and the library are available for free. Classrooms are well-equipped, and decorum is maintained. Hostels are very well-furnished and have LAN facilities. The food is not that good, but considering the price, it is worth it. A free medical dispensary is available. Sports facilities are top-notch, and a stadium is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Gautam Buddha University review.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is the best. College has 511 acres of land. Our college is very big. We have Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms have AC. Library is also very big in every department. Classrooms are fully AC. Facilities in hostel are not good for first year. Hostel is good but for second year hostel is literally the worst you can't pee and use washrooms. Canteen and medical facilities are good. Because government institute of medical sciences hospital is our college so medical facility is good. M...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay. In the hostel everything is good. Everyone has a separate room but there is no proper Wi-Fi. There is a LAN port and the quality of the food which we got is okay sometimes we get good goes sometimes not. Medical facilities are good. There is a nearby gym. Sports and games are good.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, GBPUAT ranks #88 under the category 'University'.

Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar admission 2026 application forms; are open for all the courses. Other latest updates are as follows:

table.details: -101 by NIRF under Overall Category -201-500 under the QS WUR Ranking By Subject -509 by QS Ranking in Asia Category
25 courses being offered by 5 departments/ schools/ centres/ faculty

college_info.intro:
Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar popular programmes are BTech, MBA & BSc. Students get job offers from top companies. The program has support from the companies like Aditya Birla Fashion & Retail, Aditya Birla Sunlife, Adani Wilmar, Advanta Seeds, AIIM India. GBPUAT has been ranked under the Management category by the NIRF 2025 at 44th position. MBA students can become Project Managers, System Managers, or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their field. The following are the USPs of joining the popular programmes available at the GBPUAT:
BTech students are taught AI, Cybersecurity, Blockchain, and other new technologies. GBPUAT also gives hostel facilities to students. Hence, students can study in the college without any difficulties. Overall, Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology is one of the top universities offering quality education to students.
Below are some of the courses offered by GBPUAT and their respective eligibility & fee:

GBPUAT is accredited by ICAR, & NBA. GBPUAT has global partnerships with Charles Sturt University is Australia's leading regional university.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: There are a total of 96 courses offered at by the institute. These courses are offered across fields of Engineering and Science, etc. They are available at the UG and PG levels. These courses include B.E. / B.Tech, BSc, M.E./M.Tech, and MBA/PGDM, etc. Admission to some of the programmes is subject to merit in the last qualifying exam and for some courses, admission is entrance-based. The university offers a four-year BTech programme in 10 specialisations, BFSc, BSc and BVSc courses at UG level. GBPUAT fee ranges between INR 41,420 - 25,00,000.At PG level, GBPUAT offers MBA and MSc courses for a two-year duration each. PhD courses are also offered in 53 specialisations in multiple streams. faqs.answer: A:    The University has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for the batch 2024. According to the report,  88 UG 4 year (BTech) students were placed out of the total 387 graduated students during GBPUAT placements 2024 with a median package of INR 5.25 LPA.
faqs.question: What is average salary in GBPUAT?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for GBPUAT MCA is INR 60,000. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Besides, selected candidates also need to pay a one-time fee of INR 2,500 and hostel fee of INR 5,440. Candidates have to pay the course fee after completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the university.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MCA at GBPUAT?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, there is reservation for the students having domicile of Uttarakhand state. Almost 50% of the total available seats are reserved for the state students. Further, the 50% of the seats are given to the students belonging from other states.
faqs.question: Is there any reservation of seats for students belonging to Uttarakhand for MBA at GBPUAT?

faqs.answer: A:    Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology offers three-year BSc (Hons) course spread across six semesters. Aspirants must pass intermediate Agriculture/ Science with Mathematics or Biology or equivalent exam with at least 50% aggregate (47.5% aggregate for reserved categories) to apply for GBPUAT BSc (Hons) courses. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.answer: GB Pant University percentile or percentage requirement varies course-wise. However, candidate must complete Class 12 to apply for UG courses and graduation for PG courses. Below is the eligibility requirement for top GBPUAT courses:Course NameCommon EligibilityBTechIntermediate in relevant subjectsMCABCA/ BSc with Mathematics from a recognised university/ BSc Information Technology/ BSc Computer ScienceMScBSc in relevant subjectsBSc (Hons)Intermediate Agriculture/ Science with Mathematics or Biology or equivalent exam with at least 50% aggregate (47.5% aggregate for reserved categories)MBABachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST Category) in the qualifying examination from any of the Universities recognised by the AIU UGC or AICTE
faqs.question: Q: How much percentile is required for GB Pant University?

faqs.answer: Your score and rank in JEE Mains will determine the chances of you getting into the college. Also, only your rank in JEE Mains is going to decide the branch you will be alloted. There are total 9 engeneering branches in the university out of which 1 is headed by College Of Basic Sciences and Humanities (Biotechnology Engg)while the rest are under the College of Technology. For branches like Computer and Information Technology, you really need to score good. Especially for general category students the closing rank is about under 40-50k. And for branches like electrical and electronics and communication engineering your rank must be around 90k. And for the rest branches like mechanical, industrial and production Engg, agricultural and civil engineering lower ranks under 3 Lacs may be considered.Hope this helps.

review_summary.college_name: GBPUAT Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Food Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Food Technology College.

content.Placements: 4-5 students were placed, and a total of 28 students were in the class. The highest package was 5-6 LPA. The companies that were recruited were ITC, KLA, and Adani Wilmar. Internships were offered by Parle and Britannia. The roles in the course included quality officer, production officer, lab attendant, food technologist, and quality executive.
content.Infrastructure: Labs were the best of all. Classrooms were also good, and our college had the biggest library in Uttarakhand. The food was good, the rooms were good, and I had good friends. The hostel staff were also good. Every year, the university sponsored an athletic meet, and students from every college and hostel participated in the event.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (August 2025) B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Versatile course with good opportunities, but needs more industry exposure.

content.Placements: According to me, there are only a few students who can get more than a 9CGPA in the B.Tech. The college placement is not that good.
content.Infrastructure: Being part of ECE department, we have access to well-equipped laboratories such as VLSI lab. Classrooms are not good enough and there is no Wi-Fi connectivity in the department. Hostel infrastructure is decent, with single, double, and triple sharing rooms, depending on the year of study.
content.Faculty: Teachers in the ECE department are almost temporary and only some professors are permanent. However, the teaching quality varied from professor to professor. While some delivered engaging and interactive, others relied more on traditional teaching methods. Professors have a personal beef with students according to their living style and other things. Faculty members does not support you for any of the activities.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (August 2025) B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College of Technology, Pantnagar.

content.Placements: 60 students are placed every year in Agricultural Engineering. The highest package offered in our course is 6 LPA, and the minimum package offered is 3 LPA. 20-30% of students get college placement and internships from the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are great in the college and the overall infrastructure of the college is quite great. There is a huge university library, that is open from morning 8 AM to 7 PM every day except on Sundays or on national holidays. Classroom are also spacious, but there is a blackboard in most of the classrooms, and a few of them are smart classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not so good placements in college so dissatisfied.

content.Placements: Nearly 43% of the students are placed. The highest and the lowest packages are 6 and 3 lacs per annum, Larsen and Toubro and Indian Tobacco Company (ITC) are the top recruiting companies for the course. Around 20% are placed in ITC and 1% are placed in the Bureau of Indian Standards. The graduate engineer trainee is the role offered in the course.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure, good labs, Wi-Fi connectivity, classrooms, and a library. Normal quality of food in the mess, and sports and medical facilities are also good. Generally, the food quality and variety can be improved according. The taste in food and extra serving.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (August 2025) B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the placements.

content.Placements: The placement percentage in my college is below average because I am currently in my last semester, and so far. Only 7 out of 66 students in the mechanical engineering stream have been placed. The internship opportunities are also very average, and the top roles are not specified in my college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in my college is good in some areas, such as the library and the stadium, which are excellent. Facilities available include Wi-Fi, air conditioning, and smart classes in every classroom. However, the hostel quality is not good.

admission_overview.college_name: GBPUAT Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Fees & Last Dates

admission_process.title: GBPUAT Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GBPUAT admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university conductsPantnagar University Entrance Exam (GBPUAT)for admission to various UG and PG courses. Besides, the university also accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, GATE, NEET, etc. for admission to specific courses.GBPUAToffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in Sciences, Agriculture, and other streams. Candidates can apply online on the official website of G.B. Pant University of Agriculture and Technology for admission.
GBPUAT offers BSc, BTech, MBA, MCA, etc., admission which is either based on merit or entrance exam score. Below are the key highlights for GBPUAT admission:
Particulars
GBPUAT Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Opening Soon:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
https://www.gbpuat.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

GBUPAT conducts an entrance exam for admission to courses such as MSc, MCA, etc. Candidates also need to meet the eligibility requirements set by the university. Below is eligibility and selection criteria for topGBPUAT courses:

The total fee of GBPUAT has multiple components, out of which some are paid one-time while others are paid semester-wise. The components include tuition fee, caution deposit, hostel and mess charges, etc. Aspirants are required to pay this fee at the time of admission and then semester-wise. Below is theGBPUAT feeand average package for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat intake varies course-wise at GBPUAT. Candidates need to qualify entrance exam or merit in the last qualifying exam to get a seat in the university. The seats are distributed between UA Domicile and payment seats. All the sanctioned seats in Undergraduate and Postgraduate degree programmes (except MCA) shall be allotted to bonafide residents of Uttarakhand State only. However, 50% payments seats for UG programmes will be reserved for other state candidates. Below are the seat intake for top GBPUAT courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Out of the total intake, some seats are reserved under vertical and horizontal reservations. Below is the reservation followed at GBPUAT:
Vertical Reservation
Horizontal Reservation

GBPUAT admission processincludes multiple components such as registration, selection, counselling and payment of seats. Candidates need to qualify entrance exam followed by participating in counselling. Find below step-wise GBPUAT admission process:
STEP 1: GBPUAT Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for the preferred course. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 1,200 (INR 600 for SC/ ST/ PH). Aspirants can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes.
STEP 2: Selection

Patnanagar University conducts GBPUAT entrance exam for various UG and PG courses such as MSc, BSc, etc. Separate entrance exam is conducted for UG, PG and MCA programme. Besides, the university also accepts national-level entrance exam such asJEE Mainfor BTech,GATEfor MTech, ICAR AIEEA for Agriculture courses, etc.
STEP 3: Counselling and Fee Payment

Once the selection process is over, the university conducts counselling round. The number of counselling rounds will depend on the vacancy of seats. Online counselling for all programmes will be carried out after declaration of results. Aspirants need to bring the specified documents for verification. For courses such as BTech, exam conducted body conducts the counselling round. Shortlisted candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about Patnanagar University check out the below video:

faqs.question: What is the fee for MCA at GBPUAT?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for GBPUAT MCA is INR 60,000 . This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Besides, selected candidates also need to pay a one-time fee of INR 2,500 and hostel fee of INR 5,440. Candidates have to pay the course fee after completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for GBPUAT courses?
faqs.answer: Candidates are required to pay an application fee to register for a course. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,200 (INR 600 for SC/ ST/ PH) for admission. The applicants can deposit fee online by means of Debit Card/ Credit Card/ Internet Banking. Applicants are advised to keep with them the copy of the “Online Fee Receipt” as a token of remittance of fee for future reference. On successful registration of on-line application, candidates are advised not to attempt for registration for the same course again since multiple registration numbers and passwords may create problem for candidates in future.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is GBPUAT. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #44 rank in the State Public University category, and #9 under Agriculture and Allied Sectors. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around GBPUAT rankings.

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttarakhand In 2025
Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttarakhand In 2025

nirf.description:
GBPUAT has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, GBPUAT's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, GBPUAT fell 13 ranks to #101 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, GBPUAT fell 6 ranks to #44 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, GBPUAT fell 1 rank to #9 rank in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the GBPUAT latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

qs_world.description:
GBPUAT has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the QS World University Rankings 2026. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the GBPUAT's rankings in 'Asia' category have displayed a decreasing trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2026, GBPUAT fell 108 ranks to #509 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Southern Asia' category have demonstrated a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, GBPUAT fell 25 ranks to #132 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

reviews.review_heading: Food Technology College.
reviews.review_text: Labs were the best of all. Classrooms were also good, and our college had the biggest library in Uttarakhand. The food was good, the rooms were good, and I had good friends. The hostel staff were also good. Every year, the university sponsored an athletic meet, and students from every college and hostel participated in the event.

reviews.review_heading: Versatile course with good opportunities, but needs more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Being part of ECE department, we have access to well-equipped laboratories such as VLSI lab. Classrooms are not good enough and there is no Wi-Fi connectivity in the department. Hostel infrastructure is decent, with single, double, and triple sharing rooms, depending on the year of study.

reviews.review_heading: College of Technology, Pantnagar.
reviews.review_text: Labs are great in the college and the overall infrastructure of the college is quite great. There is a huge university library, that is open from morning 8 AM to 7 PM every day except on Sundays or on national holidays. Classroom are also spacious, but there is a blackboard in most of the classrooms, and a few of them are smart classrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal SciencesReviewed on 14 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not so good placements in college so dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, good labs, Wi-Fi connectivity, classrooms, and a library. Normal quality of food in the mess, and sports and medical facilities are also good. Generally, the food quality and variety can be improved according. The taste in food and extra serving.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in my college is good in some areas, such as the library and the stadium, which are excellent. Facilities available include Wi-Fi, air conditioning, and smart classes in every classroom. However, the hostel quality is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of its infrastructure and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The condition of infrastructure of the department is not that much good. It is too old however the condition of the hostels is pretty well including food and cleanliness. Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel. But hostel timing for girls are little strict. There is no canteen in the college or hostel area students have to go badi and choti market for need and to eat. It is a good place to play sports and for gym also for both boys and girls separately.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is average. There is a university library for the whole university that consists of seven colleges. In every department, there is also a separate small library for a particular department. Wi-Fi and air-conditioning facilities are provided by the university.

reviews.review_heading: College and hostel are nice.
reviews.review_text: The classes are well occupied with smart boards, modern classrooms, seminar halls, and proper audio-visual aids. Hostels have Wi-Fi, and the library has an extensive collection of books. Labs are well maintained with equipment. For the first year, girls will be residing at Sarojini Bhavan, where all first-year college girls live together. It has a very green environment and is itself a peaceful place. There is a stadium with a gym for both boys and girls. Sports like badminton, football, basketb...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal SciencesReviewed on 7 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The life in college and friends.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure and academic block are very huge, and there are numbers of labs and classrooms for the students to study in. The quality of food available in the mess is good. The medical facility on the campus is good as it is near our hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal SciencesReviewed on 20 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best college for studying veterinary.
reviews.review_text: A big lecture hall with all the facilities, like big screens for studies, proper blackboards, chairs and tables, and AC rooms. The college library is also available besides the university library, which has 100,000 books related to all fields. Wi-Fi is available 24/7 for all students. The hostel has Double-seated rooms with attached washrooms, and 24/7 light and water. Cleaning is proper, and all facilities are available in the hostel. The food has Four meals a day, including breakfast, lunch, d...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal SciencesReviewed on 11 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A glimpse of College of Veterinary and Animal Science, GBPUAT, Pantnagar.
reviews.review_text: The college building is quite old. There are separate wings for each department and separate classrooms for each year of students. There are laboratories in each department, which are separate for UG and PG students. There are separate clinics at the college. There is a separate college library present on the college premises itself. The hostel food is quite decent, and the mess is clean. There are no canteen facilities available in any hostel, but a canteen is present in college. We are having ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal SciencesReviewed on 8 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: CVASc Pantnagar - 263145
reviews.review_text: One room is allotted to two persons, with well-equipped furniture and study tables. Wi-Fi is also provided by the university. The mess is clean and very hygienic; the food is good and nutritious, promoting a healthy and disease-free life.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal SciencesReviewed on 27 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: It’s a good course and college for animal lovers.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is old and experienced. The college building is quite old. Their teaching method is also very old but the practicals are good. The central Library is the best here. Extracurricular activities are also organised time to time. The hostel is average but the quality is not that good. We don’t have any choice in the breakfast (only aloo paratha daily).

reviews.review_heading: You need to maintain your attendance and your passing numbers.
reviews.review_text:
The college has very good infrastructure but hostel is not that good. Some rooms have the worst conditions.
Although the college has a good library and 5G CCF where you can study and prepare for any course on PC. 
Roads are well built. 
Only transport you can purchase here is bicycle. No other two-wheeler or four-wheeler allowed.
Different clubs to join as per your hobbies.

reviews.review_heading: Vast campus area and decent infrastructure with good placement opportunity .
reviews.review_text: The campus area of the university is very large and well-equipped to carry out different research projects for various departments. It includes facilities such as academic buildings, laboratories, libraries, an auditorium, a large open ground, research centers, and hostels. Hostels are good, provided with almirahs, and the mess food is okay. Medical facilities are also provided.

data.description: GBPUAT gives 23 hostels including 11 hostels for female students and one for married students with separate arrangements for post-graduate and undergraduate students.  There is Indoor Stadium Facility available. There is also  mess facility, and various other facilities available for students and teachers. The hostels at GBPUAT have 24/7 security and surveillance,  ensuring the safety and security of students.

The total tuition fee for GBPUAT MCA is INR 60,000. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Besides, selected candidates also need to pay a one-time fee of INR 2,500 and hostel fee of INR 5,440. Candidates have to pay the course fee after completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the university.

Candidates are required to pay an application fee to register for a course. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,200 (INR 600 for SC/ ST/ PH) for admission. The applicants can deposit fee online by means of Debit Card/ Credit Card/ Internet Banking. Applicants are advised to keep with them the copy of the “Online Fee Receipt” as a token of remittance of fee for future reference.On successful registration of on-line application, candidates are advised not to attempt for registration for the same course again since multiple registration numbers and passwords may create problem for candidates in future.

Aspiring students wishing to join GBPUAT are required to pay a certain amount as fees. GBPUAT fee structure for all courses consists of various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee, etc. Among these components, some are to be paid only once during GBPUAT admission, while the remaining are charged according to the fee guidelines. GBPUAT fee ranges between INR 41,420 - 25,00,000.

faqs.answer: The admissions for the B.Tech programme are through centralized process of counseling which is based upon the merit of (JEE Mains/ HSTES). 50% of the seats will be filled through entrance test scores and 50% through Direct Admission. DCE Gurgaon also offers direct admission for the students under the B.Tech program. Candidates need to fill in the application form and submit it. Based on the academic details, they will be called for further rounds of admission.
faqs.question: Q: Can I join Dronacharya College of Engineering directly?

faqs.answer: Admissions to regular BTech programme at Dronacharya College of Engineering is based on four online off-campus counselling. During first and second counselling, admission is made on the basis of JEE Main score. For remaining seats, third and forth counselling are conducted by HSTES to grant admission to the candidates based on Class 12 merit.
faqs.question: Q: What is the selection process for the Dronacharya College of Engineering BTech programme?

faqs.answer: Dronacharya College of Engineering is a group of engineering colleges with multiple campuses in India. The official website will provide accurate and up-to-date information about the programs offered, including Electrical Engineering.Alternatively, you can contact the college directly through their official communication channels, such as their admissions office or helpline, to inquire about the availability of the B.Tech. review_summary.college_name: Dronacharya College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college focuses on academics but does not focus on activities like events and sports.

content.Placements: In Dronacharya College of Engineering, 60-70 percent of students got placements in highly reputed companies. The average package ranges from 4-5 LPA. The highest package is 19 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, and Infosys. The internship rate is 40-50 percent, and students get internships in the 2nd to 3rd year.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, a hostel is available but temporarily, and it is not in use for some reason. My college provides Wi-Fi facility for all students with a smart board in all classrooms. My college has a library with lots of books. There are 2 canteens. Labs are provided with all equipment. For medical facilities, 1 medical room is available. There is a large campus for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The future students are going to like this college a lot.

content.Placements: Not all students get placed, but slowly more and more companies are coming, bringing more and more opportunities for jobs, and the packages are average around 3-6 LPA for most of the companies. Some good companies offer better packages around 7-8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average and good overall for everyone; not very fancy like the "Student of the Year" type, lol, but it is decent enough for everyone to fit in nicely. Recently, all classes got AC and smart boards for better performance and study experience.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am having a great experience.

content.Placements: It's CSE-AIML, artificial intelligence and machine learning, which works on machine learning concepts that open the path for posts like data analytics, data scientists, and many more. I would suggest that you take admission in this course. It's a great choice.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. It has air-conditioned classes, comfortable seating, and digital display boards where teachers add their pendrive and provide us with a visual explanation about models. It has great library, great canteens, and great infrastructure so go for it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: If you want another chance in life to make it better, you can come.

content.Placements: Currently there are very less number of students which have been placed till now. But the college is working on this. Average package is about 6 LPA - 7 LPA. Internship is good. You can join it via college or on your own or by any reference. You can come and trust the college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty good, AC classrooms, digital display boards, study via presentations, and practical implementation of code on the board desks are pretty good, decent, and comfortable. You can't come here for a good experience. Canteens are great.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is good enough for the development of your skills.

content.Placements: There are over 500 students in my batch. The highest package in our college is 55 LPA, and the lowest is 6 LPA. Many companies hire freshers, like Airtel, Adobe and more. 90% of students get internships at our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, from the outside and the inside. We have good classrooms with professional sketchboards and Wi-Fi connections in each classroom. The hostel is permanently closed due to some major issues.
content.Faculty: Teachers are not helpful. They just put pressure on us. They are knowledgeable, but still they don't have basic etiquette on how to talk to students. They are always shouting and complaining about students. The semester exams are not that difficult. An average student can easily pass them.

admission_process.title: Dronacharya College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DCE's admission process for UG and PG courses is conducted in online mode only. The admission process to courses is either based on merit or entrance exam scores conducted at the national/ state level. Admission eligibility for courses offered by this college, along with their qualifying entrance exams, is listed below:
Find below a detailed overview of the admission process:
1: Online Application
Candidates are required to fill out the online application form available on the College website.
2: Document Verification
Upon submission of the online application, candidates must have their documents verified.
3: Course Allocation
Course and branch allocation to candidates are done based on their merit and seat availability.

Admissions to regular BTech programmes are based on four online off-campus counselling. During the first and second counselling, admission is made on the basis ofJEE Mainscore. For the remaining seats, third and fourth counselling is conducted byHSTESto grant admission to the candidates based on Class 12 merit. Direct admission is also possible to BTech.
Candidates are required to qualifyGATEwith a valid score to seek MTech admission for admission to this course.
4: Fee Payment
Candidates who have been allocated a course and branch need to proceed with the payment of theDronacharya College of Engineering feefor the allocated course and branch.
