faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for M.Tech admission at Dronacharya College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Only people with a bachelor's degree in a related subject from a valid university are eligible for the M.Tech course at Dronacharya College of Engineering.If they do not receive a valid score in the GATE exam, they will not be admitted.There are 24 seats available in the 4 specialisations offered for the M.Tech programme at the college.Only those who have valid GATE scores are eligible.

faqs.question: How many M.Tech specialisations are offered by Dronacharya College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The M.Tech specializations at Dronacharya College of Engineering are Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Information Technology.All specialisations are two-year, postgraduate courses that run in four semesters.24 students can be admitted to each specialisation.One must have GATE scores and meet academic standards to get admission.

faqs.question: Is GATE mandatory for M.Tech admission at Dronacharya College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: A proper GATE score is obligatory for applying to the M.Tech programme at Dronacharya College of Engineering.Those applying should have obtained a relevant bachelor's degree.Both success in the GATE exam and the availability of seats in the different areas of study are used during the selection process.No admission can happen if the GATE score is not valid.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dronacharya College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description:
Esthetically designed and State of the art Information Resource Centre (Library) is located on the 3rd floor of the College building and is totally air conditioned. It has been systematically and steadily strengthened. The IRCs operation and services are fully computerized with e-Granthalaya multi-user Integrated Library Automation Software, developed by National Informatics Centre, New Delhi and a Bar Code based circulation system is in use. The IRC is equipped with more than 38,000 books from different streams. Besides these text and reference books IRC is also subscribing a large number of national and international journals, magazines and dailies. Bibliographic records of IRCs holdings can be, accessed through the e- Granthalayas On Line Public Access Catalogue(OPAC). The IRC also maintains a good collection of important educational CDs on Engineering & Technology.
The college is an institutional member of British Council Division Library, New Delhi, American Information Resource Centre, New Delhi and National Library and Information Services infrastructure for Scholarly Content (N-LIST). Our students can avail Library and Information Services of these centers for their specialized information needs, where in they can get a very large volume of books & periodicals along with audio-video, digital and online information resources.

College library has taken the membership of DELNET Consortium for the subscription of online electronic resources. Under the membership library has subscribed for InfoTrac Engineering Collection and also subscribed to Global Periodicals.

Classrooms are fitted with smartboards and Wi-Fi connectivity, enhancing the teaching and learning experience. The library is a highlight, providing access to a vast collection of books, journals, and digital resources, making it an essential resource for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dronacharya College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: There is no big campus. It has 10-15 acres of area. Labs are well maintained. It has Wi-Fi facility. Library is the center of attraction in this college well structured and designed. There are different types of labs for every department. There is an IoS lab too.

reviews.review_heading: Good for you, if you really want to study in less amount.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in labs and classrooms. But hostels are not available after the lockdown. Library has a good and peaceful infrastructure. There are two canteens available on the campus. There is only one day you get sports in a week.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers, canteen, a library, and everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi doesn't work at all. Labs are okay. Classrooms are good for the 1st year only and others are getting renovated. The library is the best. There are two canteens both are very good. The food is okay. Sports facilities are not up to the mark. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Bright and successful future ahead.
reviews.review_text: Games facilities, canteen, air-conditioned classrooms, and big hall are available. There is no hostel available in this college. Sports and games are preferable. The food available in mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities and sports are also available.

data.description: Dronacharya College of Engineering appoints well-experienced and trained faculty members with years of experience in the related field. The faculty focuses on theoretical and practical knowledge to the students. The faculty engages the students with the latest activities, innovative teaching and quality research.

I believe that this college provides the right platform for students to get a successful career.

paragraphs: Dronacharya College of Engineering fee structure ranges from Rs 2.82 lakhs to Rs 5.64 lakhs. For M.Tech it is 2.82 Lacs for two year, on campus full time post graduation programme in M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering, M.Tech Information Technology, M.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering, M.Tech Mechanical Engineering.The college offers scholarship plans via the national scholarship portal and other scholarship portals, which may help students financially.

Dronacharya College of Engineering offers UG and PG courses across Engineering stream. The college has affordable fee strcture for the programmes. The fee strcture of the programme ranges between INR 1.54 lakh- INR 6.07 lakh.  Dronacharya College of Engineering fee structure covers a variety of components, such as caution deposit, exam fee, tuition fee, and others. Besides, students also need to pay a hostel fee for accommodation.

Yes, Dronacharya College of Engineering offer scholarship to the meritorious students under various schemes. The college offer scholarship to UG and PG students as financial support in pursuing higher studies. The below-mentioned are Dronacharya College of Engineering scholarships:
Dronacharya College of Engineering Scholarships
AICTE Pragati Scholarship

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is really good. Exams and campus life are also good.

content.Placements: On the first day of my college, I saw many students in different courses. I am studying BCA from ITM. This year, they have started one summer internship of 1 month and another in the final year which we have to do internships in the last semester. In education, they support us a lot. I just now finished my summer internship and we are asked to find internships on our own.
content.Infrastructure: I lived in the city only so I never stayed in the hostel. The food is amazing and the mess food is really very good. The canteen is average. Classrooms are big. The college also has a library and one has to issue a library card. We can avail books and notes from it. Labs of the college are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: We have good infrastructure. Event is very good. Bus facility is available, hostel rooms are good.

content.Placements: Students are not placed yet as we are the 2nd batch, and 1st batch is in 3rd year. Our course is 4.5 years. As I told you, seniors are the 1st batch, they are in the 3rd year now. In our university, the highest package is 13.5 LPA for batch students. We have a compulsory internship for 6 months.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good at the college. I am in the physiotherapy department. We don't have Wi-Fi connection in class but on campus we have Wi-Fi. In hostel also every floor has Wi-Fi. About canteen, we have two canteens, one is Gajibo and 2nd is Tea Post. Mess is different for hosteller. Games are available at any time. We have a hospital on campus.

admission_overview.college_name: ITM SLS Baroda University Admission 2026: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: ITM SLS Baroda University Admission process 2026

paragraphs: ITM SLS Baroda University admission 2026is currently open. ITM (SLS) Baroda offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers diploma courses. To get admission toITM SLS Baroda University, meet the eligibility criteria of the preferred course. The university offers more than 10 courses in various streams such as Design, Engineering, Mass Communication & Media, etc. The application process at ITM SLS Baroda University is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutITM SLS Baroda Universitycourse admission2026.

ITM SLS Baroda University courses' admissions are based on the entrance exam and merit basis. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular ITM SLS Baroda University courses:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreITM SLS Baroda University courses

ITM SLS Baroda University has a multi-step admission process that students need to follow to get into ITM SLS Baroda University. Starting with the application, students are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are over, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of the university post where interested candidates can submit the fee and confirm their admission. Additionally, Admission to all the ITM SLS Baroda University programmes is based on merit and entrance exam. Candidates must check the eligibility criteria on the official website of ITM SLS Baroda University, before filling out the admission form. Interested candidates can check below the complete ITM SLS Baroda University admission process:
Step 1: ITM SLS Baroda University Application Process
The mode of ITM SLS Baroda University application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill the online application form.
Step 2: ITM SLS Baroda University Selection rounds
ITM SLS Baroda University shortlists candidates either based on merit or entrance exam. After shortlisting candidates, selected candidates receive a provisional admission letter.
Step 3: Final Admission confirmation
To confirm admission at ITM SLS Baroda University, selected candidates need to pay theITM SLS Baroda University feeand visit the university campus for the document verification process.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at ITM SLS Baroda University?
faqs.answer: ITM SLS Baroda University offers 32 courses at UG, PG and Diploma levels in multiple streams like Management, Engineering, Computer Applications, etc. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for UG courses. Bachelor's degree is required to apply for any of the ITM University PG course. Admission is both merit and entrance-based.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA course at ITM SLS Baroda University?
faqs.answer: Admission to MBA is based on CAT/ CMAT score. Additionally, candidates must hold bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ SEBC/ EWS) to apply for MBA course. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The total fee for MBA is INR 1.80 lakh.

faqs.question: Is studying at ITM (SLS) Baroda University expensive?
faqs.answer: The fee structure is different for various courses at ITM SLS Baroda University. Students can check the course-wise total tuition fee from the table presented below:Course NameTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 3.9 lakhBBAINR 2.6 lakhMBAINR 1.9 lakh-INR 2.6 lakhBCAINR 1.9 lakhBPharmaINR 4 lakhBScINR 1.6 lakh-INR 3.6 lakhNote:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I apply for BBA (Hons) at ITM SLS Baroda University after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who have completed Class 12 or equivalent exam from any recognised central/ state board or school can apply for BBA (Hons) course. Additionally, the university will shortlist candidates for BBA (Hons) based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The total fee for BBA (Hons) is INR 2.6 lakh.

placement_data.title: ITM SLS Baroda University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to the official data released by the University, the highest package offered during ITM SLS Baroda University placements 2024 stood at INR 43 LPA . Further, the average package offered in 2024 was INR 4 LPA . More than 900 companies visited the campus and 90% of the total students were placed during ITM SLS Baroda University placements 2024.

There is a dedicated team of Training and Placement Cell at ITMBU responsible for suitably placing students according to their Aptitude, Scores, Attendance, Caliber & Competence. To enhance employability, the cell offers: Aptitude/Technical Tests, Internships, Career Tracks, Mock Interviews, and a Placement Office.

description: ITM (SLS) Baroda University cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

ITM (SLS) Baroda University GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 29066 to 50185. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.
In the final round for the General HS category, the ITM (SLS) Baroda University B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 29066 to 50185, wherein the toughest branch was B.Tech. in Information Technology.

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. Aspirants aiming for admission to the next academic session can refer to the table provided below to know the important GUJCET 2026 dates.

Provided below are the GUJCET last three years, i.e., 2025, 2024 and 2023 cutoff data for all rounds for students to compare and get a better understanding of the admission changes and trends over the years, so that they have a better comprehension of how to prepare for their admissions for the upcoming year.

As the GUJCET cutoff 2025 differs for each category and round, the cutoff also changes according to different institutions who accept the GUJCET exam 2025 results for admission to various specialisations. Students who are unable to avail admission to one academic institution can look at other colleges where their attain rank is accepted. hostel_campus.college_name: ITM SLS Baroda University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college is really good. Exams and campus life are also good.
reviews.review_text: I lived in the city only so I never stayed in the hostel. The food is amazing and the mess food is really very good. The canteen is average. Classrooms are big. The college also has a library and one has to issue a library card. We can avail books and notes from it. Labs of the college are very good.

reviews.review_heading: We have good infrastructure. Event is very good. Bus facility is available, hostel rooms are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good at the college. I am in the physiotherapy department. We don't have Wi-Fi connection in class but on campus we have Wi-Fi. In hostel also every floor has Wi-Fi. About canteen, we have two canteens, one is Gajibo and 2nd is Tea Post. Mess is different for hosteller. Games are available at any time. We have a hospital on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Every teacher is very free with students.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very neat. Classrooms are very perfect. There is no noise pollution. Wi-Fi was a problem before, but it has been cleared. The library is very huge. Every book is available and easy to access. The library is also clean.

reviews.review_heading: Education-wise, I rate it 8 out of 10.
reviews.review_text: ITM has an amazing campus life with the best faculty. The classrooms, libraries, and labs are very good. There is an issue with the network connection, but the infrastructure of the college is good. As I am a day scholar, I don’t know much about the hostel. However, I have heard from my classmates that the rooms are very good and the canteen food is okay. The management here is somewhat strict, which is necessary for our benefit. The college also has its hospital, which is good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members keep an eye on every student. Other curricular activities are limited.
reviews.review_text: Currently pursuing BCA. It is the GATEway for an individual in the teaching field, it is open to all students with or without a science background. It will help the overall development of an individual in the teaching field. Some labs are insane and have nice sitting arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best faculty, teaching, and response.
reviews.review_text: This is the best BCA course for a commerce student who wants to study computer science. The canteen facility is excellent, and the food is healthy. Other courses are available at this college, and there are computer science subjects such as programming languages and built communication skills, among others.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: My name is Sweta Singh. I am a student of BCA Sem-2, and the infrastructure is very good. I learn about many languages like C, HTML, DBMS, PYTHON, etc. In this college many activities and sports are performed, different types of functions for celebration different days also. This college has really good infrastructure and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent academic environment campus that truly enhances the college experience.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms have facilities like tables, chairs, fans, whiteboards, a projector, Wi-Fi connection. We have a library. The hostel has two rooms option AC and non AC. The mess food quality is okay, we have a hospital for medical emergencies, also we have a basketball ground, cricket ground, volleyball ground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Proper education leads to true success.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available for our courses are classes are surrounded by trees which makes the environment positive and refreshing to study and it well lighted and spacious. Our library has an extensive collection of books, research journals, and many more. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is hygienic and qualitative. Medical facilities are promptly provided in case of any emergency as we have our hospital. In terms of games and sports. There are various courts available for f...

reviews.review_heading: Good vibes, good campus, and good placements. Overall worth it!
reviews.review_text: The campus is very peaceful and student-friendly for both studying and chilling with friends. The classrooms are spacious enough. Hostel rooms are available in AC and non-AC in both options also including meals like breakfast lunch and dinner daily. The university has its hospital providing service to students and staff.

reviews.review_heading: Good education provides good success.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my university is amazing with lush green fields and with various eye-catching cultures. Our university has various amenities for sports enthusiastic students like a cricket ground, basketball court, and badminton court. There is an amazing gazebo in our university to utilize in our free time.

reviews.review_heading: Best choice for pursuing MBA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good. We have a clean water facility, library facility, canteen facility, and classes with very comfortable seating arrangements. Also, we have a place like Gazibo to chit-chat with our friends. So ITM provides great infrastructure to its students.

reviews.review_heading: As a MBA student I'm absolutely satisfied with the teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well developed. Classrooms are equipped with projectors which enhance learning experience. The campus is clean, well maintained, and provides professional atmosphere. The canteen deserves special mention and it offers good food at reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: MBA programme is for better future & placement.
reviews.review_text: The university has labs and a library. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It offers good quality hygienic food, and the campus is also very aesthetic. The campus has very good vibes & location.

reviews.review_heading: It provides great courses and a decent stay as well.
reviews.review_text: Labs and infrastructure are modern. Hostels are clean and secure. It offers decent and tasty food. It should improve in Wi-Fi and recreation facilities for better students comfort.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Roorkee Institute of Technology:

college_info.intro: RIT Roorkee popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech and BSc students are placed in top companies such as Hexaware, Amazon, and others. BTech students can become Engineers, Managers, and Team Leaders, or can even go for postgraduate courses. BSc and BTech students are taught with the help of the latest technology. The college has more than 10 student clubs across Business, Culture, and Technology. These clubs help students in enhancing their knowledge and skills. Below mentioned are some of the RIT Roorkee courses and their respective eligibility and RIT Roorkee fee structure:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered every semester
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: RIT Roorkee offers PG and UG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Engineering, Management, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers four-year and BPT, three-year BCA, BBA, BOTT, BMRIT, BMM, and BSc courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MCA, MBA Global, and MTech courses to students. All these courses are full-time courses. BTech is provided in specialisations, namely CSE, CSE AI&ML, ECE, and others. Below mentioned are some of the Roorkee Institute of Technology courses and their respective eligibility and :

faqs.answer: A:    For admission in a BBA programme at Roorkee Institute of Technology, it is crucial that the aspirant fulfills the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the asiprants who have passed Class 12 (common eligibility) are eligible for admission. In addition, student should have passed the qualifying examination from a recognised board. Candidate must also hold the last educational qualification mark sheet during application form filling and at the time of admission for verification purposes.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BBA admission at RIT Roorkee?

faqs.answer: A:    The college offers BTech, MBA, BSc, etc., courses at the UG and PG level. To be admitted to the RIT Roorkee, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at the RIT Roorkee is conducted online. Students can check some of the course-wise total tuition fee from the table presented below:Course NameTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 3.3 lakh-INR 5.2 lakhMTechINR 1.6 lakhMBAINR 4.6 lakhBPTINR 2.3 lakhBMRITINR 1.7 lakhNote: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at Roorkee Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    A total of 120 seats are available for BBA course at RIT Roorkee. The college offers BBA courses at the UG level. The candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enroll for the admission to the BBA course set by the college. RIT Roorkee's admission process is entrance-based.
faqs.question: How many students can do BBA at RIT Roorkee?

faqs.answer: A:    Roorkee Institute of Technology offers a MBA programme, and the total tuition fee for this programme is INR 4.6 lakh. The fee covers various academic expenses like tuition fees, laboratory charges, examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure has developed over the last two years, and placements also show good signs.

review_content.Placements: I am from B.Tech 3rd year CSE, my batch is 2023-27. Every year, 70 to 80 percent of students get placements, but it mostly depends on how the student acts on placement-related options in college. The college does its best to provide top placement opportunities for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good when I got admission, but after my admission, I saw that the college gives funds for labs and even for canteens and libraries. The hostel facilities are top-notch, and the girls' hostel facilities are also top-notch. Labs are in very good shape, and new labs open every month with new laptops and equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with this college for my course.

review_content.Placements: About 90 percent of students are placed in my course and others as well. The highest package is 20 LPA, the average is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. Companies like TCS and HCL recruit for my course. About 67% of Planet Park interns are from our college. Data Science is mostly offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are well-built with high-speed internet. The library has a huge number of books and personal tables for students to study alone. Hostel rooms and food are average, but the canteen and sports facilities are good.

review_summary.college_name: RIT Roorkee Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A good college with great academics and a great environment. Juniors are welcome here.

content.Placements: I am studying at RIT Roorkee. As a student, I think it is a good college for students. Academics are very good. They teach us very well. Companies visit the college, and seniors are also placed. The salary package offered ranges from 8-12 LPA. If students keep grinding, then they will crack the job from here.
content.Infrastructure: At RIT Roorkee, all classrooms and Wi-Fi are good. Sometimes, we face problems in the library, but overall, it is good. The food is also good and not like home. Overall, it is okay and normal. Sometimes, it is very good. Overall, the college is the best.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Well, according to me, this college is okayish. You may or may not consider this.

content.Placements: Placements are not something that your college will just bring and put in your hands. You have to work hard for it. Many companies come to the college, but students are not able to crack them. I don't think it's the college's fault. It's totally upto the students how well he/she is prepared for it.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is quite good, and the food is also decent. But some find it not up to the mark. Food quality is average, but on the better side, as compared to other colleges. Students are encouraged to take part in co-curricular activities rest is upto them whether they want to participate or not.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure has developed over the last two years, and placements also show good signs.

content.Placements: I am from B.Tech 3rd year CSE, my batch is 2023-27. Every year, 70 to 80 percent of students get placements, but it mostly depends on how the student acts on placement-related options in college. The college does its best to provide top placement opportunities for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good when I got admission, but after my admission, I saw that the college gives funds for labs and even for canteens and libraries. The hostel facilities are top-notch, and the girls' hostel facilities are also top-notch. Labs are in very good shape, and new labs open every month with new laptops and equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with this college for my course.

content.Placements: About 90 percent of students are placed in my course and others as well. The highest package is 20 LPA, the average is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. Companies like TCS and HCL recruit for my course. About 67% of Planet Park interns are from our college. Data Science is mostly offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are well-built with high-speed internet. The library has a huge number of books and personal tables for students to study alone. Hostel rooms and food are average, but the canteen and sports facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college for my course is the best, so you will get admission.

content.Placements: According to the institution, most students get placed. The highest average package is 10 LPA, and the lowest average package is 5LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, KPMG, etc. The student got internship in the BCA course, and the company will also come.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. The facilities of the college are good. The college will provide high speed Wi-Fi, labs, and a library with air conditioning. The facilities of the hostel are good, and the quality of food in the mess is average. The medical facilities in college.

As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during RIT Roorkee placements 2024 stood at INR 20 LPA and INR 8 LPA, respectively. hostel_campus.college_name: RIT Roorkee Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A good college with great academics and a great environment. Juniors are welcome here.
reviews.review_text: At RIT Roorkee, all classrooms and Wi-Fi are good. Sometimes, we face problems in the library, but overall, it is good. The food is also good and not like home. Overall, it is okay and normal. Sometimes, it is very good. Overall, the college is the best.

reviews.review_heading: Well, according to me, this college is okayish. You may or may not consider this.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is quite good, and the food is also decent. But some find it not up to the mark. Food quality is average, but on the better side, as compared to other colleges. Students are encouraged to take part in co-curricular activities rest is upto them whether they want to participate or not.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure has developed over the last two years, and placements also show good signs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was not good when I got admission, but after my admission, I saw that the college gives funds for labs and even for canteens and libraries. The hostel facilities are top-notch, and the girls' hostel facilities are also top-notch. Labs are in very good shape, and new labs open every month with new laptops and equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college for my course.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are well-built with high-speed internet. The library has a huge number of books and personal tables for students to study alone. Hostel rooms and food are average, but the canteen and sports facilities are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RIT Roorkee School of Computer ApplicationReviewed on 22 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college for my course is the best, so you will get admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. The facilities of the college are good. The college will provide high speed Wi-Fi, labs, and a library with air conditioning. The facilities of the hostel are good, and the quality of food in the mess is average. The medical facilities in college.

reviews.review_heading: College only completed UTU syllabus, no skill preparations, hectic, and low marks despite efforts.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not so fast sometimes, especially during examination time. There are only 2-3 labs in which PC works otherwise, all PCs are dumped. Food quality in the mess is fine, but they haven't changed the menu for the past 3 years. I am eating the same food.

reviews.review_heading: Not so much good, I think there are better options too at this budget and range.
reviews.review_text: Food is not so much good. There are so much restrictions on food. They use low quality paneer, and provide only small amount per serve. Only breakfast is good, and dinner is not good heavy oil and spices are used. At the end of dinner time, they also mix water into the pulse.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RIT Roorkee School of ManagementReviewed on 20 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college provides good infrastructure and a learning environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good in our college. A better environment to study is also provided. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are also good. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is available, but the food is not that good and is average. Canteen and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: To summarize: The college is good if you don't have high expectations.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, but infrastructure is very poor. All the departments are good. Quality of the facilities in my hostel is poor. Food quality is bad in the mess, but canteen is very good. Medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: To summarize, the college is good if you don't have expectations too high.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is average. Hostel is not good because food is really bad poor. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is good. Quality of food is poor. Mess and canteen are available.

reviews.review_heading: If I have to summarize it, then it is a good college if your expectations are not too high.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the building is above average. It has good canteen facilities. A good library with a good Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are above average. Hostel facilities are average. Mess food is also average. Medical facilities and sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and average fee compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is not good, but facilities of hostel are good. Ragging is banned from the hostel. Anti-ragging is owned by the college, and strict action is taken by the authorities. Other thing is we need permission to meet our parents and go outside the college.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good. I am enjoying my time there.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available here. The playground area is large for all sports. Clean bathrooms, Wi-Fi, labs, gym, and library are all available. Our hostel is very good. Well and fresh food is provided. Laundry services are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc., are available in good condition. The quality of food needs to be upgraded, sometimes it is too oily and sometimes it is too dry. Medical facilities given are also good. Sports and games are also conducted in Sportech.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by RIT Roorkee School of Computer ApplicationReviewed on 13 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Everything is decent but not much good. It is value for money, but placements are not really good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available, labs are available, and smart classrooms are provided only for MBA. The library is available. The food is not very good, and medical facilities are somewhat available. Sports like football, cricket, basketball, and golf are available. In the mess, the food is not good for daily eating.

admission_process.title: HNBGU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HNBGU admission 2025to its three campuses (Srinagar, Pauri and Tehri) is bothentrance and merit-based. The University accepts CUET-UG entrance test scores for admission to undergraduate and integrated courses. In addition, the CUET-PG score is also accepted forHNBGU PG admissions. Apart from this, the University also admit students based on scores obtained in national-level examinations conducted by different authorities such as JEE Main, CAT, MAT, and UGC NET, among others.

Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal Universityoffers756 UG, PG, diploma and doctoral courses across 16 streams, 11 schools, 47 departments and two centres(Agriculture and Allied Sciences, Commerce, Earth Science, Arts, Communication and Languages, Law).

The university offers courses across various streams such as Design, Engineering, Law, IT & Software, Science, etc.HNBGU course admissionsare through the CUET exam for courses offered at the Srinagar campus. Aspirants are advised to check the required qualifications before applying to any course. The table given below mentionsHNBGU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection details:

TheHNBGU admission processinvolves online registration, shortlisting of students, release of merit list, seat allotment, document submission, and admission fee payment. Selection for most of the courses is done based on merit in the accepted exam (CUET-UG/CUET-PG/JEE Main, etc.). Below are the steps forHNBGU admission:
STEP 1: HNBGU Application Process 2025

The university accept applications via online mode. Eligible candidates can visit its official website (hnbgu.ac.in) to fill out the form. All the details should be filled out carefully in the application form. In addition, the application form must be submitted on or before the prescribed deadline.
STEP 2: Selection & Shorting of Students

After the conclusion of the application process, the university shortlists students based on scores in the accepted exam. HNBGU CUET merit list shall be published further to declare the names of the selected candidates. Candidates who make it to the selection list become eligible for admission to further selection round/seat allotment.
STEP 3: Counselling

Counselling is held after the CUET merit list is declared for theHemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University course admissions. This admission round is generally conducted for admission to the BTech lateral entry programmes. Admission to some of the courses offered by university-affiliated colleges can also be through a counselling process.
Take a freeCUET Mock Testnow!!
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates who are allotted a seat in the counselling round can pay the admission fee. After document verification and fee payment, admission is confirmed.
lists: The fee refund for the professional/self-finance degree and diploma courses is done as per the guidelines of the concerned national regulatory body and/or the guidelines of the UGC/University.
In case, a student opts out of a diploma programme mid-session, then the fee till the last month of attended class can be charged.
HNBGU reserves the right to revise the fee structure or the rules of fee refund.

placement_report.college_name: HNBGU Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: HNBGU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to HNBGU overall NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 2.4 LPA and INR 5.48 LPA , respectively. Further, as per Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University Pharmacy NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during HNBGU BPharm placements 2023 stood at INR 2.04 LPA . In addition, 15 students were placed and 20 students opted for higher studies out of 62 students during HNBGU BPharm placements 2023.

tables.context: How are the placements at HNBGU?

faqs.question: How are the placements at HNBGU?
faqs.answer: According to HNBGU overall NIRF report 2024, the key highlights of HNBGU placements 2023 as compared with 2022 and 2021 are presented below: Particulars Overall UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2021) Overall UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2022) Overall UG 4-year Placement Statistics (2023) Median package INR 2.5 LPA INR 2.9 LPA INR 2.4 LPA Total students 263 266 248 Students placed 55 61 73 Students opted for higher studies 12 22 47 Particulars Overall PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2021) Overall PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2022) Overall PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2023) Median package INR 5 LPA INR 5.2 LPA INR 5.48 LPA Total students 1396 1382 1214 Students placed 24 88 158 Students opted for higher studies 18 32 128

faqs.question: What is the highest placement in HNBGU?
faqs.answer: The Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University is approved by the UGC and given a "A" grade by NAAC. HNBGU provides more than 700 undergraduate, graduate, certificate, and doctorate courses in 16 streams, 11 schools, 47 departments, and 2 centres (Agriculture and Allied Sciences, Commerce, Earth Science, Arts, Communication and Languages, and Law). The median package provided during the HNBGU UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements in 2022 was INR 2.90 LPA and INR 5.20 LPA, respectively, according to the HNBGU overall NIRF report for 2023. In addition, during the Hemvati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University BPharm and MPharm placements 2022, the median compensation package was INR 1.8 LPA and INR 2.4 LPA, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dolphin (PG) Institute of Biomedical and Natural Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are too good here. Course facilities are very good, and the department is too. Wi-Fi is available, labs are good, classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is extensive. Medical facilities are available at any time, and sports are good. Games happen on a daily basis.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Roorkee Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A good college with great academics and a great environment. Juniors are welcome here.
reviews.review_text: At RIT Roorkee, all classrooms and Wi-Fi are good. Sometimes, we face problems in the library, but overall, it is good. The food is also good and not like home. Overall, it is okay and normal. Sometimes, it is very good. Overall, the college is the best.

reviews.review_heading: This is the review of my Bachelors degree.

college_info.intro: G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management offers BTech, MCA and MBA as the popular courses in full-time mode. The College offers respective courses on the basis of a minimum aggregate of 45% (for BTech) secured in Class 12. In addition to this, admission to these courses would require for candidates to secure a valid scores in exams such as MHT CET, JEE Main, GATE or other equivalent exams. G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management fee structure includes tuition fee ranging from INR 1.3 Lakh to INR 5.5 Lakh. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching staff in ENTC, and the college is not best but better for sure.

content.Placements: A CGPA of at least 8.5+ is better. In the beginning, as we are freshers, the payment is usually around 25–30,000. Companies select students based on their skills or CGPA. If we have experience, they hire us based on that experience, and the payment also depends on it. At least a CGPA of 7.5 is required.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library where we can study or take books. There is also a computer lab for students so they can use it for projects. Wi-Fi is available. I have no experience with the hostel, but there is a big hostel as far as I know. There are also many competitions conducted regarding sports and cultural activities. Functions like Ganesh Chaturthi, Shiv Jayanti, dance programmes, farewells, and other events are also organized.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, supportive faculty, good placements, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: Around 85-90 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 40 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and average is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and Wipro. About 75 percent of students got internships in companies like Microsoft, Amazon, Deloitte, Infosys, and startups. Top roles offered are software engineer, data analyst, web developer, ML engineer, and cloud engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Our CSE department has excellent facilities with high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, modern computer labs, and a well-equipped digital library. Hostels are clean, secure, and comfortable with Wi-Fi and regular maintenance. Mess provides hygienic, tasty food, and the canteen offers a good variety. Medical facilities include a campus health center and ambulance service. Sports and gym facilities are well-maintained with options for both indoor and outdoor games. The infrastructure is modern and student-friendly.

admission_overview.college_name: GHRCEM Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: GHRCEM  Jalgaon Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GHRCEM Jalgaon admission is open for all its courses. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based followed by a counselling round. The college considers scores in CET, JEE, MAH MBA CET, etc. for admission to specific courses. However, no entrance exam is considered for admission to BTech lateral entry. Candidates seeking admission toG H Raisoni College of Engineering and Managementmust register for entrance exams and appear for the same. Further, after filling out the criteria set by the college, candidates must visit the college's official website to apply for admission. To know the latest information related to the G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management admission process, course-wise eligibility and selection criteria, go through the below article:

The eligibility requirement varies course-wise. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Besides, aspirants must also pass the entrance exam accepted for the applied course. Below are popularGHRCEM Jalgaon coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
JEE Main/MHT CET+ CAP
Merit + CAP

GHRCEM offers admission to courses based on their merit or entrance exam scores. The college considers scores in national or state-level entrance tests for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in GHRCEM Jalgaon:
Step 1: GHRCEM Jalgaon Application Process 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can fill out the form. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to register for a course.
Step 2: Selection
The college selects candidates forBTech, MTech,MCA, MBA,BBA, andBCAbased on entrance exam scores. GHRCEM Jalgaon considers scores in GATE, MAH MBA CET, MAH MCA CET, JEE Main, GATE, etc.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Candidates need to register for the Centralised Admission Process (CAP) for the respective Maharashtra state entrance exam. Aspirants with JEE Main or GATE scores can also apply for CAP. Aspirants are allotted seats based on their rank. Selected candidates need to pay theGHRCEM Jalgaon feeto confirm their seats.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: Yes, GHRCEM Jalgaon considers entrance exam scores for admission to most of the programmes. The college accepts scores in national or state-level entrance exams such as MHT CET, MAH MBA CET, GATE, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. GHRCEM Jalgaon considers entrance exam scores for all its courses. Further, for BTech Lateral, college offers admission based on last qualifying exam scores, followed by CAP counselling.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at GHRCEM Jalgaon?
faqs.answer: GHRCEM Jalgaon offers admission to courses based on entrance scores. The college shortlists candidates for BTech, MBA, BCA, MCA and M.Tech is based on entrance exam scores. The college accepts scores in JEE Main, MHT CET, MBA CET, MAH BCA CET, etc. Besides, selection in B.Tech lateral entry programmes is based on the qualifying exam scores of the candidate. Once selected, candidates can participate in CAP with a valid score in the entrance exam.

faqs.question: Can I apply to GHRCEM Jalgaon with a 55% score in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates are required to pass a minimum of Class 12 to apply for a UG course at GHRCEM Jalgaon. The minimum aggregate required for UG courses is 45%. Hence, aspirants with 55% aggregate in Class 12 can apply for any of the offered UG programmes. Besides, aspirants must also fulfil the course-specific selection requirements.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching staff in ENTC, and the college is not best but better for sure.
reviews.review_text: There is a library where we can study or take books. There is also a computer lab for students so they can use it for projects. Wi-Fi is available. I have no experience with the hostel, but there is a big hostel as far as I know. There are also many competitions conducted regarding sports and cultural activities. Functions like Ganesh Chaturthi, Shiv Jayanti, dance programmes, farewells, and other events are also organized.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, supportive faculty, good placements, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our CSE department has excellent facilities with high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, modern computer labs, and a well-equipped digital library. Hostels are clean, secure, and comfortable with Wi-Fi and regular maintenance. Mess provides hygienic, tasty food, and the canteen offers a good variety. Medical facilities include a campus health center and ambulance service. Sports and gym facilities are well-maintained with options for both indoor and outdoor games. The infrastructure is modern and st...

reviews.review_heading: Dipak Surnar College review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for this course are very good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, as well as the library are present. The quality of food in my college canteen is very tasty and healthy. Medical facilities are very good, and sports and games are also available for students in this course.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good campus and good placements according to students' skills.
reviews.review_text: Classes are regular, and a separate library is available. Each department has its own space for communication. With studies, various things are performed, such as sports, games, visits, etc. The college has a great campus. It has modern facilities, vast infrastructure, and perfect laboratory equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus that shows the quality of college.
reviews.review_text: Classroom is also very good with free high-speed Wi-Fi support. Mess and canteen are also very clean and good. Sports instruments are also available, so we can enjoy ourselves in our free time. Campus is also very good, with a cricket ground, basketball court, library, and all the things are available.

reviews.review_heading: Great teaching staff, a supportive environment, and the best college for data science.
reviews.review_text: Our department has a well-equipped computer lab, high-speed internet, and up-to-date software. Although the classrooms could use better ventilation, they are overall good. The library housed a collection of the latest and older technical, non-technical, and reference books. The hostel facilities are average; the food in the mess is mostly good, though occasionally it is not. Additionally, the hostel is equipped with basic first aid for emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: Review of G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are excellent. A Wi-Fi classroom and library are available for the students, and there is a good canteen provided for all students. Medical facilities and sports activities are also present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Shiksha review by a student.
reviews.review_text: For the student, all facilities are available in the college, but the infrastructure available in my course is so good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are all available in this course. The quality and food in my course are so good, and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also present in college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shiksha by Deepak.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my course were so good. Wi-Fi and library were present for the students. The quality and facilities present in my college were so good. Canteen food was so tasty. Medical facility was also available but sports and games facilities were not present.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the college IT.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in this course are so good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library are available. The food quality at my college is so superb. Medical and sports facilities are present in this course for students in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Gratitude to the college.
reviews.review_text: The campus environment is good and fresh and young. I love the attire of the college. The college has a library, labs, and many other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Innovative learning hub.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities and infrastructure with well-developed and working labs useful for programming. Hostel facilities are very good with a proper nutritionist diet and all facilities. Hostel rooms are clean and provide a healthy and peaceful environment.

reviews.review_heading: Enriched college and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also good, and the locality is decent. It may look like a city, but in reality, it is a village, not Pune city. The city for students is nice to see. You should focus on good time utilization. It's a place where you can stay for a few years.

reviews.review_heading: The college is amazing and has great fests.
reviews.review_text: The internet is also amazing and gives good coverage to every device that is connected to it. I have been in the college hostel for a year. It has been good, though food and other hostel facilities. It includes Wi-Fi, good food, and security also trusted by the parents.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good experiences.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure available is quite good. There is Wi-Fi in labs for performing practicals, classrooms are cleaned regularly, and library facilities are also provided. The hostel facilities, the quality of food in the mess, and the canteen are good. Many sports competitions and games.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has strong academics, infrastructure, and excellent placement support.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate of the college is about 80-95%. The highest salary package offered ranges from 20-30 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges from 3-5 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 6-8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Zoho, L&T, Amazon, Microsoft, and Cognizant visit the college to hire students from our course. About 70% of students got internships in top companies like Zoho, Amazon, Ashok Leyland, and TCS. Top roles like software engineer, analyst, design engineer, and project manager are offered to students. For exact states, refer to GCT's official website.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements with the highest salary package. I'm satisfied with my college and campus life.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage varies from year to year. And it will be above 60 percent. The highest package is about 13.5 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sobha Construction Dubai, TAFe, Hyundai, etc. 100 percent of students are getting internships from the course and in companies like TVS training and services, Chennai. Quality engineer, sales. Etc. are the roles offered in companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available even at the hostel and on college premises. The infrastructure is old and well-maintained at the college premises. And a new hostel is opened this year. The laboratories have all machines and engines and the staff allows students to learn from them. The library is available with all books including foreign authors and local authors. The quality of food is decent in the hostel mess and canteen. The medical facilities are also available within college named dispensary where government doctors used to visit regularly on an hourly basis. Talking about sports, students are very great at making efforts.

review_summary.college_name: GCT Coimbatore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is a totally great place to learn.

content.Placements: About 30 to 40 percent of students are getting placed this year. Most of the students are interested in higher studies. The highest package is 24 LPA and the lowest package is3 LPA. Shoba Construction, Dubai, recruit. I got an internship at Srinsoftech Design as a site engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The library is really very good, and labs and classrooms have moderate Wi-Fi, which is not that much used. They give more importance to games and sports. There are various clubs, the food in the canteen and hostel is average only, and the medical facilities are okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best for placements but bad for hostel students (girls).

content.Placements: About 80% of students are placed each year. The highest package of CSE is 8.4 LPA, and the lowest package is around 2.4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Zoho, Bosch, and Walmart. As we are CSEians, the role that we are getting after placed is software developer.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is pretty good but the laboratories are poorly functioning and maintained. Library and classrooms are maintained properly. Hostel has all the basic facilities but not a sophisticated one. The food quality is average in hostel but canteen food is better. Students are regularly trained for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has strong academics, infrastructure, and excellent placement support.

content.Placements: The placement rate of the college is about 80-95%. The highest salary package offered ranges from 20-30 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges from 3-5 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 6-8 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Zoho, L&T, Amazon, Microsoft, and Cognizant visit the college to hire students from our course. About 70% of students got internships in top companies like Zoho, Amazon, Ashok Leyland, and TCS. Top roles like software engineer, analyst, design engineer, and project manager are offered to students. For exact states, refer to GCT's official website.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placements with the highest salary package. I'm satisfied with my college and campus life.

content.Placements: The placement percentage varies from year to year. And it will be above 60 percent. The highest package is about 13.5 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sobha Construction Dubai, TAFe, Hyundai, etc. 100 percent of students are getting internships from the course and in companies like TVS training and services, Chennai. Quality engineer, sales. Etc. are the roles offered in companies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available even at the hostel and on college premises. The infrastructure is old and well-maintained at the college premises. And a new hostel is opened this year. The laboratories have all machines and engines and the staff allows students to learn from them. The library is available with all books including foreign authors and local authors. The quality of food is decent in the hostel mess and canteen. The medical facilities are also available within college named dispensary where government doctors used to visit regularly on an hourly basis. Talking about sports, students are very great at making efforts.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Industrial Biotechnology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The best part of my life. It has given me more friends and knowledge and how to survive in society.

content.Placements: In IT, 100% of students were placed. TCS and Cognizant selected more students. Package will vary based on role, up to 4-7 LPA. Analysts, developers, and testers are they selected. In internships, fewer students are only interested. Zifo is the main company for biotechnology students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are okay. Wi-Fi and library are also available. But fewer lab facilities are there. Hostel rooms were also okay but the food was average. In college, a canteen is available. Medical facilities are also available. In sports, there is a lot of exposure. People who are interested in sports will definitely help you as much as you need.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a new-age engineering college. So, it will rule beforehand.

review_content.Placements: Our college started last year so we did not have any placements because we are the first batch of NIAT. The college assured us that at the end of 4th year, we will get placements with a package of more than 10 LPA. However, we started getting internships in the first year only with a package of 3 LPA so we think we will be good in the end.
review_content.Infrastructure: We use laptops here and we have classrooms equipped with AC. It has high-speed net connectivity and power sockets at our table. We have a play area as well for freshness. We have a lobby and all are equipped with AC. I don't know about hostels as I am a day scholar.

review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities of our course are good. The infrastructure available in our college is good. We have different labs for each department and different subjects. review_summary.college_name: NIAT Hyderabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall experience is good, mentors also support.

content.Placements: Placements for our course have not started yet, but many have got internships. Almost all the students have done internships, mostly in IT companies. We are expecting good results once the placements start. Future prospects look decent in our life.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent. Labs are maintained neatly, systems are updated. Classrooms are spacious, and the environment is calm. The hostel is also clean, food is good. Wi-Fi, reading rooms, basic facilities are all available in the hostel. I like it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My own experience about NIAT.

content.Placements: All the learning and skills will be through, which are required for the industry. Whatever we learn here, with this learning and skills, we can get job opportunities easily. The learning is very easy and helpful. Many of the students who learned in this programme are already receiving paid internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: It is neat and well maintained with modern classrooms, smartboards, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Labs are also well-equipped with the latest software tools, and every one of us gets hands-on practice. They provide excellent facilities, a clean environment, and good food arrangements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a new-age engineering college. So, it will rule beforehand.

content.Placements: Our college started last year so we did not have any placements because we are the first batch of NIAT. The college assured us that at the end of 4th year, we will get placements with a package of more than 10 LPA. However, we started getting internships in the first year only with a package of 3 LPA so we think we will be good in the end.
content.Infrastructure: We use laptops here and we have classrooms equipped with AC. It has high-speed net connectivity and power sockets at our table. We have a play area as well for freshness. We have a lobby and all are equipped with AC. I don't know about hostels as I am a day scholar.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college and qualified faculty members.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 24 LPA, the lowest package is 8 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Tech Mahindra, Infosys, JSW Steel, and Wipro. Nearly 70% of students got internships from our course. Top role offered is manager data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities of our course are good. The infrastructure available in our college is good. We have different labs for each department and different subjects. Library is good, and we have full connectivity with Wi-Fi. The hostel food is better than the other hostels. Sports and games happened everyday evening.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Mixed experience at Nxtwave college: Strong placements & infrastructure, but poor faculty support.

content.Placements: 80% of students are placed in our college. The highest package is 1 lakh, the lowest package is Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 60,000. Amazon and Flipkart are recruiting companies in our college. Almost all students get internships from our course at Amazon, Flipkart, and many other companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has some facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a lobby, a playground, and a cafeteria. The food in the mess and canteen is good. The medical facilities are available. We have sports and many games to play. We learn lots of study and extra activities in our college. I am very happy to join this college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall experience is good, mentors also support.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. Labs are maintained neatly, systems are updated. Classrooms are spacious, and the environment is calm. The hostel is also clean, food is good. Wi-Fi, reading rooms, basic facilities are all available in the hostel. I like it.

reviews.review_heading: My own experience about NIAT.
reviews.review_text: It is neat and well maintained with modern classrooms, smartboards, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Labs are also well-equipped with the latest software tools, and every one of us gets hands-on practice. They provide excellent facilities, a clean environment, and good food arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: It is a new-age engineering college. So, it will rule beforehand.
reviews.review_text: We use laptops here and we have classrooms equipped with AC. It has high-speed net connectivity and power sockets at our table. We have a play area as well for freshness. We have a lobby and all are equipped with AC. I don't know about hostels as I am a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of our course are good. The infrastructure available in our college is good. We have different labs for each department and different subjects. Library is good, and we have full connectivity with Wi-Fi. The hostel food is better than the other hostels. Sports and games happened everyday evening.

reviews.review_heading: Mixed experience at Nxtwave college: Strong placements & infrastructure, but poor faculty support.
reviews.review_text: Our college has some facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a lobby, a playground, and a cafeteria. The food in the mess and canteen is good. The medical facilities are available. We have sports and many games to play. We learn lots of study and extra activities in our college. I am very happy to join this college.

reviews.review_heading: NIAT - The college that builds skills, not just degrees.
reviews.review_text: High-speed Wi-Fi is available 24X7 and has wide campus. We have smart classrooms with projectors, smart TV, and interactive boards. Hostel rooms are clean and have ventilated rooms with regular maintenance. It provides balanced meals with veg/non-veg options. Indoor sports are available like carroms, chess, and table tennis on campus. For outdoor games, ground is near the hostel

reviews.review_heading: A good college that teaches only the required skills.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and futuristic, and the institute is situated in an IT building with two floors that can accommodate almost 1,000 students. If you are really focused on university infrastructure, you should not prefer this. Regarding the hostel, it did not meet our requirements, as it was not up to the mark for the fees we paid. The food is average, but it provided a bus facility to the college ground from 6 to 9 pm.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college, completely different from traditional colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very new, well-equipped, and well-maintained. It feels like coming to a software office every day. There is a hostel facility, and the food is decent and good. Sports playgrounds for cricket and football are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, really good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and classrooms are superb. The quality of facilities in our hostel is not bad. The quality of food available in our mess and canteen are good. The sports, medical facilities, and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is satisfying, with good staff and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. We have different labs for each department and subject. The library is good, and the campus is fully connected with Wi-Fi. Every classroom has Wi-Fi connectivity. The facilities available in our hostel are good, with proper Telugu food provided. We have canteens available in our college, and sports are played every evening.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and good placements, with really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are available. We have fully connected Wi-Fi in our hostel rooms. The quality facilities in our hostel are very good. The mess is clean and neat, and the food is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: The number one private institute in Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: Mr. Weave Institute is a luxury institute with highly advanced technology classrooms. They offer advanced subject teaching. The hostels are located outside the campus. The college staff provides a variety of indoor and outdoor games. There are also many functions where every festival is celebrated.

reviews.review_heading: Industry-relevant curriculum with great placement support.
reviews.review_text: At NIAT, the course is designed to be completely self-paced, making it ideal for flexible learning. High-speed internet is available in college. As of now, they don't have a hostel, so we are staying at PG. We have very few sports facilities. Before, they used to provide us with a ground for 2 hours, but now they aren't providing ground.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty and internships in 2025.
reviews.review_text: The college offers excellent classrooms with modern design, dual LED screens, and well-structured classes with 60 students per room. The learning experience is smooth and effective. Unfortunately, the hostel experience is not very good. The hostels are not well-maintained, and the food quality is not very tasty or healthy. I rate it 2/5. Only indoor games are available. There are no outdoor sports or recreational areas, which is a downside for students who enjoy physical activities.

reviews.review_heading: Strong technical exposure with decent internship opportunities.
reviews.review_text: College has fully modern classrooms with two LED screens in each classroom and around 60 students per class. Everything is excellent. The hostel rating is 1 out of 5. We are given some of the worst hostels in Gowlidoddy, especially in terms of food quality, which is the worst. We also have only indoor games.

highlights.summary: UPES 2026 Admissions Open

college_info.intro:
UPES School of Advanced Engineering popular programmes are BTech and BSc. The college offers a BTech programme across several specialisations such as Aerospace, Civil, Mechanical, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Chemical, Applied Petroleum, etc. BTech students can look for career opportunities such as Disaster Management, Fire Fighting, Industrial Safety, Safety Consultancy, Risk Assessment, and Health and Safety Management. By doing BTech in Mechanical (Defence Technology), students will be able to learn Military Communication Systems, Aerospace Engineering, Radar Technology, and others.
UPES School of Advanced Engineering's BSc course aspirants must pay an application fee which is INR 1,350. It is one of the best Engineering colleges and is ranked 42 under the Engineering category by NIRF 2024. UPES School of Advanced Engineering BTech and BSc course students are placed in top companies such as Adani Group, Asian Paints, Schlumberger, ONGC, Hyundai, and others. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at UPES School of Advanced Engineering in the table provided below:

Both inside India & outside India

faqs.question: Is UPES School of Advanced Engineering good for placement?

faqs.answer: A:    The top recruiters for the BSc programme at UPES School of Advanced Engineering include several leading companies known for strong industry presence. Adani, Airbus, Alstom, Asianpaints, Baker Hughes, Ericsson, Godrej, Hyundai, Panasonic, Royal Enfield, etc. are some of the notable recruiters. This endorses that the placement opportunities and industrial networks offered by UPES are strong enough to offer good career opportunities after completing graduation.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of UPES School of Advanced Engineering for BSc programme?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: UPES School of Advanced Engineering courses are offered to students at UG, PG, and PhD levels. The college offers a wide range of programmes, mainly in the field of Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers BTech and BSc courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers MTech and MSc courses. MTech is provided in 4 specialisations, including Mechanical, Energy, Electrical, and Sustainability Engineering. UPES School of Advanced Engineering courses are offered to students in 7 different Engineering departments such as the Department of Aerospace Engineering, the Department of Applied Sciences, etc. The following table showcases a list of along with their eligibility criteria and total tuition fee

faqs.answer: A:    The students who want admission into BTech course at UPES School of Advance Engineering must fuflil the minimum eligibility criteria. They must have atleast 50% marks in class 10th and 12th exams. Students must have Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as their subjects. Either of the exams needs to be cleared; JEE Mains, UPESEAT, SAT, CUET-UG.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at UPES School of Advance Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    UPES School of Advanced Engineering boasts a high number of seats for BSc admissions. According to the official sources, the university offers 50 seats. This happens because the university offers this programme in affiliation with many other schools. Students must note that the above mentioned seat intake is as per official sources. However, it is subject to change at the discretion of concerned authorities.
faqs.question: How many students can do BSc from UPES School of Advanced Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    The candidates should have secured an aggregate of 50% marks in 10th class and 12th class with at least 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as subjects from a recognised board. The overall cutoff percentile for MAT is 70. University do not offer management quota unlike other private universities.
