review_content.General: So TBH, I am not living in the campus hostel as the campus hostel serves non-veg food, and I have been a vegan from birth. So I avoid living inside the college campus. But I have seen some facilities and also heard more from my friends, like good infrastructure with good-speed Wi-Fi, properly furnished rooms with no smelly gallery, separate balconies, and many more. Medical facilities and other curricular activities are also available on campus in different places with different rules.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Aerospace Engineering (Avionics) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: UPES Review- an aerospace engineer.

review_content.Placements: The top recruitment companies are Tata Technology and L&T. The roles include many opportunities such as starting as an intern and then securing a position by performing well. The internship opportunities are for pre-final year students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are average. The infrastructure is quite great on the campus but the food offered is not that great. There are a lot of opportunities in terms of sports.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified and the course content is also relevant. The semester exams are moderate in terms of difficulty. The pass percentage is 35. The examinations are conducted in 2 sections, one is the mid semester and the other one is the end semester.

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the course but not with the college.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed is 100%. The highest package is 25 LPA and the lowest package ranges from 7-8 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Vedanta, McCain Engineering, etc. Top roles offered in my course are health safety officer for fire and safety officer. All students get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities like a library and Wi-Fi all over the campus. The library is available with all books regarding each course. The quality of the hostel is fine, and the food in the mess is also fine. The medical assistance is quite well.

review_summary.college_name: UPES School of Advanced Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Applied Petroleum Engineering (Intelligent Petroleum Systems) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely I am satisfied because of good culture, faculty, and good placement in 2025.

content.Placements: About 95 percent of students are placed in the year 2025, the highest package is about 35 LPA, the average is about 11 LPA, and the top recruiters for our branch are Cairn Oil & Gas, Vedanta Ltd, ONGC, Adani Gas, HP, Oil India Limited, GAIL, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good, we have a common library, the campus is divided into blocks in which classes are conducted, sports facilities are also good, the college hostel has a limited number of seats so I would prefer an off-campus hostel, but the food in the campus is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Applied Petroleum Engineering (Energy Systems and Storage) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: So basically, if you are willing to have good placements and be successful.

content.Placements: So basically, in my course, the strength of the students is not that much, which means the competition criteria is not very high, resulting in good placements. I'm currently in batch 1, and the total batches in my passing stream are 3. The eligibility criteria to sit for placements is 8+ CGPA, which every student should have for their own benefit. The highest package in my college is recorded as 50 LPA, which is recently offered in 2024, whereas the average top package is 17 LPA, which I think is good for a beginner.
content.Infrastructure: So TBH, I am not living in the campus hostel as the campus hostel serves non-veg food, and I have been a vegan from birth. So I avoid living inside the college campus. But I have seen some facilities and also heard more from my friends, like good infrastructure with good-speed Wi-Fi, properly furnished rooms with no smelly gallery, separate balconies, and many more. Medical facilities and other curricular activities are also available on campus in different places with different rules.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aerospace Engineering (Avionics) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: UPES Review- an aerospace engineer.

content.Placements: The top recruitment companies are Tata Technology and L&T. The roles include many opportunities such as starting as an intern and then securing a position by performing well. The internship opportunities are for pre-final year students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are average. The infrastructure is quite great on the campus but the food offered is not that great. There are a lot of opportunities in terms of sports.
content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified and the course content is also relevant. The semester exams are moderate in terms of difficulty. The pass percentage is 35. The examinations are conducted in 2 sections, one is the mid semester and the other one is the end semester.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Fire and Safety Engineering (ECG and Sustainability) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the course but not with the college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed is 100%. The highest package is 25 LPA and the lowest package ranges from 7-8 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Vedanta, McCain Engineering, etc. Top roles offered in my course are health safety officer for fire and safety officer. All students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities like a library and Wi-Fi all over the campus. The library is available with all books regarding each course. The quality of the hostel is fine, and the food in the mess is also fine. The medical assistance is quite well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering (Advanced Manufacturing) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Life at UPES amidst the mountains.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed. The highest package for core branches like mechanical and petroleum is around 50 LPA. The minimum package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Tata, Mahindra, Reliance, and Airbus. Students at my college have to complete 3 internships at the end of every year. First, we have a social internship in NGOs for volunteer work. After the second year, we have to work as an intern at a startup. Lastly, the major internships are provided by college in companies like Tata and government agencies. Students can take internships on their own too.

admission_overview.college_name: UPES School of Advanced Engineering Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility, Application

admission_process.title: UPES School of Advanced Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: UPES School of Advanced Engineering admission 2025is open for various courses. Interested students can visit the official website to apply for the respective course. Presently, the School offers UG, PG and PhD programmes in several specialisations of Engineering, such as Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Information Technology and more. The selection criteria atUPES School of Advance Engineering Collegeis entrance-based. These courses are offered in seven different Engineering departments. Some are the Department of Aerospace Engineering, Department of Applied Sciences, Department of Chemical Engineering, and Department of Mechanical Engineering, among others.

Candidates interested in getting into UPES School Of Advanced Engineering are required to follow the entrance exam and UPES School Of Advanced Engineering application process. Students can check course-wise eligibility and selection criteria atUPES School of Advanced Engineering course admission2025:
UPES School Of Advanced Engineering admissions begin with the registration process. Check below the step-by-step admission process:

Step 1: UPES School of Advanced Engineering Application Process 2025:The application process for UPES School of Advanced Engineering for the year 2025 is online for all courses. Eligible candidates need to fill out the form, pay the application fee of INR 1,750, and upload the required documents to register for a course. Students can also check the detailedUPES School Of Advanced Engineering feestructure here.

Step 2: Selection Rounds:After registration, applicants are shortlisted for the course they have applied for. UPES will communicate further admission process details based on selection criteria. Candidates will receive an SMS on their registered number for the entrance exam or personal interview. They will be required to register on a preferred date and time slot.

Step 3: Admission Confirmation:After selection, a provisional offer letter will be sent to the candidates. They will need to pay the acceptance fee before the offer expiry date to reserve or block their seat.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at UPES School of Advanced Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, UPES School of Advanced Engineering admission 2025 is open. Interested students can visit the official website to apply for the respective course. Presently, the School offers UG, PG and PhD programmes in several specialisations of Engineering, such as Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Information Technology and more.

faqs.question: Which are the popular programmes offered by UPES School of Advanced Engineering?
faqs.answer: UPES School of Advanced Engineering popular programmes areBTechandBSc. BTech is provided in four specialisations. BTech Sustainability students can look for career opportunities such as firefighting, disaster management, industrial safety, safety consultancy, risk assessment, and health and safety management. BTech and BSc has a well-structured curriculum that includes various courses.

faqs.question: Can I get UPES School of Engineering for BTech admission through JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who have JEE Main score is eligible for BTech course admission at UPES School of Engineering. The admission is entrance-based. UPES School of Advance Engineering offers a full-time BE/BTech programme that lasts four years. To be admitted to this course, eligible candidates must have a valid score in the JEE Main exam.

faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

paragraphs: The placements are ongoing for the Class of 2025. As of now, the highest package offered during UPES School of Advanced Engineering placements 2025 stood at INR 25 LPA . Further, the average package (top 10%) offered during UPES School of Advanced Engineering placements 2025 stood at INR 16.3 LPA.

Earlier, the highest package offered during UPES School of Advanced Engineering BTech placements 2024 stood at INR 33 LPA . Further, the average package (top 10%) offered during UPES School of Advanced Engineering BTech placements 2024 stood at INR 19 LPA. The top recruiters of UPES School of Engineering include Panasonic, Adani Group, Asian Paints, Schlumberger, ONGC, Hyundai, Adobe, Deloitte L&T, EY, KPMG, PwC , etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: UPES School of Advanced Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies has separate hostel for boys and girls at Bidholi and Kandoli campuses. All the hostels have wi fi facility for learning.Common room has been provided in each hostel for relaxation and 24*7 power back up and solar power water heaters facility is available.The hostels have mess facility.Air conditioned hostels are also available. UPES has also tied up with private hostels for girls students in the city to offer appropriate accommodation outside the campus. All accommodation are on triple sharing basis.

library.description: UPES’s library has a seating capacity of more than 400 students and contains over 95176 books 76 magazines & journals in the field management. It also comprises of 16 electronic database and 6091 e journals. UPES has also acquired institutional memberships of the British Council Library, the American Centre Library, the AIMA Library, the Central Secretariat library and DELNET, IIP, WIHG Dehradun. The library offers traditional services such as reference service, referral service, user guidance service, cataloguing and classification service, circulation service including inter library loan and document delivery service, weekly display of recent additions of periodicals and books, bibliographic service, photocopying service.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am satisfied because of good culture, faculty, and good placement in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good, we have a common library, the campus is divided into blocks in which classes are conducted, sports facilities are also good, the college hostel has a limited number of seats so I would prefer an off-campus hostel, but the food in the campus is good.

But I have seen some facilities and also heard more from my friends, like good infrastructure with good-speed Wi-Fi, properly furnished rooms with no smelly gallery, separate balconies, and many more. reviews.review_heading: UPES Review- an aerospace engineer.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are average. The infrastructure is quite great on the campus but the food offered is not that great. There are a lot of opportunities in terms of sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the course but not with the college.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like a library and Wi-Fi all over the campus. The library is available with all books regarding each course. The quality of the hostel is fine, and the food in the mess is also fine. The medical assistance is quite well.

reviews.review_heading: Life at UPES amidst the mountains.
reviews.review_text: I live outside the hostel. But the facility and infrastructure of college are worth the fee, especially labs. Even the library is very well built. We have doctors available in the college for any medical aid. Regular sports events are held on both campuses of UPES.

reviews.review_heading: The university is really well established and study is all good.
reviews.review_text: The university is well-established. The other facilities are also fine. Although the fees are pretty high, the university tries to provide all facilities in every aspect. Hostels are available for both boys and girls. Hostel prices start from 160,000 lacs per year. Hostels are also very good and provide all types of facilities such as a mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, Wi-Fi, etc.

reviews.review_heading: UPES: EXPLORE THE PLACE FOR OPPORTUNITIES.
reviews.review_text: It has a range of facilities and infrastructure designed to support academic as well as practical learning. UPES has specialized laboratory facilities for drilling, production, and reservoir engineering. Classrooms are well-lit with punching machines for attendance, but both campuses face difficulties in the case of a weak Wi-Fi signal around the campus. Libraries are equipped with proper sitting facilities and all sorts of fiction and nonfiction books.

reviews.review_heading: Very good campus life and facilities .
reviews.review_text: The civil engineering program at the UPES is designed to provide a comprehensive education blending theoretical knowledge with practical skills. The course structure covers civil engineering. Subjects like geotechnical engineering and transportation engineering are available. Labs are also well equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great in comparison to other universities. It has Wi-Fi within the whole campus and the availability of decent classrooms. The lab facilities are very good especially in aerodynamics labs. The hostel is good in terms of security and sports facilities but food could be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University of Petroleum and Energy studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is huge having a big library and sports grounds along with different labs for the students to get a hands on experience in practical knowledge. Not only this, we have a separate place where we can sit and chill with our friends.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the services provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure provided by the University of Petroleum and Energy Studies Dehradun are absolutely amazing. The rooms of the hostel are also up to the mark. The food provided in the hostel mess is excellent. There are 24/7 medical services available.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome private university.
reviews.review_text: UPES has top-notch infrastructure. Labs are having state-of-the-art technology and machinery. The classrooms are comfortable. It is suitable for teaching and learning. The multi-floored library is air-conditioned, and there is an air-conditioned multi-activity center with a gym.

reviews.review_heading: University of Tomorrow: UPES.
reviews.review_text: We have a nice multi-activity center that includes the gym and a large auditorium that can host 500 students at once. It is fully air-conditioned and also has a badminton court. Students have ample space to sit and hang out with friends. Classes are very well equipped with projectors and smart boards. Top-notch furniture, and our college has the best labs, which include all the essential equipment.

reviews.review_heading: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies are pioneers of future proof education.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are being renovated and are completely futuristic with a complete focus on technology. They are equipped with the latest projectors, digital screens, and high-quality furniture designed solely for our comfort, which actually makes lectures more interesting.

reviews.review_heading: UPES- college of your dreams?
reviews.review_text: The University has a great infrastructure and the campus is spread across 44 acres which consist of all the necessary facilities such as big classrooms, labs and the library with thousands of books related to all the courses. I am a day scholar and I never get bored at the college.

college_info.college_name: UPES School of Advanced Engineering Scholarship Details

paragraphs: UPES School of Advanced Engineering offers meritorious students a number of scholarships on the tuition fees to support their education. Students who wish to enroll in any course at UPES Dehradun Advanced Engineering School will have to score a good percentage as a part of the selection process. Apart from this, students should also meet other criteria that the University has chosen to avail the scholarship.

UPES School of Advanced Engineering will provide a concession in fees based on scores scored by students in the entrance exam such as JEE Main, JEE Advanced, CUET, CBSE (+2), and exams from other central/ State boards of India.
The university offers a wide range of scholarships to all students of the University. Some of the UPES Dehradun scholarship categories and their criteria are listed below:
1. Entry Level Scholarship
Category
Scholarship
Class 12 Marks (Overall)
JEE/ CUET
CUET
Girls Students
Category
Scholarship
Class 12 Marks (Overall)
JEE/ CUET
CUET
Boys Students
For Example: If a student scores 80.7% or 80.9% in class 12, his/her percentage will be rounded off to 80%, and will get a scholarship on tuition fees for 1st year only.
2. Scholarship for MBA students
Category
Criteria - Graduation overall marks
Waiver (in tuition fees)
Applicable for
All students
Minimum CGPA 7.5 or
Percentage – 75%
1st year only
Note:
3. Free Ships Scholarship

The UPES’ Free Ships Scholarships are built to uplift prospective students from low-income families without added clauses or strings attached. A total of 51 seats are allotted with an upper age limit of 20 years for UG programs and 25 years for PG programs - and is provided on both, the tuition fee and hostel fee.
Image source: official website
4. Sports Scholarships

The University allotted 50 seats for sportspeople who excel in a range of sports from cricket, football, and athletics to shooting, chess, and table tennis; as it aims to make sports an inclusive part of the academic curriculum. The scholarship percentile under this impressive initiative ranges from 35% to 100% depending on the number of national & international sports achievements a candidate has.
Image source: official website
5. Academic Scholarship

This scholarship is applicable for both UG and PG students and for the second year onwards. The scholarship will be awarded to 10% of the total students enrolled in each of the programmes or 1 student whichever is higher. The 10% will be rounded off to the nearest next number. Here are the criteria:
Order of Merit
Amount of Scholarship
1st
20% of the tuition fees
2nd
15% of the tuition fees
The rest of the eligible students
10% of the tuition fees
UPES also provides fellowships for MTech and MDes programs, and financial support under their ‘We Care’ initiative in case a student loses any of the earning parents.
To check complete details on all UPES Dehradun Scholarships: Download PDF

college_info.intro:
Candidates willing to get admission to various courses must apply online on the official website of IIIT Ranchi. At the UG level, the college offers BTech courses to students. BTech is provided in four specialisations and is a flagship programme of the Indian Institute of Information Technology Ranchi. At the PG level, the college offers Executive MTech and MTech courses to students. The college also offers PhD programmes to students. PhD is offered in two specialisations with a total seat intake of 20.
The total seat intake for BTech courses is 270. BTech and MTech are the popular programmes of IIIT Ranchi as these course students are placed in top companies. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by IIIT Ranchi and their respective eligibility and IIIT Ranchi fees:

Active but run mostly by students
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, IIIT Ranchi has released its placement report for 2023. As per the report available on the official website, the highest package and average package offered to students during placements for 2023 stood at INR 83.38 LPA and INR 16.7 LPA, respectively. Further, the median package offered to students during IIIT Ranchi placements for 2023 was INR 13.32 LPA. The top recruiters that visit IIIT Ranchi are Google, Amazon, MPL, Adobe, and others. faqs.answer: A:    The fee for the BTech course in IIIT Ranchi is INR 8.8 lakh, for four years. There are a total of four specialisations in BTech. faqs.answer: A:    IIIT Ranchi specially offers BTech as it sflagship courses. Candidates must score at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class 12 and apply through JoSAA. Then they have to appear for JEE Mains exam and apply through JoSAA. Candidates can visit the official website of the college to fill up the application form and register for JoSAA. The Cut-Off list is already out candiates can check their cut-offs for their respective programmes.
faqs.question: What is the entrance exam for IIIT Ranchi?

faqs.answer: A:     IIIT Ranchi JEE Main cutoff 2025 for CSE was released for various categories belonging to the All India quota. For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 31909 to 57250. On the other hand, for the OBC AI quota, the first-round closing cutoff was 12777, and the last-round closing cutoff was 69667. Students can click here to know more about other categories.
faqs.question: What is IIIT Ranchi JEE Main cutoff for CSE?

faqs.answer: A:    The minimum percentile required for candidate's to score at least 75% aggregate (65% aggregate for SC/ST/PwD) in their twelve years of school education. Canididates have to participate in the JEE Main exam and go through the JoSAA counselling for admission to IIIT Ranchi. review_summary.college_name: IIIT Ranchi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It has good academics, average facilities, and fair placements for the fee.

content.Placements: This year, out of 58 eligible students from my branch (ECE), 47 students got placed, and if we calculate the selection percentage, then it is 81 percent, which is good but not elite. In ECE, the average package offered is 17 LPA this year. The highest package offered is more than 47 LPA this year, which is quite good. The package that we get also depends on our abilities. The lowest package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies that visit the campus are Google, Nvidia, Adobe, Amazon, Microsoft, and Infoedge. 30-45 percent of students got internships in the 2nd and 3rd year. Top roles offered are SDE intern and SDE.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not so satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Seventy-three offers are made during the placement drive. Approximately 75% of qualified students are placed. The average package is 12.14 LPA, the lowest package is 9.56 LPA, and the most costly bundle is 28 LPA. Amazon, Microsoft, Atlassian, and others are among the leading employers for our course.
content.Infrastructure: There will be a problem because there isn't a permanent campus, but the hostels we currently have are excellent flat-based lodgings. Although the hostels are fine, the classrooms are not; there are only 60 to 70 pupils in each class, which isn't very spectacular in my opinion. Additionally, there is a good library where we can get books for our hostels, Wi-Fi is available, and the labs are good. The food is mediocre at best, and the sports facilities are subpar.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good faculty members are available here.

content.Placements: Few students have been placed at our institute thus far; of the nearly 240 students enrolled in both CSE and ECE, only 20-30 were placed in the first round, with the highest package being 24 LPA. Numerous students are participating in internships, and their prospects of receiving a PPO (per placement offer) are excellent. Because of this, there are also extremely few pupils placed.
content.Infrastructure: The National Gaming Housing Complex in Khelgaon is home to hostelers. The mess's food tastes good. Additionally, the college frequently hosts a number of sporting events. Food available in the mess is good, but it can't beat your home food. Medical facilities are also provided in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: Our college placement is excellent. Because of the recession, placement was worse in 2024 than it was in 2023. The typical package in 2024 costs between 12 and 13 lacs, while the most costly one costs 25 lacs. Additionally, the placement rate wasn't very high.
content.Infrastructure: While the new site is being built, the institute is currently functioning out of the temporary campus (as of February 2025). The tentatively scheduled permanent campus will open for business in January 2026. The makeshift campus is excellent. The airflow in classrooms is adequate. On campus and in the hostel, Wi-Fi is accessible. It's a nice library. It contains all of the necessary books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This college is good in terms of placement and hostel only.

content.Placements: 80-85% of students are placed from the passing-out batch. The highest package is up to 40 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA, and the average placement package is 12 LPA. This year, top companies are Nvidia, IBM, TCS, Infosys, Amazon, etc. In the 2nd and 3rd year, 30-45% of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are decent. If I talk about the hostel, it runs at two places in Khelgaon and in BSNL campus. In the room, you will get 1 table, 1 chair, and one bed, no almira. Wi-Fi is available in both hostels. Food quality is good; different foods in good quality are served according to the menu. mMdical facility, sports ground, etc., are available.

admission_process.title: IIIT Ranchi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IIIT Ranchi admission 2025 is open for both MTech and PhD programmes.JEE Main and GATE are the entrance exams required for BTech and MTech respectively. Along with UG and PG courses, IIIT Ranchi also offersPhDin various specialisations. Selection for the PhD and MTech is made based on GATE scores, followed by a Personal Interview conducted by the institute. However,non-GATE candidatesare selected based on a written examination and/or interview conducted by the respective departments.IIIT Ranchihas been ranked between1201-1500 by World University Ranking 2025.Interested students can read the following article to know learn all about IIIT Ranchi's admission
IIIT Ranchi accepts admissions to its courses based on the valid score obtained in the entrance exams. Candidates seeking admission can find below the key highlights forIIIT Ranchi admissions 2025:
Particulars
IIIT Ranchi Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of Study
Regular/Full-Time
Programmes Offered
3 courses across multiple specialisations
How to apply?
https://iiitranchi.ac.in/

PG| UG| Doctoral
Popular programmes
BTech| MTech

IIIT Ranchi MBA Admission Brochure

IIIT Ranchi eligibility and selection processis based on the candidate's performance in theJEE MainandGATEexams respectively. Therefore, candidates must qualify for the exams along with fulfilling the eligibility criteria per the JEE Main and GATE registration guidelines. Aside from clearing the basis eligibility specified by the institute, students must also clear the selection rounds. Find below theeligibilityand selection criteria forIIIT Ranchi courses:
Course Name
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 or its equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 75% in (Physics, Chemistry,Mathematics/ Biology) from a recognised board
JEE Main+JoSAA Counselling

BE/ BTech (Hons) in CSE/ IT/ ECE/ Telecommunication / Electronics and Instrumentation with 60% aggregate/ CGPA of 6 for UR/ EWS /OBC candidates and 55% aggregate/ CGPA of 5.5 for SC/ ST/ PC candidates from a recognised institute/ university
Master's degree in relevant discipline from a recognised institute/ university

IIIT Ranchi fee structureincludes multiple components, such as tuition fees, library fees, laboratory fees, and more. Some of these components are charged only once at the time of admission, while the remaining are to be paid as per the institute's guidelines. The payment procedure is entirely online. Candidates have to pay the fees at the time of final admission to confirm the seat. Students can refer to the table below to know more aboutIIIT Ranchi feesandIIIT Ranchi average packagefor the offered courses:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee is taken from an official source. Hence, is subject to change.
Download:IIIT Ranchi Fee Structure
IIIT Ranchi offers a limited number of seats for its offered programme. The majority numbers of seats are occupied by the BTech programme. Find below theIIIT Ranchi seat intakefor 2025:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative.

For IIIT Ranchi candidates have to go through each of the stages of the admission procedure. TheJEE Advanced 2025official website has launched with the new eligibility criteria. As per the official website, candidates can now attempt theJEE Advanced 2025 exama maximum of three times in three consecutive years. IIIT Ranchi admission is a multi-step process that is entirely online. More details about each of the stages in theIIIT Ranchi admission processare explained below:
Step 1: Qualify for JEE Main and GATE
Candidates must appear for the JEE Main 2025 exam and GATE 2025 to secure a valid score. JEE Main exams are conducted in two phases starting from January to March. GATE conducts the exam in January.
Step 2: Apply for JoSAA counseling

Candidates with a valid JEE Main score are eligible to apply throughJoSAA. Candidates must visit the official website of JoSAA and register themselves. They must select IIIT Ranchi as their preferred institute.
Step 3: Seat Allocation
JoSAA will allocate seats online according to the valid score obtained by the candidates in JEE Main. Hence, meetingIIIT Ranchi cutoffis essential.
Step 4: Seat Finalisation and Admission Confirmation

Once the seats are confirmed at IIIT Ranchi, the candidate must visit the nearest Reporting Centre within the deadline. In case the seat is not confirmed, wait for further seat allotment rounds (if any). After this, report to IIIT Ranchi for seat confirmation and admission. The verification of the documents would be done at the time of counselling/admission, where candidates must pay the tuition fee to confirmIIIT Ranchi admission.

placement_report.college_name: IIIT Ranchi Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: IIIT Ranchi Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The overall placement percentage recorded during IIIT Ranchi placement 2025 was 84.72%. A total of 203 students participated and 172 students were placed in 2025. The highest, average and median package received during the placement drive 2025 was INR 54 LPA , INR 12.36 LPA and INR 10 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, IIIT Ranchi has released its placement report 2024. The highest and average package offered in 2024 was INR 28 LPA and INR 12.14 LPA. The top recruiters of IIIT Ranchi in placements 2024 included Google, MPL, Amazon, Adobe , Deloitte, BNY Mellon, etc.

tables.context: Is it worth doing BTech from IIIT Ranchi?

faqs.question: Is it worth doing BTech from IIIT Ranchi?
faqs.answer: IIIT Ranchi is a great choice for pursuing BTech course. The institute offer good placements annually for its BTech courses. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during IIIT Ranchi placements in 2024 stood at INR 28 LPA and INR 12.14 LPA, respectively. faqs.question: Is IIIT Ranchi good for placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, IIIT Ranchi has released its placement report for 2023. As per the report available on the official website, the highest package and average package offered to students during placements for 2023 stood at I NR 83.38 LPA and INR 16.7 LPA, respectively. Further, the median package offered to students during IIIT Ranchi placements for 2023 was INR 13.32 LPA. The top recruiters that visit IIIT Ranchi are Google, Amazon, MPL, Adobe, and others. Hence, the placements are good in this college.

Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Ranchi JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:
Important: Top IIITs Cutoff for JEE Main: Past Years Cutoff Ranks and Trends

In this section, candidates can view the last 9 years of IIIT Ranchi JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Ranchi JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Ranchi CSE cutoff 2025 was 45001 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 74575, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Ranchi B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 45001 and 75726 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 45001 and 57250, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science and Artificial Intelligence) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Ranchi. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Ranchi to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. hostel_campus.college_name: IIIT Ranchi Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It has good academics, average facilities, and fair placements for the fee.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available there, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library, but on a temporary basis, as we don't have a permanent campus. The quality of the hostel is very nice as well. The mess is decent. The morning food is good. We have to go there regularly by bus as our hostel is 6 KM away from the college. We don't have our own campus. Our regular classes are conducted in the BSNL building, which is taken over by the college management.

reviews.review_heading: Not so satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: There will be a problem because there isn't a permanent campus, but the hostels we currently have are excellent flat-based lodgings. Although the hostels are fine, the classrooms are not; there are only 60 to 70 pupils in each class, which isn't very spectacular in my opinion. Additionally, there is a good library where we can get books for our hostels, Wi-Fi is available, and the labs are good. The food is mediocre at best, and the sports facilities are subpar.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty members are available here.
reviews.review_text: The National Gaming Housing Complex in Khelgaon is home to hostelers. The mess's food tastes good. Additionally, the college frequently hosts a number of sporting events. Food available in the mess is good, but it can't beat your home food. Medical facilities are also provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: While the new site is being built, the institute is currently functioning out of the temporary campus (as of February 2025). The tentatively scheduled permanent campus will open for business in January 2026. The makeshift campus is excellent. The airflow in classrooms is adequate. On campus and in the hostel, Wi-Fi is accessible. It's a nice library. It contains all of the necessary books.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good in terms of placement and hostel only.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are decent. If I talk about the hostel, it runs at two places in Khelgaon and in BSNL campus. In the room, you will get 1 table, 1 chair, and one bed, no almira. Wi-Fi is available in both hostels. Food quality is good; different foods in good quality are served according to the menu. mMdical facility, sports ground, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements are available .
reviews.review_text: Hostels are located at the National Gaming Housing Complex (Khelgaon). The food from the mess is tasty. The college also organizes many sports events regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements are available.
reviews.review_text: At the moment, the institution runs out of its makeshift campus at BSNL's Advanced Regional Telecom Training Centre (ARTTC). The hostels are situated at the National Gaming Housing Complex (Khelgaon). In every way, including research and development, faculty is helpful and supportive. The mess food is tasty.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the fastest-growing IT and the placements will be so good in the future.
reviews.review_text: Our academic building is very good and the hostels are very good, the mess food is average, very less sports facilities. The doctor is available every day. There is a problem with Wi-Fi you have to apply for Wi-Fi for every semester which will also take some time to go through. So you have to manage for some time.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: The institute is currently operating from the temporary campus (as of February 2025), and the permanent campus is in progress. The permanent campus will start working from January 2026 (tentatively). The temporary campus is good. Classrooms are well-ventilated. Wi-Fi is available both in the hostel and the campus. The library is good. It has all books, which are required for the course. It also has many other books.

reviews.review_heading: Great coding culture with supportive peers, but limited events and no permanent campus.
reviews.review_text: Due to the absence of its campus, the college infrastructure is currently average, with basic facilities such as a library, smart classrooms, and well-equipped labs. The college is currently operating from the ATTC BSNL campus, but a new campus is expected to be constructed by January 2026, where you will have access to much better infrastructure, which cannot be expected right now. Hostels are excellent, as 4 BHK flats are provided, each with 2 washrooms and a kitchen. You can use an induction,...

reviews.review_heading: If we work hard, we will be given a lot of job opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Within college buildings, we have free Wi-Fi for students and teachers. Classrooms have whiteboards and a projector for teaching purposes. Labs are well-equipped with computer programs for coding pre-downloaded. The library has adequate books for our courses and for supplements to boost our knowledge but lacks proper seating arrangements. Rooms provided are a part of a housing complex. The food is decent, as much as we would expect from a hostel, and not great in taste, just below average. There...

reviews.review_heading: Indian institute of information technology Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: The college currently operates from its temporary campus located at ARTTC (Advanced Regional Telecom Training Centre), BSNL. The hostels are located at the National Gaming Housing Complex (Khelgaon). The faculty is supportive and helps with all aspects, including research and development. The food in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college .
reviews.review_text: There is a large library at our university in a peaceful location. Although the labs are well-equipped with contemporary equipment and the hostel facilities are first-rate, I regret to notify you that Wi-Fi is not available. The food served in the hostel is equally delicious and healthier than what you would have at home.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is so good.
reviews.review_text: Our university has a sizable library in a tranquil setting. I regret to inform you that although the hostel facilities are excellent and the labs are well-equipped with modern equipment, there is no Wi-Fi. The cuisine at the hostel is healthier and just as nice as what you would have at home.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are quite good .
reviews.review_text: Although our college's dorms are nice, our mess is not. We have a mess that is not kept clean, and dogs lick the plates. Food is also not served promptly. Our food tastes awful, especially the paneer. The worst-tasting food is paneer. However, there are good labs at our college.

data.description: IIIT Ranchi has experienced faculty members. IIIT Ranchi has Assistant Professors and professors who are PhD, diploma, and degree holders. Also, the IIIT Ranchi faculty are themselves BTech, and MTech degree holders and have worked at top institutes and organisations in the past. Hence, they have good academic backgrounds.

likes.text: Adobe, Tekion, Infoedge, Nvidia, IBM, TCS, Jio, Nykaa etc., are the top -recruiting companies in our college.
The colleges internship programme is well designed, providing excellent internship opportunities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Practical learning feel like school for first 4 semesters, but provide good knowledge for this tier.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average but acceptable for a college at this level. Around 65-70% of students get placed each year. Companies like WebOccult, Tatvasoft, Codefox, and some local startups regularly recruit students. Many students also get internships through the college or on their own. Roles offered include software development, web development, QA tester, and support engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Some labs are good, but due to the high student count and limited space, it often feels crowded. Though faculty manage it well. Classroom teaching is mostly traditional with whiteboards and markers, no projectors. There is no public Wi-Fi, and the library is average with basic resources. There is no hostel, but nearby PGs are easily available. The canteen is okay. I am not sure about medical support.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college, good environment.

review_content.Placements: Batch: 2023 to 2025 Course: Master of Computer Application at LJ University. Best performance in every subject from the teachers. The highest package 20 LPA in my college. Internship and job student skills depend on it. There are good placement opportunities in my college, making it the best choice for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, libraries, classrooms, and Wi-Fi are mostly available. It has the best department and course offerings. The quality of the college canteen, medical facilities, sports ground, and student environment was pleasant and engaging. So, it is good for students.

faqs.answer: L.J. Institute of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institute and offer quality education to the students. The below-mentioned are key points: * Placements: The college has a good record of placements, with around 90-95% of students getting placed every year. The average package is around INR4 LPA, while the highest package offered is around INR12 LPA.* Facilities: The college has good infrastructure, including air-conditioned classrooms, libraries, and laboratories. However, there is no Wi-Fi facility in the college.* Faculty: The faculty members are well-educated and knowledgeable in their fields. They are helpful and supportive, and provide regular feedback to students.* Exams: The college has a unique exam system, with four exams held per semester. The pass percentage is generally high, ranging from 80% to 85%.* Campus Life: The college has a good campus life, with various sports and cultural activities organized throughout the year. However, there is no hostel facility available in the college.* Placement Cell: The placement cell is active and works hard to secure good placements for students. Many companies, including TCS, Infosys, and Amazon, visit the college for recruitment purposes.* Scholarships: The college provides scholarships to meritorious students, with around 20% of students receiving scholarships.Overall, L.J. Institute of Engineering and Technology seems to be a good option for those looking for a Bachelor's programme in Engineering and Technology. While there may be some limitations, the college has a strong reputation for placing its graduates and providing a good academic experience.

Institute of Engineering and Technology (L.J.I.E.T) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Information Technology, Automobile Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Communications Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Structural Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering.

individual_reviews.title: Everything is good in the college. You get an internship in the 3rd year with a stipend.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get placed, provided they don't have any backlogs. The highest package is around 14 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. TCS and other companies come for placements. Around 70% of students get internships at the start of the 3rd year in areas near the college.
content.Infrastructure: High-speed internet is available throughout the department and campus. The central library is well-stocked with textbooks, reference books, journals, and digital resources. It also offers a quiet and comfortable environment for studying and research.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: LJ College is one of the best colleges for MBA.

content.Placements: Many students have been placed from this institute in very good companies. The percentage of students placed in this college is 75%. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Kotak, HFFC, ITC, and Narmada. 80% of students got their internships.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, and the MBA course is also good to pursue. I recommend the college. The canteen food is delicious. The labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained. The quality of facilities is top-notch. There is also a sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college for studies.

content.Placements: 90% of students after the filter who appear for the interview get placed. They are filtered as per the requirements pre-defined by the college, and then they can apply to the companies as per the company's requirements. The minimum package is 3.2 LPA, the maximum is 11 LPA, and the average is 4.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: No hostel facilities are provided by the college, but the infrastructure is good, with quick responses to problems faced by the students. The labs are good, with all the essential things required. Wi-fi is provided on every PC in the college by Ethernet with a maximum speed, resulting in no obstructions. In case of an electricity cutoff, generators are always ready to be instantly activated, with no disturbance for students.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good in the college. You get an internship in the 3rd year with a stipend.
reviews.review_text: High-speed internet is available throughout the department and campus. The central library is well-stocked with textbooks, reference books, journals, and digital resources. It also offers a quiet and comfortable environment for studying and research.

reviews.review_heading: LJ College is one of the best colleges for MBA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and the MBA course is also good to pursue. I recommend the college. The canteen food is delicious. The labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained. The quality of facilities is top-notch. There is also a sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Practical learning feel like school for first 4 semesters, but provide good knowledge for this tier.
reviews.review_text: Some labs are good, but due to the high student count and limited space, it often feels crowded. Though faculty manage it well. Classroom teaching is mostly traditional with whiteboards and markers, no projectors. There is no public Wi-Fi, and the library is average with basic resources. There is no hostel, but nearby PGs are easily available. The canteen is okay. I am not sure about medical support.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, good environment.
reviews.review_text: Labs, libraries, classrooms, and Wi-Fi are mostly available. It has the best department and course offerings. The quality of the college canteen, medical facilities, sports ground, and student environment was pleasant and engaging. So, it is good for students.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for studies.
reviews.review_text: No hostel facilities are provided by the college, but the infrastructure is good, with quick responses to problems faced by the students. The labs are good, with all the essential things required. Wi-fi is provided on every PC in the college by Ethernet with a maximum speed, resulting in no obstructions. In case of an electricity cutoff, generators are always ready to be instantly activated, with no disturbance for students.

reviews.review_heading: University with a difference. (Develop the skills).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in my college's computer engineering department is average compared to other departments, such as architecture and law, which have better facilities than the computer building. Additionally, there are no hostel facilities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My college life at LJIET. Internships are provided in semester 5.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi are provided in labs, and the classrooms are quite good. The library is also very good. The course curriculum is industry-based, so students can gain more knowledge about the IT industry. There is no hostel facility in the LJ campus. There are more PGs and hostels near the LJ College.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, skilled faculty members, and great learning environment for IT aspirants.
reviews.review_text: The department has good infrastructure, including Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, modern labs with updated systems, and a well-stocked library. The food is average, though a bit repetitive. The canteen offers a decent variety. Sports and events facilities like cricket ground, badminton court, and day celebrations are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and education are good for the study.
reviews.review_text: They do not provide a hostel by the institute. We should find the PG or the flat for the staying outside it. The nearly PG will cost Rs 7,000 to 8,000 per month. From far the college will cost the lesser price compared to the nearer area in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of faculty, exam pattern, and learning environment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is working at high speed, and it is good. Labs are also good, with only 30 students able to sit together in a class. The condition of the PCs is very good, and all parts of the PCs are working good. Classrooms are very large, and all of them are air-conditioned, which makes it cool while studying. However, we don't have hostel facilities available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college to students who want to pursue B.Tech in the IT field.
reviews.review_text: The credit distribution for each subject is quite good and impressive. College has great infrastructure (4/5). No Wi-Fi is available above the 3rd floor. Wi-Fi is available on only 1st, 2nd, and 3rd floors. Lab and classrooms are good and also clean. Limited number of students are allotted to a single division. Library is also there in our building. There is no hostel in our college. But there are few PGs which are associated with our college.

reviews.review_heading: A good culture and strict management.
reviews.review_text: We have a lab for learning computer programming and stuff, but the infrastructure is very poor here. The management is weak. The building is old. All other facilities like Wi-Fi in the computer lab are provided. There is a LAN cable. They don't have a hostel but have PG nearby.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for academic learning.
reviews.review_text: Classes are like school classrooms and just decent and only 30 students are allowed in one class. Labs are good. The library is rarely needed in this field. The internet is the biggest source of knowledge. Sports does lag behind in this field due to high academic pressure.

reviews.review_heading: LJ Institute review about engineering.
reviews.review_text: In our course, there are Wi-Fi facilities. Labs and library are very clean. Classrooms are very clean and comfortable. There is no hostel on our campus. College infrastructure is not bad but not good also the average. Mainly students want their classrooms and labs to be neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect way to choose a college.
reviews.review_text: Overall a good infrastructure and good college life. There is no Wi-Fi access for students. There is air conditioning in the classroom, and all the computer labs are there. There is no college hostel. But we can stay nearer PG or hostel to this college. Overall it is good.

faqs.answer: A:    Jabalpur Engineering College (JEC) has a decent placement record, with approximately 65% to 80% of students being placed every year. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jabalpur Engineering College offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, IT & Software and Science. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Jabalpur Engineering College offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, M.Sc. and MCA. Jabalpur Engineering College fee structure for all the courses is around INR 10,000 to 89,200.

faqs.answer: A:    Here are the tuition fees for some M.Tech programs at Jabalpur Engineering College (JEC Jabalpur): M.Tech in Machine Design: Total tuition fee of INR 89,200 M.E. in Environmental Engineering: Total tuition fee of INR 20,000 JEC Jabalpur also offers in-campus placements to M.E./M.Tech students with salaries ranging from INR 3.6 LPA.

A:    Jabalpur Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering from a recognised board.M.Sc.Candidate must have passed Bachelor of Science (B.Sc. 3YDC) with Physics as one of the major or main subject in all the examinations or equivalent examination by University approved by UGC, New Delhi/AIU, New Delhi in appropriate branch with at least mentioned marks or equivalent Grade in the aggregate. Candidates belonging to Reserve Categories of Madhya Pradesh will get relaxation in the qualifying marks as per the rules of the Government of Madhya Pradesh.
Admission to Applied Science Courses shall also be given to the Engineering Graduates having B.E. Degree with Grade C+ and Grade point 6.0 of this University or equivalent are also eligible to apply.
M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch of Engg./Technology with above mentioned percentage.
The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%.
Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or any Institutes of national importance (i.e. IITs/ IISc/NITs etc.) duly recognised by the MHRD, as equivalent thereto.

reviews_list.review_title: If you are from a poorer background, then this college would be your best choice.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 60-70% of students get placed in Jabalpur Engineering College. The lowest package is around 3 LPA, and the highest is about 12 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, and 20% of students get internship opportunities. Most roles are for Salem, and some are for teaching-related roles. The college is good if you are from a poorer background.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classes are decent. Don’t expect much from JEC. Classrooms are old and not well-furnished. No Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. The library is decent, and free Wi-Fi is available. The canteen is decent, but the hostel and mess are not in good condition. Only a few sports are available on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: This is all about my college, Jabalpur Engineering College, it is in Gokulpur near Ranjhi pincod.

review_content.Placements: I am in the Mechanical branch. 80% of students got placed. All companies visit the campus for recruitment. According to the college, students got good placements. Consultant roles, good MNCs, and associate engineer roles at Larsen & Toubro, Tata Consultancy Services, Lenskart, and many more are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel accommodation is the best. It's the cheapest of all I've thought about this hostel. The campus is about 400 acres. I think this is the cheapest because the yearly fee for a hostel is Rs. 1800 only, which is Rs. 150 per month. All rooms are good, and there are a total of 8 hostels.

reviews_list.review_title: Good learning environment, moderate placements, and scope for improvement.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70 percent of students are placed. Average package is 6 LPA the highest is around 12 LPA to 14 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS Infosys Wipro and Capgemini. About 50-60 percent secured internships in similar firms. Roles offered are mainly software engineer analyst and associate engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has decent facilities with Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and access to a good library. Hostel facilities are average, with basic amenities. Mess food is manageable though not great, while the canteen offered better options. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports infrastructure supports both indoor and outdoor games, encouraging student participation.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: Direct admission is possible at Jabalpur Engineering College. Direct admission to Jabalpur Engineering College is offered by management quota as per university norms. Candidates will be shortlisted on the basis of their performance in 12th.There are certain criteria that have to be filled up for doing engineering. The seats are filled on the basis of JEE merit list and vacant seats are filled on the basis of 12th marks. The counseling procedure for admission starts in July/August every year. A list of documents like address proof, till date education certificates and other relevant documents, has to be produced for verification.

overview_faqs.question: Does Jabalpur Engineering College refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: The refund rules for Jabalpur Engineering College are as follows:If a candidate cancels their admission within seven days after admission, the amount paid as an admission fee will be refunded after deducting 10% of one semester fee.Only Caution Money will be refunded to candidates who cancel their admission after this seven-day period.No tuition fee will be refunded after seven days of admission.All shortlisted candidates must reach the counselling venue in person at the prescribed date and time as per the counselling schedule.These are certain rules regarding the college refund program, keep it in mind for cancellation of admission in Jabalpur Engineering College.

review_summary.college_name: JEC Jabalpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Industrial Production Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: All you need to know about JEC.

content.Placements: I am an M.A. B.Tech student in the Industrial and Production branch at Jabalpur Engineering College. Every year, around 60–70% of students get placements. Packages offered range from 3–8 LPA, with an average of about 4–5 LPA. TCS, Wipro, and Infosys are the companies that hire the most. Internships are mostly self-arranged. Roles offered are mainly Junior/Trainee Engineer, and some go into software, depending on their interest.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very old for most departments. They have a WLAN network, but it is very slow and not very good. Labs have a large variety of machines, but most of them are not in working condition. Classrooms are of a very old style, as mentioned earlier. The library is very huge, and 90% of the books required for the syllabus are available. Hostels are allotted every year to around 200 students. The mess is not very good, and the food quality is also not satisfactory. Sports activities are very limited, only conducted in a few events like Aavahan.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college in central India, if your budget is tight and you want to study well.

content.Placements: Placement is very good in the year 2025. All the branches have good placement except civil. CSE has 80 percent placement, and mechanical has 70 percent, and mechatronic has 85% percent rate in civil. 13 students are placed, 8 get placed in KPIL, and 4 are in rooms.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is good at cheap price. It provides very good facilities for only 1300 rupees per year. Mess fee is Rs 2500 per month. Hostel is good, and especially girls hostel is very good. It provides very nice facility at a very cheap price that no one else provides.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you are from a poorer background, then this college would be your best choice.

content.Placements: Approximately 60-70% of students get placed in Jabalpur Engineering College. The lowest package is around 3 LPA, and the highest is about 12 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, and 20% of students get internship opportunities. Most roles are for Salem, and some are for teaching-related roles. The college is good if you are from a poorer background.
content.Infrastructure: Classes are decent. Don’t expect much from JEC. Classrooms are old and not well-furnished. No Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. The library is decent, and free Wi-Fi is available. The canteen is decent, but the hostel and mess are not in good condition. Only a few sports are available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is all about my college, Jabalpur Engineering College, it is in Gokulpur near Ranjhi pincod.

content.Placements: I am in the Mechanical branch. 80% of students got placed. All companies visit the campus for recruitment. According to the college, students got good placements. Consultant roles, good MNCs, and associate engineer roles at Larsen & Toubro, Tata Consultancy Services, Lenskart, and many more are available.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel accommodation is the best. It's the cheapest of all I've thought about this hostel. The campus is about 400 acres. I think this is the cheapest because the yearly fee for a hostel is Rs. 1800 only, which is Rs. 150 per month. All rooms are good, and there are a total of 8 hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good learning environment, moderate placements, and scope for improvement.

content.Placements: Around 60-70 percent of students are placed. Average package is 6 LPA the highest is around 12 LPA to 14 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS Infosys Wipro and Capgemini. About 50-60 percent secured internships in similar firms. Roles offered are mainly software engineer analyst and associate engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has decent facilities with Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and access to a good library. Hostel facilities are average, with basic amenities. Mess food is manageable though not great, while the canteen offered better options. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports infrastructure supports both indoor and outdoor games, encouraging student participation.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Jabalpur Engineering College for admission to B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Admissions to Jabalpur Engineering College (JEC) for undergraduate BE/B.Tech degree programs are based on entrance exams followed by a counseling process. Applicants must first take the JEE Mains exam and then participate in the DTE-MP counseling round for admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Jabalpur Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Direct admission is possible at Jabalpur Engineering College. Direct admission to Jabalpur Engineering College is offered by management quota as per university norms. Candidates will be shortlisted on the basis of their performance in 12th.There are certain criteria that have to be filled up for doing engineering. The seats are filled on the basis of JEE merit list and vacant seats are filled on the basis of 12th marks. The counseling procedure for admission starts in July/August every year. A list of documents like address proof, till date education certificates and other relevant documents, has to be produced for verification.

faqs.question: Does Jabalpur Engineering College refund fees?
faqs.answer: The refund rules for Jabalpur Engineering College are as follows:If a candidate cancels their admission within seven days after admission, the amount paid as an admission fee will be refunded after deducting 10% of one semester fee.Only Caution Money will be refunded to candidates who cancel their admission after this seven-day period.No tuition fee will be refunded after seven days of admission.All shortlisted candidates must reach the counselling venue in person at the prescribed date and time as per the counselling schedule.These are certain rules regarding the college refund program, keep it in mind for cancellation of admission in Jabalpur Engineering College.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

The department has computers and internet availability. The hostel facilities are decent for the price, which is Rs. 1,800. Sports and extracurricular activities are negligible in college.

reviews.review_heading: Campus placement is very good.
reviews.review_text: Students get all the facilities like a big classroom, Wi-Fi, labs, library, and many sports. Infrastructure of the college is awesome. Students can eat from the canteen or from the mess. Students also get hostel facilities from the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college in Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms are good and clean. Students get hostel facilities from the college. Students get many facilities like Wi-Fi, sports, labs, library, etc. The canteen facility is also provided by the college for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with any of the faculty provided at this college. Everyone has too much attitude.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very old. Every single building is built 60-70 years ago. Hostel is also old but for girls a new hostel building has been constructed recently. Food in mess is not very good. College canteen is not good. Sports facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the decision to choose this college.
reviews.review_text: My college offers very good facilities and infrastructure. Buildings are well-maintained but not much renovated in the past few years. Classes are good, but no Wi-Fi access. There are various departments and labs for students. College library is huge, offering a lot of books and spacious seating for students. Canteen food is also very good, and canteen is a decent size and affordable.

reviews.review_heading: A great college for engineers.
reviews.review_text: College has good facilities and infrastructure. Buildings are well-maintained. Classes are smart with Wi-Fi access. It has huge and spacious library and reading room for students to study peacefully. College has a decent size canteen with great food and is affordable. Sports are not much appreciated in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, and facilities provided to students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided at the college are good. The library has many books, and some new books are provided. The food provided in the mess is also tasty. Sports facilities are available, including a sports ground and various games. Many sports fests also happen at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Jabalpur Engineering College reality.
reviews.review_text: The college was established in 1947, so its infrastructure is from that era. It is a bit old, but the college maintains it well. Modern facilities have been added, too. The campus spans 255 acres; this area includes department buildings, sports facilities, hostels, a canteen, parking facilities, and other amenities. The college has a huge library with free Wi-Fi access. The quality of hostels is very good, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is decent.

reviews.review_heading: The college is really worth money.
reviews.review_text: Jabalpur Engineering College has very old infrastructure. Computer labs are below average, and many computers are not working. The library is good in a big hall and a silent room where we can study without any disturbance. We can also issue books for free by using our ID card for the whole semester. Hostels have good rooms, but there are common washrooms among three or four rooms. The food available in the mess is below average. The canteen is also below average. There are no such kind of medica...

reviews.review_text: There is a small canteen on campus. Limited sports facilities are available.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at GNDU include BSc (Hons), MSc, BTech & LLM, among others. After doing BSc, students can have a career in IT, Software Development etc. GNDU also has a Directorate of Open & Distance Learning (ODL) located at its main campus for distance & open programmes. By doing various courses from Guru Nanak Dev University, students can get job offers from top recruiters like Amazon, Accenture, Axis Bank etc.
In addition to this, Guru Nanak Dev University offers UG, PG, diploma, short-term, & certificate programmes across various fields eg Engineering, Science, Law, Arts & Humanities, Commerce & Accounting, Computers & IT, Management, Journalism, Architecture & Pharmacy, among others. Admission to all the courses offered at the university is based on a departmental-level entrance exam conducted by  the Head of the (respective) Department offering the programme. GNDU.
