review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: No placement, affordable.

content.Placements: No placement is provided by the college. 30% of students get jobs by themselves. There are no big companies. No internship is provided by the college. This college is not for placement. It is only for getting a degree. In Science, we only get knowledge of Science theoretically.
content.Infrastructure: It was average. There was Wi-Fi at the start only. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were good. The library was good. The hostel was good. The canteen was not hygienic at all. Medical facilities were there. Sports and games were available in college. NCC was present. Overall, it was good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good learning experience at GNDU with a supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Placements for the BCA course are okay and mostly depend on how much effort a student puts in. Around 40-50% of students get placed, and many find jobs on their own. The average salary is around 2-3 LPA. Internships are also available in small IT companies, and common roles are IT support, junior developer, and customer support.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms and labs are properly set up and comfortable for regular use. Wi-Fi and library facilities are available for students. Hostel rooms are clean and manageable, and the food in the mess is decent. Sports, medical, and other basic facilities are also available, making campus life smooth and comfortable.

individual_reviews.course: B.A - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I think this college can be improved with some changes.

content.Placements: I guess about 50% of students get placements around 1 LPA. I don’t know much about the exact figures. Around 60% of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The college does not provide hostels. Food quality is not up to the mark and can be improved. Medical facilities are good. For sports and games, the college is not as strong as some other colleges. There is room for improvement in the overall infrastructure.
content.Faculty: Teachers are qualified and very good. Their teaching is also good. Exams are kind of easy, and the pass percentage is around 55%. The college cannot fully make students industry-ready. Students have to gain practical experience themselves. Faculty can do better in this area.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent college campus.

content.Placements: 50 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package offered in our college is Lacs for the entire course and the lowest package offered is 1.2 LPA for the entire course. After completing, we can work in banks and various private sectors. 60 percent of students got internship from our course and are in Ram Financial Limited.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. There are Wi-Fi, smart boards, a library, and all other facilities available. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, with quality food and medical facilities available. We play indoor as well as outdoor games like cricket, volleyball, badminton, tennis, and carrom etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University College, Jalandhar, GNDU,

content.Placements: The placement cell was a huge add-on to my career path. They instantly initiated the process of the placement and related stuff when I entered my 2nd last semester of the curriculum. They provided us companies for internships and full-time placements and introduced us to companies that are dream companies for many. Many companies come on campus, including local companies of the state, Byjus, Wipro, TCS, Amazon, Datalog, etc. The company with the highest package offers 14 Lacs. If you sit in placement, a minimum of 7.5 CGPA is required, and there were different criteria for placement.

admission_process.title: GNDU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GNDU admissionto all courses is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university offers courses at UG, PG, and doctorate levels. Additionally, students can also pursue certificate courses at the university. Programmes offered atGNDUare in streams including –Engineering,Architecture& Planning,IT & Software,Hospitality & Travel, Teaching & Education, Science, and Law. The application process for the university is conducted online. Students seeking admission to the programmes offered at the university can read the following article to know the detailed process of theGNDU admission procedure.

Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) admissionto some courses is ongoing. The university offers an extensive range of courses across multiple specialisations through its constituent colleges. Students can enrol in Interested candidates need to visit the official website of the university to apply for the desired course. Guru Nanak Dev University course admissionis both entrance and merit-based depending on the programme selected by the students. Each aspirant must meet the course-specific eligibility requirements to be eligible for the course admission at the university. Candidates can pursue a wide range of programmes across multiple specialisations in a variety of fields at the university. The university accepts various national-level entrance tests. Furthermore, it also conducts its own entrance test for admission to some of the courses. Interested students can refer to the following table to learn about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularGNDU courses:

Guru Nanak Dev University feesvary for each course and specialisation. The university charges multiple components from the students such as admission fees, tuition fees, security deposits etc. GNDU students are required to pay the amount either semester-wise or annually, depending on the course selected. Interested candidates can check out the below table forGNDU course feesin the table below:
Check out completeGNDU Fee Structure
Note:The information mentioned above is taken from official sources. Hence, may vary.

Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar seatintakevaries for each course. Students are offered seats based on their performance in the selection rounds. Candidates must pay the admission fee to secure their seat at the university. Students can look at the table below to know course-wiseGNDU seat intakefor some of its popular programmes.
Note:The information mentioned above is taken from official sources. Hence, may vary.

As per the information available on the official website of the University,GNDU admissionto various courses is either based on merit or an entrance exam, depending on the course selected. Foradmission to the BTechcourse, aspirants have to appear forJEE Main entranceand admission to the MBA course candidates are required to appear for theGNDU Management Entrance Test (GMET). For all courses, admission is done based on the merit secured by the candidates in the entrance exam conducted by the Head of the Department. Candidates seeking admission to GNDU courses must begin their admission process by filling out the application form before the deadline. The step-wiseGNDU admission processis given in the table below:
Step 1: GNDU application process
Candidates can apply online for the preferred course. Candidates have to fill out the application form and pay the application fees before the deadline.
Step 2: GNDU Selection Process

Admission to most of theGNDU courses is entrance-based. Only for diploma-level courses, the admission criteria is merit-based. Applicants applying to BTech and MBA courses are required to appear forJEE Main and GMET,respectively, to get shortlisted for admission. Apart from BTech and MBA, the University shortlists candidates based on theentrance exam conducted by the Head of the Department.
Step 3: GNDU Merit list and Admission confirmation

After completing the selection process,GNDU releasesa course-wise merit list on its official website. All the candidates, whose name is on the merit list, are required to appear for the counselling/ interview process for seat allocation and document verification process.

courses_data.description: Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) MBAis offered with multiple specialisation options such asFinance,HRM,Marketing, etc. The University Business School and the University School of Financial Studies offer the MBA course.GNDUMBA admission is based on merit in theGuru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). Selected candidates are allotted seats through counselling. Candidates who have completed their graduation in any stream from a recognised University are eligible to apply for admission atGNDU MBA. More highlights related toGNDU MBAare mentioned below:

faqs.question: How can I take admission in GNDU to pursue MBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to GNDU MBA programmes need to take the Guru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). The university shortlist candidates based on exam score. The selected candidates have to participate in the counselling during which the final seat allotment is carried out. Moreover, to apply for the entrance exam, candidates can visit the official website of Guru Nanak Dev University.

faqs.question: How will I know if I have been shortlisted for GNDU GMET counselling?
faqs.answer: The University will release a merit list of candidates selected for the counselling round on its official website soon after the declaration of GNDU GMET result. The shortlisted candidates will have to appear at the university main campus for interview rounds along with the required documents. Candidates must report at the alloted date and time, failing which candidate's request for change in date and time will not be entertained.

faqs.question: When will GNDU GMET registrations commence?
faqs.answer: Guru Nanak Dev University conducts GMET for admission to Management courses offered at its Main and regional campuses. The university usually opens registration for GMET in May and closes by second week of July. The exam is usually conducted in July every year in online mode for 150 minutes.

courses_data.name: GNDU MBA/PGDM Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) MBAis offered with multiple specialisation options such asFinance,HRM,Marketing, etc. The University Business School and the University School of Financial Studies offer the MBA course.GNDUMBA admission is based on merit in theGuru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). Selected candidates are allotted seats through counselling. Candidates who have completed their graduation in any stream from a recognised University are eligible to apply for admission atGNDU MBA. More highlights related toGNDU MBAare mentioned below:

faqs.question: How can I take admission in GNDU to pursue MBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to GNDU MBA programmes need to take the Guru Nanak Dev University Management Entrance Test (GMET). The university shortlist candidates based on exam score. The selected candidates have to participate in the counselling during which the final seat allotment is carried out. Moreover, to apply for the entrance exam, candidates can visit the official website of Guru Nanak Dev University.

faqs.question: How will I know if I have been shortlisted for GNDU GMET counselling?
faqs.answer: The University will release a merit list of candidates selected for the counselling round on its official website soon after the declaration of GNDU GMET result. The shortlisted candidates will have to appear at the university main campus for interview rounds along with the required documents. Candidates must report at the alloted date and time, failing which candidate's request for change in date and time will not be entertained.

faqs.question: When will GNDU GMET registrations commence?
faqs.answer: Guru Nanak Dev University conducts GMET for admission to Management courses offered at its Main and regional campuses. The university usually opens registration for GMET in May and closes by second week of July. The exam is usually conducted in July every year in online mode for 150 minutes.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in GNDU without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, for some course, GNDU takes admission without entrance exam. The admission to those courses is allotted based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam.Admission to following GNDU courses is based on merit in the qualifying exam:UG CoursesPG coursesBTech (Urban &Regional Planning)MEdBachelor of Tourism & Travel Management .PG Diploma in Mental Health CounselingBAPG Diploma in TranslationBScMCom, MSc MathematicsBPTMBA, MCA, MSc (IT), MSc (Maths), MA (Eco), MA Punjabi, MCom

faqs.question: How much percentage required for GNDU?
faqs.answer: Minimum percentage for GNDU admission in some popular courses are:CoursesEligibilityBE/BTechClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC)MBA/PGDMClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC)UG DiplomaClass 12BScClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)BCAClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)BComClass 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC)

faqs.question: Which entrance test score is accepted by Guru Nanak Dev University for BCom?
faqs.answer: Yes, Guru Nanak Dev University's BCom admissions are entrance-based. Admission to all the courses offered at the university is based on a departmental-level entrance exam conducted by  the Head of the (respective) Department offering the programme. GNDU. To appear for this exam, candidates must fill out an application form on the official website of the university. Based on the performance in this exam, a merit list is prepared. The applicants who manage to get shortlisted are allotted seats, provided they present the require documents supporting their eligibillity.

placement_data.title: Guru Nanak Dev University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Guru Nanak Dev University has released the salary details for the batch passed out in 2025. The highest package secured by batch 2025 was INR 44 LPA , while the average package offered during GNDU placements 2025 was INR 6.37 LPA . The University has placed 84.89% students in reputed companies. The top recruiters of Guru Nanak Dev University in 2025 include Amazon, Accenture, Coca Cola, Capgemini, Dabur, IBM, etc.

Earlier, 652 students were placed during the 2024 placement session. The highest and average packages stood at INR 18.43 LPA and INR 6.40 LPA , respectively. KPMG, Accenture, Nucleus Software were among the few top recruiters of GNDU.

faqs.question: Is GNDU good for placement?
faqs.answer: A total of 79 companies offered job opportunities to the students passing out in 2024. The highest package stood at INR 18.43 LPA and the average package offered was INR 6.40 LPA. Check the complete insights of Guru Nanak Dev University placements 2024 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) No. of students placed 652 Highest package INR 18.43 LPA Average package INR 6.40 LPA No. of companies offered jobs 79

faqs.question: How is the placement of BTech at GNDU?
faqs.answer: The University has released the overall placement data on its official website. From 2022 to 2024, the number of students placed has declined year-on-year. On the other hand, a fluctuating trend was recorded in the number of companies that offered job opportunities. Refer to the table below for a detailed analysis of GNDU placement trends: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) No. of students placed 993 875 652 No. of companies offered jobs 88 61 79

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package at Guru Nanak Dev University?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered to the 2024 passing-out batch was INR 18.43 LPA. Earlier, the highest package offered in 2023 was INR 19.57 LPA. Looking at the past three years' statistics, declining trend was recorded in the Guru Nanak Dev University the highest package, which is depicted below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Placement Statistics (2024) the highest package INR 44 LPA INR 19.57 LPA INR 18.43 LPA

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing a BSc at Guru Nanak Dev University?
faqs.answer: Pursuing a BSc at Guru Nanak Dev University can lead to bright career opportunities in various sectors. The career prospects primarily depend on a variety of factors such as, chosen specialisation, preferred sector, skills of the graudates, etc. The university offers a BSc in various specialisations. BSc graduates of the university can build careers in the fields of education, IT, healthcare, research, etc. For better career prospects after a BSc , graduates can pursue higher education with courses like MS, MSc or MBA.

highlights.description: GNDU is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #12 by the India Today 2025 under the University (Government) category. It ranked #77 in the QS World Rankings 2026, internationally. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The GNDU rankings have been explained in the article below:

nirf.description:
GNDU is consistently recognized as one of the top institutes across all major categories by NIRF 2023. It has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2023, GNDU fell 7 ranks to #87 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2023, GNDU fell 4 ranks to #48 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. In the 'University' category, GNDU ranked in the top 50 in the country for the second consecutive year in 2023. Students can refer to the table below for the GNDU NIRF rankings:
Read less

qs_world.description:
GNDU has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, GNDU fell 43 ranks to #329 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, GNDU fell 9 ranks to #77 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Amritsar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
There are two messes and two canteens in the hostel and both are run on a contract basis. There are some indoor games facilities like table tennis, carom board, volleyball and two badminton courts are also available within the premises of the hostel for the students. The students have access to the internet through Wi-Fi in all the rooms. Girls hostel is well-equipped with facilities like the internet with wi-fi, medical room, utility shop, photo state, PCO-cum-stationary store, general store, reading hall, mess, canteen, etc. 
Local students from within a radius of 40 kilometres (25 kilometres in case of girls), evening students, employees and part-time students are not eligible for admission to the hostel.
facilities: Holds approximately 543,357 documents, including books, bound journals, theses, reports and manuscripts.
Subscribes to about 134 Indian journals, 52 foreign journals, and 24 newspapers, and has acquired over 15,600 e‑books.
Rare and manuscript collections include around 5,174 rare books and 1,511 manuscripts.

library.description:
The library remains open on all the days of the year except on two National Holidays i.e. 26th January and 15th August. It opens from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. on weekdays and 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. on weekends and other holidays. 
Bhai Gurdas Library is subscribing 87 Foreign and 146 Indian Journals. In addition to it, a library is also receiving about 150 journals as a gift. The library is a member of INFLIBNET which is providing access to 15,000+ e-journals and six databases. The library is also subscribing more than 200 journals through IEEE. It have 1,516 rare manuscripts relating to Punjab History, Culture, Sikh Religion and other faiths. There are 22 departmental libraries also for the convenience of the students and teachers.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Handball Court, Softball Court, Kho- Kho, Kabbadi, Hockey stadium, Archery, Velodrome

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Saroop Rani Government College For WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: No placement, affordable.
reviews.review_text: It was average. There was Wi-Fi at the start only. Laboratories were good. Classrooms were good. The library was good. The hostel was good. The canteen was not hygienic at all. Medical facilities were there. Sports and games were available in college. NCC was present. Overall, it was good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Guru Teg Bahadur College, SathialaReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good learning experience at GNDU with a supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms and labs are properly set up and comfortable for regular use. Wi-Fi and library facilities are available for students. Hostel rooms are clean and manageable, and the food in the mess is decent. Sports, medical, and other basic facilities are also available, making campus life smooth and comfortable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I think this college can be improved with some changes.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The college does not provide hostels. Food quality is not up to the mark and can be improved. Medical facilities are good. For sports and games, the college is not as strong as some other colleges. There is room for improvement in the overall infrastructure.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Lyallpur Khalsa CollegeReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent college campus.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are good. There are Wi-Fi, smart boards, a library, and all other facilities available. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, with quality food and medical facilities available. We play indoor as well as outdoor games like cricket, volleyball, badminton, tennis, and carrom etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Guru Nanak Dev University College, Jalandhar, GNDUReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University College, Jalandhar, GNDU,
reviews.review_text: It was a very good course to learn about programming languages; they were very focused on practicals so we could learn effectively. Every month, they hold special sessions so students can share their innovative ideas, giving the basic and advanced knowledge of C, C++, Java, JavaScript, MySQL, etc. In the first two semesters, basic knowledge of computers is given along with the main course. Hostel facilities were available at reasonable charges, and the room sizes were good. The food was hygienic...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Apeejay College of Fine ArtsReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: They conduct less interactive classes, which are so boring.
reviews.review_text: Only the exact number of students is admitted to all the courses to lessen the crowd and to improve the performance. Sports and other physical activities are scheduled only once a week. There are certain liberties in hostel premises and other things. We visit the library only during free periods and break hours.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Baring Union Christian CollegeReviewed on 27 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are well-qualified, but placement through this college seems next to impossible.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not bad. It is good enough to stay focused. Surroundings are also clean and tidy. There are no issues with the infrastructure because the classrooms are spacious. Moreover, the library also has a large volume of books in every niche.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Dev University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facility was available. The library was also present. Modern classroom and computer labs. Hostel quality was also good. All essential amenities were available in the college. Sports and games were encouraged by the University.

reviews.review_heading: MBA at GNDU: Fees, placement and faculty overview.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent for the course and hostel. Adequate lighting, ventilation and fans are available in classrooms and hostel rooms. The department also has Wi-Fi and projectors for students and teachers. There are ramps for wheelchairs as well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Amritsar Group of CollegesReviewed on 25 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Campus life, hostel life was good, but some of the teachers were so rude.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and structures are normal, not that good and not too bad. It's like okay. Wi-Fi is available at every point in the college. Labs are there, but not for agriculture students because they don't have permission to pursue this course now.

reviews.review_heading: University for Punjabis only.
reviews.review_text: Superb infrastructure for sports. I am cutting a star because of the hostel. Hostels are not well-maintained, but otherwise, the grounds and libraries are top class. They provide various facilities to students, such as a gym, pool, etc. Many canteens are not so good, and the mess is very poor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Golden Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good campus life with decent facilities and helpful staff.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average but good enough for daily classes. Labs had the basic equipment we needed, and Wi-Fi worked most of the time. Classrooms were clean and comfortable. The library was helpful, but it needed more updated books. Hostel rooms were okay, and the food was manageable. Sports and medical facilities were simple but useful when required.

reviews.review_heading: There are a lot of extra curricular activities like - shooting, swimming, etc.
reviews.review_text: Neat and clean hostel and good infrastructure. Hostel rooms are good and neat and clean. Washrooms are clean. There is also a lift in the hostel. Food in the mess is nice and can be eaten. There are many shops in the hostel where we get all our necessary things.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty, placements, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of our department is good, and many more departments, such as UBS, Agriculture, and the UIT department, have better infrastructure. Moreover, we have a health centre on our campus which includes great and experienced doctors and helpful staff.

reviews.review_heading: Good Engineering College .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course was extremely good. Wi-Fi was available in the college. Labs were well-equipped with instruments. Library was present in the campus. Hostel was also good it's has water cooler, decent washrooms.

data.description: Guru Nank Dev University has an experienced faculty who are PhD, diploma, and degree holders. GNDU also invites faculty for guest lectures and let students interact with renowned personalities. Most of the faculty members working at GNDU are doctorates.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Guru Nanak Dev University

likes.text: Many companies visited our university to hire students, and some of them are Nagarro, Software AG, TCS, Infogain, Chickmick, TT Consultants, etc.
The placements in this particular campus are good, and students get appropriate exposure and experience during their study to clear various interview rounds.

college_info.intro:
The Savitribai Phule University Pune flagship programmes are MBA, BSc, BTech etc. The Department of Management Sciences (PUMBA), Savitribai Phule Pune University is known as one of the first Management Institutes present in India. Considering the ROI of Savitribai Phule Pune University popular programmes, the placement recorded the highest MBA package of INR 16.22 LPA. in the past years. SPPU students are today working in top firms at top positions. Savitribai Phule Pune University students are trained with Managerial as well as presentation skills.
The UniPune has been ranked by QS & other world university rankings under catgeories like Asian University Rankings, etc. Overall, this Pune University is quite famous. The university has students from different cultures, resulting in students learning from each other. This makes students lifelong friends & in many cases making business contacts for the future. The following are the USPs of joining the popular programmes at SPPU:
Holistic and Value-based Education
For more details around SPPU Pune popular programmes, check out the table below:

At the UG level (undergraduate), there are Pune University courses like BA, BTech, BSc, etc. At the postgraduate (PG) level, there are programmes like MA, MTech, etc. The total seat intake for BTech in Computer Engineering is 240 and BTech in Mechanical Engineering is 150. There is also post doctoral fellowship available for students. The below are the Savitribai Phule Pune University Pune courses and their respective :

faqs.answer: A:    UniPune is not very difficult to get admission. Students should qualify the minimum eligibility criteria. Pune University offers admission basis merit and entrance wherein students must secure minimum marks in Class 12 or graduation, depending on the level of course opted. Students should also have valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as ATMA, OEE, GATE, UGC NET or SLET.
faqs.question: Is Pune University hard to get?

faqs.answer: UniPune admission to a majority of PG and UG courses is based on the Online Entrance Exam (OEE) conducted by the University. The university offers MCA, MMM, Advanced Diploma, MPH, E-MBA, LLM and M.Lib.I.Sc, among others. Admission to a few courses is completely based on merit in the previous qualifying exam. The university also accepts MAH CET, MAH MCA MET, CMAT/ CAT/ ATMA and other exams for admission to a number of courses offered at its campus or its affiliated colleges.
faqs.question: Q: Which entrance exam is accepted by UniPune?

faqs.answer: PUMBA is a popular college for its two-year E-MBA program. Admission criteria for this course is merit-based and candidates must have at least three years of work experience along with a valid score in the entrance exam conducted by Savitribai Phule Pune University. The programme is designed for seasoned professionals who want to enhance their managerial skills and knowledge. The Executive MBA programme at PUMBA offers six functional specializations, including Marketing, Human Resource (HR), Finance, Operations, Systems, and International Business. The programme uses scores of CMAT/CAT/ATMA/XAT/MH-CET for admission.
faqs.question: Q: Is Department of Management Sciences, Pune University (PUMBA) good for Executive MBA?

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to MA are required to have completed their relevant UG degree. For further selection, candidates have to appear for OEE conducted by UniPune for final selection. The majority of MA courses are available on the campus of UniPune while a few chunks of MA specialisations are also offered by various affiliated colleges and recognised institutes under UniPune. After appearing for the exam, students are required to wait for the merit lists released on the official website of the university. After the release of the merit list, students are required to fill in the admission form and upload the necessary documents in it. After all the documents are verified by the relevant department, an admission fee challan is generated and the fee must be paid followed by that before the last date.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into Pune University for MA?

faqs.answer: Pune University MSc admission is entrance based. The selection is done on the basis of OEE scores conducted by the University. Candidates need to possess a bachelor's degree from a recognised institute/ university in the relevant field to apply for UniPune MSc admission. Candidates seeking enrolment via Pune University OEE 2025 can apply online on the official website of Campus Common Entrance Platform. There is no requirement to submit the required documents or application form offline.

overview_faqs.answer: The total course fee for the B.Tech programme at Savitribai Phule Pune University ranges between INR 75,000 and INR 15 lakhs. Talking about the eligibility, candidates must pass HSC or its equivalent examination with compulsory subjects of Physics Chemistry and Mathematics along with Biotechnology/ Biology/ Computer Science/ IT/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Technical Vocational subject or a pass in Diploma in Engineering and Technology in order to be eligible for the BTech course.

overview_faqs.answer: The application fee has to be paid along with the submission of the application form. SPPU application fee for general category candidates is INR 600. The fee is INR 400 for SC/ ST/ OBC/ PwD/ Maharashtra state candidates. UniPune application fee for the General category with late fee is INR 750 and the same is INR 550 for reserved category candidates.

review_summary.college_name: Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: COEP Technological University review.

content.Placements: The majority of the students get placed, the average for the Computer Science and Engineering department is 17 LPA, and the highest is 50+, which is offered to 3-4 students only. The training and placement cell helps students and guides them to better placement opportunities. Top recruiters are De Shaw, Nvidia, Wells Fargo, etc. Around 150 students out of 220 students get internships in their 3-4th year.
content.Infrastructure: Some faculty members are quite helpful and knowledgeable, who help students for getting industry ready and gain good technical skills and soft skills. The boys' hostel is quite old, not so good, food quality is above average. Other facilities like sports, infra and all are good. COEP is the only college in Pune to have its own boat club, which is active.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: COEP is the regional underdog.

content.Placements: Offers are comparable to the top 10 NITs in CSE. The average package was 17 LPA, median was 15 LPA for 2025. This year, De Shaw hired someone at 60 LPA CTC. Other branches also have decent placement, but due to doubling the intake, the placement might be affected later. Some companies that visit are De Shaw, Nutanix, Texas Instruments, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but the number of students in the location is really low. Mess food is okay. The gym is crowded. Ground is good. Wi-Fi is provided in the entire campus, but sometimes it doesn't work. Located in the city center, so many fun activities around. The overall infrastructure is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is an easy-going engineering life.

content.Placements: A very low percentage of students have placed from Zeal in B.Tech ENTC. The highest package is about 15 LPA, and the median is about 2.8-3.14 LPA. Mainly, the best hiring companies that arrive in college are all about the mechanical and robotics branches, with a recruiting rate of up to 90% recruiting rate.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and facilities, labs are good, and overall, a good mid-level campus. Very good college, but the downside is that there are limited grounds and sports facilities. Courses are available, and indoor activities are very good. The college also appreciates indoor activities rather than outdoor activities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college in the Khed Taluka.

content.Placements: 66 percent of students participated in this course. The maximum start package in this course was 5 LPA. In the commerce field, companies hired students to recruit. Many companies took interns as freshers. HR, associate, and similar roles were given.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus was very big and versatile. All fields were available. Teachers were very strict and individually concentrated on all of us. Classrooms were neat and clean, and there were cameras. Hostel facility, canteen facilities, and stationery were available in the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives us 100% placements. Faculty members are kind and approachable.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students got placed in ISB&M College. The salary package offered ranges from 6-10 LPA. Recruiting companies like Black Orange, etc., hire students. 70 percent of students got internships from the BBA course through Black Orange company. Roles offered in our college are finance, HR, and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, library, computer, classrooms, etc. Hostels are also very good. Our mess provides us with healthy and hygienic food. We got morning tea with breakfast, then lunch, then evening snacks and dinner. Medical facilities are available in the college and also in the hostel. We have different activities like sports, etc.

admission_process.title: UniPune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Savitribai Phule Pune University admissionis inclusive of application, appearance in OEE entrance exam (for OEE-accepting programmes, such as MA, MSc and MTech, among others) followed by the release of merit list and final admission offer.
1-Vist https://campus.unipune.ac.in/ceep/login/aspx and submit the application form. Listed below are the steps to fill out the application form:
2-Candidates, after application, are required to appear for the course-specific OEE or other entrances conducted by the university or the state of Maharashtra.
3-After the exam, students must wait for the merit lists released on the official website of the university.

4-After the release of the merit list, candidates must fill in the admission form and upload the necessary documents in it. After all the documents are verified by the relevant department, the admission fee challan is generated and students must pay the UniPune fee before the last date.

Pune University feesis a combination of many fee elements charged by the university. Some of the components are paid every semester, while some are one-time. Below isthe UniPune feeand average package for top courses:

Pune University seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in the university based on their entrance exam or merit in the last qualifying exam. faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Sc admissions at UniPune?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass a minimu of Class 12  or equivalent from a statutory or recognised board/ university in India to apply for UniPune BSc programmes. faqs.question: How can I get admission to SPPU for MSc?
faqs.answer: Pune University MSc admission is entrance based. The selection is done on the basis of OEE scores conducted by the University. Candidates need to possess a bachelor's degree from a recognised institute/ university in the relevant field to apply for UniPune MSc admission. Candidates seeking enrolment via Pune University OEE 2025 can apply online on the official website of Campus Common Entrance Platform. There is no requirement to submit the required documents or application form offline.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for SPPU MSc physics?
faqs.answer: The eligibity criteria for SPPU MSc Physics : BSc in Physics/ Electronic Science/ Chemistry and Maths in Engineering degree BE/BTech/ BS in Maths till the second year with a minimum 45% aggregate.

faqs.question: How costly is UniPune?
faqs.answer: UniPune offers UG, PG, Diploma, Certificate and Doctoral level programmes across50+departments. The University offers these programmes within the range ofINR 3 KtoINR 50.42 Lakh. These courses are available in full-time mode for the duration of 4 month to 4 years. UniPune is not very costly as it is a government university.

courses_data.name: UniPune MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, ATMA, XAT, MAH CET, MCAER CET, CMAT, CAT, GMAT, CBSE 12th, MHT CET
courses_data.description: Unipune (short for Savitribai Phule Pune University) offers Manag ement level programme PUMBA and two-year MBA Pharma Biotech via the Department of Management Sciences. Along with the above-mentioned programme UNIPUNE offers several other combinations for the MBA programme at the PG level through its other affiliated colleges. SPPU MBA admissions for Maharashtra candidates are subject to a valid score inMAH CET, conducted by DTE Maharashtra. However, for outside Maharashtra candidates, a valid score inCMAT/CAT/MAH CETworks well. Read on to know more about Pune University MBA admission 2025.

faqs.question: Can I join MBA without CAT at UNIPUNE?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is possible to join UNIPUNE for an MBA. As the University admission to the MBA course is based on multiple entrance exams,  MAH CET, CMAT,XAT, ATMA, etc. Thus, applicants who have not appeared and secured valid scores in CAT can apply for the course through the scores of different examinations.

faqs.question: What is the cost of MBA at UNIPUNE?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MBA ranges betweenINR 15,000  and INR 11.9 lakhat UniPune and its affiliated colleges. For the exact fee, students are advised to visit the official website of UniPune or other affiliated colleges for details. Unipune offers its MBA courses via the Department of Management Sciences, popularly known asPUMBAand several other affiliated colleges. This fee is sourced from unofficial sources. Hence, is completely indicative.

faqs.question: Is Pune University hard to get?
faqs.answer: UniPune is not very difficult to get admission. Students should qualify the minimum eligibility criteria. Pune University offers admission basis merit and entrance wherein students must secure minimum marks in Class 12 or graduation, depending on the level of course opted. Students should also have valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as ATMA, OEE, GATE, UGC NET or SLET.

faqs.question: Is SPPU a private or government university?
faqs.answer: Savitribai Phule Pune University  (also known as UNIPUNE, Pune University and SPPU), is acollegiate public state university. The University is located at Pune, was established in 1949 through Poona University Act and is one of the premier universities in India. Recognised by UGC, it is popularly known as the 'Oxford of the East'. The University is accredited ‘A’ grade by NAAC. With over 40+ academic departments,  10+ faculties and 50+ research centres, the university also has about 300+ recognised research institutes and over 700 affiliated colleges offering UG, PG, diploma, PG diploma, PhD and certificate courses.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Pune University?
faqs.answer: SPPU admission for a majority of PG and UG courses, such as M.Sc. M.A. M.Tech, M.Com B.A. And BBA among others, is based on the Online Entrance Exam (OEE) conducted by the University. Additionally, there are numerous courses, such as MCA MMM, Advanced Diploma, MPH E-MBA, LL. M. and M. Lib. ISC among others, where the admission process is completely based on merit in the previous qualifying exam (Class 12 for UG admission and UG degree for PG admission). Thus, students will not be able to get direct admissions to Pune University.

faqs.question: How is the admission process for M.A at SPPU?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to MA are required to have completed their relevant UG degree. For further selection, candidates have to appear for OEE conducted by UniPune for final selection. The majority of MA courses are available on the campus of UniPune while a few chunks of MA specialisations are also offered by various affiliated colleges and recognised institutes under UniPune.

placement_data.title: SPPU Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to the NIRF report 2025 released, out of 206 UG 3-year students, 83 students were placed and 65 students opted for higher studies during SPPU placement 2025. 708 PG 2-year students were placed out of 1644 students and 88 students opted out. 100% placement rate recorded in 2024 for PG 3-year course during Pune University placement 2024.

Savitribai Phule Pune University has released the PUMBA placement report 2024. As per the report, highest and average package recorded during MBA placements was INR 16.22 LPA and 9.4 LPA . Top recruiters such as Deloitte, PwC, CRISIL , Godrej & Boyce and MRF visited the campus.

faqs.question: How costly is UniPune?
faqs.answer: UniPune offers UG, PG, Diploma, Certificate and Doctoral level programmes across 50+ departments. The University offers these programmes within the range of INR 3 K to INR 50.42 Lakh . These courses are available in full-time mode for the duration of 4 month to 4 years. UniPune is not very costly as it is a government university.

Savitribai Phule Pune University JEE Main cutoff 2025 has been released for various categories and rounds for admission to several BTech specialisations based on JEE Main scores, followed by round-wise counselling. Candidates planning to be admitted to any BTech branches at various Pune University-affiliated colleges must have a valid score in the JEE Main exam. Of all the specialisations, BTech in Computer Science Engineering can be considered the most popular and competitive specialisation bec

UniPune JEE Main cutoff 2025 has been concluded for admission to the BE, BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released through the affiliated colleges of UniPune. The most popular course for admission was BTech in Computer Science and Engineering. For admission to the College of Engineering, Pune, the last round closing rank for the General AI category candidates interested in studying CSE was 9029. For Pune Institute of Computer Technology, Society for Computer Technology and Research, the l

UniPune BTech cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to various BTech specialisations at different affiliated colleges. Students can check the table provided below to know the important details for UniPune BTech 2026.

UniPune released Counselling results for 2025 up to four rounds. The university releases counselling results for various categories. Candidates can check the round-wise consolidated lists for UniPune BTech cutoff 2025 as well as for the previous two years, 2024 and 2023, in the table provided below:

Unipune MHT CET cutoff 2025 will soon be available on this page. In the meantime, students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff details for MHT CET for admission to various BE course specialisations. The university offers admission to it's affiliated colleges via the MHT CET examination cutoff.

Some of the important dates related to UniPune MHT CET cutoff 2026 are mentioned in the table below. Students who want admission to this university and its affiliated colleges can download the timelines as a PDF file for later use.

The UniPune MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 90.81. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 95.79 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at UniPune was 90.81. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 95.18 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 89.17.
Analysing the past three years' cutoff, it is evident that the cutoff ranks saw a fluctuation over the years for MBA admission.

Students who want admission at UNIPUNE for the MBA/ PGDM courses, can look at the table below to know the important timelines for admission to UNIPUNE. Students can download these essential dates as a PDF file for later use.
UNIPUNE accepts the MAT, CAT, CMAT, MAH CET exam for admission to MBA/PGDM courses. Students can look at the table below to know the previously mentioned exams year-wise cutoffs.

UniPune admissions to Law courses including, B.A. LL.B. has been released up to the last round. The university offers admissions through various affiliated Law colleges. As per UniPune cutoff 2024, the closing score for B.A. LL.B. for ILS Law College for Last Round was 99.32, for Dr. D. Y. Patil Law College, it was 95.38. Check out UniPune MHTCET BA LLB cutoff for various UniPune affiliated colleges cutoff 2025 for the General category All India candidates:

UniPune accepts the MHCET Law scores for admission to the Law courses through affiliated colleges. As per UniPune cutoff 2025, the last round closing scores for D.E.S's Shri Navalmal Firodia Law College stood at 98.11 for the General AI category. In 2024, the closing rank stood at 98.7, witnessing an increasing trend.
MHCET Law Counselling was concluded after the release of the final round. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the previous year's cutoff trends for differe

According to the closing cutoffs for the General category candidates under the AI quota, the cutoff range went from 7.54 in the first round to 98.3 score in the last round. The hardest college for admission according to the first round cutoff was Smt. Kashibai Navale College of Education, with the cutoff being 97.31.

Unipune MAH BEd CET was concluded for candidates interested in studying BEd at the university. Unipune releases its cutoff through its affiliated colleges. The cutoff is released for students belonging to the General AI category. For admission to Jai Ganesh College of Education, the last round closing was 44.95, in the General AI category. For MIT Saint Dnyaneshwar B.Ed. College, the cuoff was closed at 81.47, among the General AI category candidates seeking admission to BEd.

According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 99.83 to 99.28 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.
For the General HS category, the cutoff was 99.11. To know more cutoff information about other categories, rounds, and quotas, see the table below:

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 99.28, whereas, in 2024, admissions were closed at a percentile of 99.78, and in 2023, the last round cutoff was 99.92. This pattern over the years suggests that the competition for MCA admission has decreased over the past 3 years. highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is UniPune. Numerous national and international ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #91 rank in the Overall category, #56 under University, and #11 under State Public University. UniPune is also ranked internationally by QS World Rankings 2025 at #631-640 position. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around UniPune rankings.

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Pune In 2025
Best Among QS World University Rankings Ranked Colleges In Pune In 2024
Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Pune In 2025

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, UniPune outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, UniPune fell 54 ranks to #91 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, UniPune fell 33 ranks to #56 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It can be seen that; in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, UniPune fell 8 ranks to #11 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
As per the overall score, UniPune has been placed at a good position by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2026, UniPune climbed 65 ranks to #566 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, UniPune fell 34 ranks to #207 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, UniPune fell 8 ranks to #37 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Engineering, PuneReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: COEP Technological University review.
reviews.review_text: Some faculty members are quite helpful and knowledgeable, who help students for getting industry ready and gain good technical skills and soft skills. The boys' hostel is quite old, not so good, food quality is above average. Other facilities like sports, infra and all are good. COEP is the only college in Pune to have its own boat club, which is active.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by College of Engineering, PuneReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: COEP is the regional underdog.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but the number of students in the location is really low. Mess food is okay. The gym is crowded. Ground is good. Wi-Fi is provided in the entire campus, but sometimes it doesn't work. Located in the city center, so many fun activities around. The overall infrastructure is decent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Zeal College of Engineering and ResearchReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is an easy-going engineering life.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and facilities, labs are good, and overall, a good mid-level campus. Very good college, but the downside is that there are limited grounds and sports facilities. Courses are available, and indoor activities are very good. The college also appreciates indoor activities rather than outdoor activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Hutatma Rajguru MahavidyalayaReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in the Khed Taluka.
reviews.review_text: The college campus was very big and versatile. All fields were available. Teachers were very strict and individually concentrated on all of us. Classrooms were neat and clean, and there were cameras. Hostel facility, canteen facilities, and stationery were available in the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by ISB&M College of CommerceReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Our college gives us 100% placements. Faculty members are kind and approachable.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, library, computer, classrooms, etc. Hostels are also very good. Our mess provides us with healthy and hygienic food. We got morning tea with breakfast, then lunch, then evening snacks and dinner. Medical facilities are available in the college and also in the hostel. We have different activities like sports, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Pimpri Chinchwad College of EngineeringReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: An average college in Pune.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very good and nice. I stayed there for my whole FY. We have fast Wi-Fi, alternate-day cleaning services, food delivery options, hot water, and vending machines. It is a 12-story hostel. We also have medical facilities available, and the management hosted events for us. About the food, it is horrible and very bad. I did not like it, but the hostel is great.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by PVG's College of Engineering and Technology and G.K. Pate (Wani)
reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good, Don't take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in computer labs and the Training & Placement Office. Labs are well-equipped with the latest technology. Air conditioning is also available in all computer labs. Classrooms are well-equipped with smart TVs. The library area is also good, but the mess facility is not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by MCE Society's Allana College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the separation of students based on gender and with the events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Good Wi-Fi connectivity. Classrooms have projectors. The library is separate for girls and boys, which is a big disappointment, as in group studies, there's no place to study together, and in a university, having a separate library is not preferable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Army Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This is a good college to consider.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good. The main building of this college is also good. There is a 4th-year hostel which was made recently. It is the best hostel in this college. It has a lift. We have a college gym that is common for all, and girls have their own gym in their hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Pune Institute of Computer Technology, Society for Computer Technology and ResearchReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements, great crowd, good food, okay facilities, bad faculty.
reviews.review_text: College is small, but the facilities, like labs and classes, are decent. The number of students is high, so extra lab practice is almost impossible. The library is good, books are plenty, and the space is also okay if you arrive in the morning. A hostel for both genders is good as it has been renovated. Better find local hostels in the area, like Union, Khade, or Stanza. The college canteen is good enough, but the surrounding area has better options. The college gym is small but very well-mainta...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by International Institute of Information Technology, PuneReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for scholars.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is top-notch, and the hostels are not that good, but still okay. Triple-sharing rooms are available for first-year students, and from next year, double-sharing is also available. We have a water cooler on every floor and a LAN port to get Wi-Fi in every room. The room is good. Food is okay in the mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Guru Teg Bahadur College, SathialaReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good learning experience at GNDU with a supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Classrooms and labs are properly set up and comfortable for regular use. Wi-Fi and library facilities are available for students. Hostel rooms are clean and manageable, and the food in the mess is decent. Sports, medical, and other basic facilities are also available, making campus life smooth and comfortable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by College of Engineering, PuneReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I love the college and its life here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is a bit weak. Classrooms are clean, and the library is well-equipped. The hostel infrastructure really needs to be improved, and the mess food is fine. The sports facilities are good, and our college has its own teams that frequently participate in tournaments. College Sport events also take place.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Pune Institute of Computer Technology, Society for Computer Technology and ResearchReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Small campus but big exploration.
reviews.review_text: The college provides unlimited Wi-Fi for all students on campus. Individual labs are available for each practical subject. But classrooms are limited, so we have to compromise on college timing. Because of that, some batches are taken late. The college library is beneficial for students. Overall, the campus size is small.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Zeal College of Engineering and ResearchReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent academics with a balanced campus life.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure with proper classrooms, library and Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities are decent, mess food is average. Sports and medical facilities are available and manageable. The medical facility is good as many insights college has taken upfront action towards medical incidents.

data.description: Savitribai Phule Pune University has a sports complex that includes Basketball and Volleyball Courts along-with Cricket and Football Grounds , Gymnasium and a Sports Hostel . The complex is by parks. It features an open ground for outdoor games and athletics. Accommodation facility is also availble for up to 80 sportspeople.

faqs.answer:
A:    Loyola - ICAM College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

review_summary.college_name: Loyola - ICAM College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A well-balanced college with strong academics, good placements, and a supportive environment.

content.Placements: Placement record is quite good especially for IT and software branches. Many students report 90-100 percent placement in recent batches. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, and Cognizant. Some students got offers up to 15 LPA-17 LPA in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is located in the heart of Chennai, near Loyola College. Well-connected and safe. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well-maintained. Wi-Fi and lab facilities are decent for academic projects. The hostel is clean, disciplined, and provides good food and basic amenities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Strong academic foundation with good infrastructure and improving placements.

content.Placements: I’m from the 2022–2026 batch, pursuing B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering. Around 80–85 percent of students in our batch got placed. The highest package is around 10 LPA, the average is about 4.5 LPA, and the lowest is roughly 3 LPA. Top recruiters included Zoho, TCS, CTS, Accenture, Deloitte, Infosys, and Hyundai. Several students also received internship offers from companies like Zoho and Saint-Gobain through the placement cell. The placement training sessions are frequent and genuinely helpful, focusing on aptitude, soft skills, and technical interviews. Core placements are moderate, but IT placements are quite strong.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's worth joining Loyola - ICAM College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Good for placements, we can expect good companies here. Package is also good here. We will get placed based on our skills. Our skill development is important here. Placement training is also available here at the end of each year, and we can expect a good life.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-maintained infrastructure, no issues. Everything is maintained here. We have lab facilities and MATLAB. Library is available. Everything is well-maintained. When it comes to hostel, food supplies are good when compared to other colleges. Our college hostel is comparatively very nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty members but not placements.

content.Placements: 95% of students get placed in our college in the final year. The highest package is 13 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Infosys, Zoho, and TCS are the top recruiting companies. Many students, even in my class, get internships in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good, and the campus is well-maintained with AC. The library is also very amazing. The quality of our mess food is also very good. This college gives full support and motivates sports students to achieve their goals and become champions.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Expected journey - Better infrastructure, faculty, and placements.

content.Placements: In our college, most of them get placed but not with a high package of 75%. The highest package till now is 15 LPA and the minimum package is 3.5 LPA. Our college invites companies like Cognizant, Zoho, TCS, etc. Internships are not provided for everyone, and only a few students get, and that is 20%. In my course, the top roles offered are software engineer, data scientist, and cloud computing.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good-looking and green. One disadvantage is that space is less. But other things are good. The hostel place is clean and they provide non-veg 3 times a week. There is a hostel day celebration and some activities take place.

placement_data.title: Loyola - ICAM College of Engineering and Technology Placement overview
paragraphs: Loyola-ICAM LICET placements drive was organised in October, 2020 and concluded successfully. Several recruiters held online tests to recruit students from respective branches (2021 batch). The average salary offered during placements is around Rs 4 LPA as claimed by the official website.

The Institute has been maintaining its placement percentage consistently well, which is nearly 90 per cent of the eligible students. The placement team organises regular training sessions on soft skills, aptitude, reasoning, quantitative, verbal and technical aspects to make students employable.
Below are the highlights related to Loyola-ICAM LICET placements:
Average salary offered
JK Tyre, Bank Bazaar, Ford, Tech Mahindra, Steria, etc.

If we see Loyola-ICAM LICET placements trend, it has been witnessed that the Institute placed over 200 students in 2019. However, the number of students placed in 2020 is quite low when compared to 2019 and 2018. Here is a trend graph to see the number of students placed in the past three years:
Here are the graphs which present top company-wise placements of Loyola-ICAM LICET, along with the number of students hired in the past three years:

The placement process of Loyola-ICAM LICET is run by its placement and training team that arranges industrial visits/ projects, guest lectures, internships, training sessions, workshops and other related events.

Additionally, the team imparts pieces of training for mock interviews, GDPIs, resume building, etc. in order to strengthen the campus recruitment process. Students of Loyola-ICAM LICET are highly rated by employers across industries.
The placement office is well-equipped for interviews and counselling sessions. The Institute invites its alumnus to share their success stories in order to motivate current students.
A lot of leading companies participate in the placement drive of Loyola-ICAM LICET, which are listed below:

A. Loyola-ICAM LICET conducts its placements drive generally in October every year.

A. In 2020 placements, a total of 154 students were placed by the recruiters.
Q. What is the average salary package offered by the recruiters during Loyola-ICAM LICET placements?
A. The average salary package offered during Loyola-ICAM LICET placements is 4 LPA (approx).
Q. What is the placements rate of Loyola-ICAM LICET?
A. The Institutes maintains an overall placements rate of nearly 90 per cent.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Centre for Intelligent Systems Lab

reviews.review_heading: A well-balanced college with strong academics, good placements, and a supportive environment.
reviews.review_text: The campus is located in the heart of Chennai, near Loyola College. Well-connected and safe. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well-maintained. Wi-Fi and lab facilities are decent for academic projects. The hostel is clean, disciplined, and provides good food and basic amenities.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academic foundation with good infrastructure and improving placements.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-maintained with modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. The library is excellent, it’s digital-friendly with a large collection of reference materials and online journals. The ICAM collaboration brings some additional academic exposure and access to French resources. The hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and a disciplined environment. The mess food is average but hygienic, and the canteen offers decent alternatives. Sports facilities are very...

reviews.review_heading: It's worth joining Loyola - ICAM College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-maintained infrastructure, no issues. Everything is maintained here. We have lab facilities and MATLAB. Library is available. Everything is well-maintained. When it comes to hostel, food supplies are good when compared to other colleges. Our college hostel is comparatively very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members but not placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, and the campus is well-maintained with AC. The library is also very amazing. The quality of our mess food is also very good. This college gives full support and motivates sports students to achieve their goals and become champions.

reviews.review_heading: Expected journey - Better infrastructure, faculty, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good-looking and green. One disadvantage is that space is less. But other things are good. The hostel place is clean and they provide non-veg 3 times a week. There is a hostel day celebration and some activities take place.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this campus is awesome. It is hard to get the slightly out of this campus. Computer lab is good and it is ethernet. Wi-Fi is fixed around the campus. Classrooms are looking great. Library has two floors fixed with many computers inside.

reviews.review_heading: Computer Science Engineering from the Loyola-ICAM College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure for the CSE course. The entire campus has Wi-Fi connectivity. Labs and the library have all the necessary resources. The college campus is fully secure with ample parking space. Classrooms are furnished with modern facilities. Sports and other necessary amenities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is worth the tuition fee and the peer connections are pretty good.
reviews.review_text: There are separate hostels for both boys and girls and the food and other amenities provided are fabulous. The use of phones is strictly prohibited on campus. The lab has high-end PCs but for the first few years, the computers have been a bit low-end.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostel food in the mess is common for all students. Loyola Health Center is available for medical issues. Classrooms are the best and equipped with projectors. Laboratories are good.

reviews.review_heading: You can join this college because it provides 100% placement.
reviews.review_text: They have the best infrastructure among all the engineering colleges in this type of locality. The best and the safest college to study in without fear of infrastructure. The college has the best labs and working places and there is a boys' and girls' common room for any emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Staff members were supportive and encouraging, both in academic and other activities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college were good. Laboratories were perfectly maintained and the students were allowed to access the lab whenever they needed it, especially during the final semester projects. Classrooms and labs were spacious, and every individual was allowed to access the computers in the lab whenever they needed. The college also has a proper library.

reviews.review_heading: The placements for the 2022 batch are good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. Labs are maintained with good Wi-Fi, and the equipment is good. If we are in need of any apparatus for our project, the college provides that. The classrooms and library are well-organized. The canteen food is good, and the canteen infrastructure could be better.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and fair placements.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories are well-equipped with the required equipment for the various courses. The library has a lot of books related to the courses as well as to gain knowledge about other fields too. The hostels are well maintained and hygienic foods are provided to the students over there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Loyola-ICAM College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The lab facilities in our college are excellent, and you can access the equipment at any time. The library is the best and you can get all your books for the semester exams. Internet access is good in labs. Canteen food is decent, but the infrastructure of the canteen could be better.

reviews.review_heading: Good and safe environment, good placements, friendly staff and awesome college life.
reviews.review_text: In Loyola icam college of engineering and technology, labs and library are in excellent maintenance . Quality vise awesome foods were offered and medical vise good and sports vise really worthy. If you ask how the facility was, my answer always be 5 star rating toward the facility in Loyola icam college of engineering and technology.

college_info.intro:
Centurion University Bhubaneswar offers UG and PG courses across various specialisations such as Science, Engineering, Law, Pharmacy, Management, and others. BTech, MBA, and BSc are the flagship courses offered at Centurion University of Technology & Management, Bhubaneswar.
The BTech programmes offered at the institute is a full- time, four- year programme, covering core courses in the areas of CSE, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Agricultural Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Centurion University BBSR is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Agribusiness Management, Finance, HR, Marketing, and others. The below-mentioned are Centurion University Bhubaneswar's popular programmes:

review_content.Placements: In our college, a minimum of 70% students are placed in our course. The lowest package of the last year is 3 LPA, and the highest package is 10 LPA. Many top recruiting companies come, like IBM, and an old senior of our college is placed at Google.
