review_summary.college_name: Centurion University Bhubaneswar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Centurion University review.

content.Placements: The placement in our course was the best among all courses. The placement percentage was around 85–90 percent. The highest package was also secured by our course only, i.e., 22 LPA. The average package was around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, Deloitte, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facilities, a library, and modern classrooms were available. Computer labs, laboratories, and workshops were well equipped with instruments. Hostel quality was also good. Sports and games were encouraged by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: You will enjoy the college.

content.Placements: Only a few students were placed, nearly 35% students in our course. Minimum package is 3 LPA, and the highest I don't have any valid proof because college says nearly 24, but we don't believe. Wipro, Amazon, and TCS recruit. More of them were placed in Wipro or TCS. Software engineer and supervisor roles were offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very good, and I recommend you visit it as there are lots of places like the butterfly garden, gram tarang, etc. Wi-Fi is here, but don't rely on it as they have less network speed. The library is here, but it doesn't have new books, all are old. The hostel is very bad, I heard it, but I don't know that much because I am a day scholar.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Also a very good college.

content.Placements: In our college, a minimum of 70% students are placed in our course. The lowest package of the last year is 3 LPA, and the highest package is 10 LPA. Many top recruiting companies come, like IBM, and an old senior of our college is placed at Google.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is the best. There are many types in our college. A big ground, a volleyball court, a gym area, and a swimming pool are available in the college. The classroom is completely AC and very spacious.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aerospace Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very satisfied with the college. Infrastructure, facilities, faculty members, and all are good.

content.Placements: 80 to 85% students were placed. The highest package is 6 to 7 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiters are Tata, Godrej, Alphabets, HAL, etc. Every Student needs to do internship, which is also provided by the college. College will provide its own internship programme. Service Engineer, Designer, Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Every possible facility is available in the college as well as the hostel. Food is good, Wi-Fi was available, and the Lab was also very useful. They also have an option available of AC luxury in a hostel that was value for money. I also chose the luxury one, and all the facilities were good.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated Master of Science (M.Sc.) + Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is recognized as one of the best skill institutions in Odisha.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities at the college are impressive. Starting from the second year, students participate in internships at various hospitals. Many graduates are recruited by these same hospitals based on their performance, and there are also opportunities to secure positions at renowned institutions such as AIIMS.
content.Infrastructure: College is set in a peaceful and green environment, making it a pleasant place to study. The hostels are well-maintained, with spacious rooms and all necessary facilities provided. Hostel wardens are also very cooperative and ensure students feel comfortable.

admission_overview.college_name: Centurion University Bhubaneswar Course Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Cutoffs, Application Process

admission_process.title: Centurion University of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Centurion University of Technology and Management (CUTM) Bhubaneswar, offers UG, PG and Diploma courses with a diverse range of over 100 courses across various fields, includingEngineering, Management,Science, Mass Communication and Media,Design, Hotel Management, and Pharmacy. ForCenturion University Bhubaneswaradmissions, candidates are required to appear for the CUEE which is conducted by the University. Admission to courses offered in the field of Management, Technology, Science and Engineering requires a valid score in CUEE.

Centurion University Bhubaneswar coursesoffer a range of diploma, UG, PG, research-level and certificate programmes offered through multiple departments working under it. Some of the popular courses offered at Centurion University Bhubaneswar are mentioned in below table along with their eligibility criteria:
Class 12 (Physics, Chemistry, Maths) with 50% aggregate (5% relaxation for reserved category)
BSc in respective disciplines
Bachelor's degree
Class 12 (Physics, Chemistry, Maths/Biology) with 45% aggregate
CUEE BPharm

Step 1: ApplicationTheprocess ofadmissionat Centurion University of Technology and Managementstartswiththe online application formsubmittedonitsofficialwebsiteby the aspirant.Inadditiontotheapplication,thefeewouldbeleviedaspertheprogrammechosen.However,inadditiontothat, the candidate is supposedto upload scanned copies of documentsincludingacademic transcripts, mark sheets, certificates, and a passport-sizephotograph.

Step 2: Entrance ExamSome of the programmes at the university have entrance examination of their own, referred to as CUEE. On the other hand, some of the university takes specific scores from national level exams like JEE Main, SAT, or even any other national level exam for entrance purpose. Candidates can choose between appearing in CUEE or submitting their scorecard for national level exam; however, this depends upon the rules followed by the program.

Step 3: Selection and CounsellingAfter the application and entrance exam (if applicable), candidates are shortlisted based on their scores. Those who are shortlisted will then be called for counseling, after which they can choose their program depending on merit and seat availability. To confirm their seat, candidates must accept the seat offered to them and pay the admission fee. After seat acceptance, original documents must be submitted for verification to complete the admission process.
For more information about Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar Campus Admission Process check out the below video:

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Centurion University BTech programme with 45% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Being under a reserved category, you qualify for entry to the BTech programme at Centurion University with 45% in Class 12 based on the 5% relaxation in eligibility. However, for entry into BTech at the university, a valid score from the Centurion University Entrance Exam (CUEE) is also needed.

faqs.question: Are Centurion University Bhubaneswar admissions open for 2025?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Centurion University Bhubaneswar admission portal is open. Students seeking admission to the 2025 batch can now apply for their preferred course. Moreover, to get a seat, students who satisfy the eligibility requirements can go to the official website of the university and submit an application form for the preferred course. Admissions are granted based on the CUEE.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for the BTech programme at Centurion University?
faqs.answer: A candidate must have completed class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics securing at least 50% marks. Relaxation of 5% is allowed for candidates belonging to reserved categories. In addition to the above requirements, a valid score in the Centurion University Entrance Exam, CUEE is also mandatory for admission to BTech programs offered by Centurion University.

courses_data.description: Centurion University of Technology and Management conducts its admission in multiple modes. The eligibility criteria for the MBA course depends on the type of admission mode you are appearing for: 1. Through CUET-PG (Centurion University Entrance Test): Qualification: Graduation from a reputed university with at least 50% marks (45% for SC/ST/PwD categories).Entrance Exam: Appear for CUET-PG exam and score good. 2. Through CAT (Common Admission Test): Qualification: Same as above (Graduation with 50% aggregate marks).Entrance Exam: Appear for CAT, a national-level MBA entrance exam and score good. 3. Other Modes: For some cases, students are offered direct admission on the basis of Class 12 scores. They might also have to appear for interviews or GDs.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for the MBA programme at Centurion University Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: The application fees for MBA at Centurion University Bhubaneswar is Rs 600. Not only for MBA, the application fees is same for all other courses also. It need to be paid at the time of filling the application fees. The students need to keep in mind that apllication fees is not refundable. The students can fill the application form online by visiting the institue's official website and paying the application fees on the same by online basis like netbanking, UPI etc.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility requirements for the MBA programme at Centurion University?
faqs.answer: The candidate should have completed graduation in any discipline for eligibility to pursue the MBA course at Centurion University. In addition, candidates must take the Centurion University Entrance Examination (CUEE). This is the main component of the admission process.

placement_data.title: Centurion University Bhubaneswar Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: As per the official website, the highest package offered during placements 2023 was INR 13.8 LPA . A total of 1513 students out of 1684 were placed and 90% placement rate was recorded during the Centurion University of Technology and Management placements 2023. Above 2300 multiple offers were made and more than 200 recruiters participated during placements 2023. Further, 47 students were offered a package of more than 9 LPA. The top recruiters of Centurion University of Technology and Management Bhubaneswar in 2023 were Accenture, ITC, Jio, Cipla, Justdial , etc.

faqs.question: Can I get a Finance job after completing MBA from Centurion University Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: Yes, graduating with an MBA degree from Centurion University Bhubaneswar makes students eligible for various jobs in the Finance domain. This is because, during the programme, students learn variousconcepts, such as Financial Accounting, Time Value and Money, Cost Acocunting, and more that help students understand the Finance domain. Listed below are a few job profiles for MBA graduates to pursue and their corresponding average salaries: Accountant: INR 2.5 - 4 LPA Consultant: INR 3 - 5 LPA Auditor: INR 3.5 - 5.5 LPA Insurance Advisor: INR 2.5 - 4 LPA Business Executive: INR 2 - 4.5 LPA

faqs.question: What is the CUEE Pattern for BBA in Centurion University Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: As CUEE is one of the criteria for the admission process. The detailed information of the CUEE Exam and pattern is given below for your better understanding and for more details and clarity you can visit the website of the CUEE or Centurion University Bhubaneswar. PARTICULARS DETAILS Mode of Examination Online Remote- Proctored Test Duration 3 Hours Medium English Section English, Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics/ Zoology and Botany Total no. of Question 180 Types of Question Objective Multiple Choice Question Marking Scheme One mark will be given to the right answered question and there will be no negative marking. Candidates are to note that no marks will be deducted for unattempted marking.

faqs.question: What is the average package for MBA students at Centurion University Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: The average package offered to MBA students at Centurion University Bhubaneswar is INR 3-4 LPA and the highest package offered is INR 10 LPA. The placement packages cannot be said very good but are decent. The fees to puruse MBA at this institute is INR 4.2 lacs. The fees is quite high seeing the packages. But students can get a decent return on thier fees invested. Many good companies like TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra etc. are the top recruiters at this institue. According to the recent placement drive, alomost 70-80 % of the total batch got placed.

faqs.question: What is the placement record for MCA at Centurion University?
faqs.answer: The overall placement record of Centurion University, according to the data mention on the official website of year 2020-2021 is the no. of student graduated in 2020-2021 is 564 and the number of students got placed is 114 with the median salary od INR 3.60 LPA, and 323 students selected for the higher studies. For more detailed information and clarification the applicant can visit official website for Centurion University.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Centurion University Bhubaneswar. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the Outlook 2025, the institute ranked #1 under Skill Universities category, and #9 under State Private University. Centurion University Bhubaneswar excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Centurion University Bhubaneswar rankings is covered in the following article:

outlook.description:
Centurion University Bhubaneswar has received strong ranks by the Outlook under the 'State Private University' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook 2025. In the 'State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Centurion University Bhubaneswar climbed 1 rank to #9 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Skill Universities' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Centurion University Bhubaneswar's rank is #1, the same as last year's rank in the 'Skill Universities' category by the Outlook ranking.

Centurion University has 6 boys hostel and 3 girls hostel. Students staying at hostels are provided with considerable options of food, for there are many mess halls in the campus. Students can choose North Indian or South Indian menu.
In Campus Boys and Girls hostel facilities for 10,000+ students along with AC & Non AC Accommodation and best of class mess facility

The menu of the restaurant consists of many categories of food items such as Soft Drinks, Snacks, Chowmin & Roll, Soup, Desserts, Appetizers, Lunch and Dinner, Thali, Rice, Dal, Veg. and Non-Veg. Curry, Paneer & Mushroom Curry, Egg and Fish Curry, Chinese etc.

reviews.review_heading: Centurion University review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were extremely good. Wi-Fi facilities, a library, and modern classrooms were available. Computer labs, laboratories, and workshops were well equipped with instruments. Hostel quality was also good. Sports and games were encouraged by the college.

reviews.review_heading: You will enjoy the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good, and I recommend you visit it as there are lots of places like the butterfly garden, gram tarang, etc. Wi-Fi is here, but don't rely on it as they have less network speed. The library is here, but it doesn't have new books, all are old. The hostel is very bad, I heard it, but I don't know that much because I am a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: Also a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is the best. There are many types in our college. A big ground, a volleyball court, a gym area, and a swimming pool are available in the college. The classroom is completely AC and very spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with the college. Infrastructure, facilities, faculty members, and all are good.
reviews.review_text: Every possible facility is available in the college as well as the hostel. Food is good, Wi-Fi was available, and the Lab was also very useful. They also have an option available of AC luxury in a hostel that was value for money. I also chose the luxury one, and all the facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: College is recognized as one of the best skill institutions in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: College is set in a peaceful and green environment, making it a pleasant place to study. The hostels are well-maintained, with spacious rooms and all necessary facilities provided. Hostel wardens are also very cooperative and ensure students feel comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and better jobs are provided by our college.
reviews.review_text: Our department boasted well-equipped laboratories, smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and access to a huge library. The hostel provided neat rooms, hygienic mess, and 24x7 medical attention. There are cricket, football, and indoor games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: College has strong practical learning and infrastructure, but faculty availability needs improvement
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are highly maintained, and Wi-fi is available. The library is also provided in our college. The college hostels are good, but the food quality in the mess is not good. In the CUTM, they have a big sports complex.

reviews.review_heading: Value of money for students.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi facilities, and the labs and halls are air-conditioned. There are plenty of computers available on campus, and they are all well maintained. Different types of hostels are available; if you want air-conditioned rooms, they are available, and attached bathrooms are also an option.

reviews.review_heading: Strong faculty & good jobs.
reviews.review_text: Our department had well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and access to a vast library. The hostel offered clean rooms, hygienic mess food, and 24/7 medical support. Sports facilities included cricket, football, and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also quite good. We have well-equipped labs for all the different subjects like Pharmacology, Pharmaceutics, Pharmacognosy, Medicinal Chemistry, etc., along with smart classrooms. The main library is spacious and digitally enabled. The hostel facilities are decent, and the sports department is very good.

reviews.review_heading: An overall really good experience as a B.Tech CSE student!
reviews.review_text: The older hostels were quite congested and not very satisfactory. The food served is often criticized for being unappetizing and poorly prepared; some students have reported finding insects in it. There are many lab classes, but only two can accommodate 60+ students at once.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our courses like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are good. The quality of facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: At last, it is the best college if u want to study.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities for students. All classrooms have AC and their own smart boards. All classrooms have their personal Wi-Fi. The best thing is that you can go to the library when you want for what time you want. They give good food in the hostel canteen and excellent facilities for hostel students. Also, present a personal doctor for the hostel and for sports injuries.

reviews.review_heading: The campus review of CUTM.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good except for its food. The hostel costs are also affordable. They are the most secure places. More often some clubs provide you with sports and entertainment purposes as we can enjoy the nightlife of the college. There a many stalls. We can enjoy being there and gossiping around with friends.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college with good faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: College facilities are very good. The college infrastructure is also very good. Every single classroom has an AC and Wi-Fi system. The library environment is very good. The canteen food quality is not good. The food and hostel rooms are very disappointing.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Centurion University of Technology and Management, Bhubaneswar Campus

likes.text: Top companies such as Google, Infosys, Crime Investigation, IBM, Digit, and others hire students from here.
Almost every student do internship either from college recommendation or with personal prefernce  Job offer usually comes as job of MR, Quality assurance, Quality controll etc.

Hostels are well maintained, the quality of food in hostels is good, and the canteen provides very bad and unhygienic food.

review_content.General: Placements in our college are good but not excellent. More than 70 percent of students are placed during placement campus drives. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest average is 4 LPA. Some top recruiters are Infosys, Cognizant, Microsoft, Capgemini, etc. Internships are provided for all the students, not only from the college but also from outside.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure in our college is good; all the facilities are available on campus regarding your branch. Labs are available anytime with experienced lab assistants. Wi-Fi connectivity is also good. Libraries are well-stocked and always available. Hostel facilities are excellent, with a neat and clean campus. The canteen provides nice food of good quality, and the rates are also cheap.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely perfect for new students who want to take IT in Nagpur.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good, and the ratio is also high for students to get placed in this course. Mostly, students get placed in this course, around 70–80 percent get placed. The highest package offered in our course is 24 LPA, and the lowest package is 9 LPA. The top recruiting companies which came to our college are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, and many others. Internships are provided in our college, but in the last year of the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure in our college is top-notch, and in our department, all the facilities are provided by the college, there are no compromises anywhere. Wi-Fi connectivity is also good. Classrooms are always clean, the library is well-stocked and always available. The canteen is also available with a variety of food, though the quality of food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is good, the teaching is good, but the college is out of the city, it is near Fetri.

review_content.Placements: On average, 30-40% student get placed. This year's average package is 4.5 LPA, and the highest is 6 LPA. The companies that give chances are Tata Motors, Horoko, Zapyee, and Shopkart. Mainly, the IT role they offer. Almost 60% student get an internship, and many want to go for higher education.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college contains 3 buildings, and it has 5 branches, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, IT Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. All labs contain a good PC, each with atleast i5 and a good graphics card. The library is there with a good amount of books to read. All campus contains Wi-Fi, and each department contains each personal Wi-Fi.

review_summary.college_name: Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Fire Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: National Fire Service College

content.Placements: Enrolled in 32 and Batch of B. Tech Fire Engineering at National Fire Service College, Nagpur. Batch strength of 71. NFSC offers average package of 14 LPA. The highest 24 LPA and the lowest 7 LPA. Companies in past are BPCL, IOCL, HPCL, GAIL, ONGC, SAIL. Recruited as a fire officer.
content.Infrastructure: Well-maintained AC classrooms. Hostel is cleaned on a regular basis. Food in mess is up to the mark. Hostel comprises 8 floors where each room has 2 persons staying together. Proper furniture across each room. Two proper almirahs in each room. Four-time food offered in mess every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In my opinion, it’s a good college in this Nagpur area.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good but not excellent. More than 70 percent of students are placed during placement campus drives. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest average is 4 LPA. Some top recruiters are Infosys, Cognizant, Microsoft, Capgemini, etc. Internships are provided for all the students, not only from the college but also from outside.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure in our college is good; all the facilities are available on campus regarding your branch. Labs are available anytime with experienced lab assistants. Wi-Fi connectivity is also good. Libraries are well-stocked and always available. Hostel facilities are excellent, with a neat and clean campus. The canteen provides nice food of good quality, and the rates are also cheap.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely perfect for new students who want to take IT in Nagpur.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good, and the ratio is also high for students to get placed in this course. Mostly, students get placed in this course, around 70–80 percent get placed. The highest package offered in our course is 24 LPA, and the lowest package is 9 LPA. The top recruiting companies which came to our college are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, and many others. Internships are provided in our college, but in the last year of the course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure in our college is top-notch, and in our department, all the facilities are provided by the college, there are no compromises anywhere. Wi-Fi connectivity is also good. Classrooms are always clean, the library is well-stocked and always available. The canteen is also available with a variety of food, though the quality of food is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is good, the teaching is good, but the college is out of the city, it is near Fetri.

content.Placements: On average, 30-40% student get placed. This year's average package is 4.5 LPA, and the highest is 6 LPA. The companies that give chances are Tata Motors, Horoko, Zapyee, and Shopkart. Mainly, the IT role they offer. Almost 60% student get an internship, and many want to go for higher education.
content.Infrastructure: The college contains 3 buildings, and it has 5 branches, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, IT Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. All labs contain a good PC, each with atleast i5 and a good graphics card. The library is there with a good amount of books to read. All campus contains Wi-Fi, and each department contains each personal Wi-Fi.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering(Data Science) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In my opinion, it's good to gain knowledge here.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good but not excellent. As compared to other colleges in Nagpur, this college is average because there are many engineering colleges in Nagpur that provide better placement than ours. The highest package goes to 7 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Internships are not provided in our college, you have to do them on your own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in our campus is neither good nor bad, just average. Our department has average infrastructure, and other facilities are also available, but they are not good. Wi-Fi facilities are available in various areas and departments, but not in the whole area. The library is well stocked, and always books are available in it, but our library days are once a week, which creates some difficulties. Canteen is present, but varieties are not available, only a few items are available in the canteen.

admission_overview.college_name: Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University Admissions 2025: Eligibility Criteria, Application Process, Dates

admission_process.title: RTMNU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RTMNUadmission 2025is based onmeritfor most of theUG& PGprogrammes. The admission is based on the score obtained by the student in the qualifying exam. Interested candidates can fill out the application forms online through the official website of the university.

Also known asNagpur University,Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur Universityoffer UG, PG, diploma and doctoral courses. These are offered under eight departments including Commerce, Law and Education. There are various popular streams available including Interior Design, Fashion Design, Food Science and Nutrition, Cosmetic Technology etc. ForMBA, BTech, BArch and MCA, admission is given on the basis of entrance exams likeCAT/ MAT/ JEE/ MAHCETat Nagpur University.

Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University course admission is open for eligible students. The application process ends in the month ofJune, every year. Check out theRTMNU admission 2025details below:

Coming to affordability, it is one of the main causes of many people dropping out of college or getting a degree. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has made education more affordable, qualifying for one of these loans or scholarships frequently comes with a set of requirements. Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University is open for admission to all eligible candidates. Before applying for admission, candidates must check the eligibility first. Below is the step-by-step process forNagpur University admission 2025-25:
Step 1: Application:Visit the official website and register to fill out the application form. There are separate forms available for each course in the section of each department.

Step 2: Selection:The admission list is preparedmerit-wiseand category-wise for most of the UG & PG courses. For a few courses likeBTech, MBA, and MCA courses,selection is done on the basis of the entrance exam scores.
Step 3: Payment of Fee:Pay the admission fee along with the required documents to secure the seat.

placement_data.title: Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has released the placement details for the batch passed out in 2025. A total of 36 recruiters participated during the placement process and placed 3892 students with good packages. The highest package secured by the batch 2025 stood at INR 6.5 LPA . Reliance Jio offered this package. Some of the top recruiters of Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University in 2025 include TCS, HCL, Hexaware, Lupin Pharma, Accenture, etc.

According to the RTMNU Management NIRF report 2025, median package offered to MBA students of batch 2024 was INR 3.5 LPA . The Pharmacy NIRF report 2025 states that median salary achieved by BPharm and MPharm students in 2024 was INR 2.8 LPA and INR 5.5 LPA .

faqs.question: How are the placements for RTMNU BCom?
faqs.answer: RTMNU BCom placement 2024 data has not been declared by the University. However, according to the students' reviews on the Shiksha page, only 20% - 30% of students from the batch of 2025 were placed. The highest package offered was INR 5.5 LPA, the lowest package offered was INR 2 LPA. The RTMNU BCom average package was 3.5 LPA.

faqs.question: What are the career options available after completing a BCom degree course?
faqs.answer: BCom course is the gateway to job opportunities in several fields such as Accounting, Finance, Economics, Taxation, Insurance, etc. One can become an Accountant, Financial Analyst, Auditor, etc. after graduating with a BCom degree. This degree is also beneficial to those students who want to run their own businesses. Because of the variety of work prospects it gives, BCom is one of the most popular undergraduate educational programmes. Commerce is the nation's most important industry, and it has a huge impact on the economy. The expanding economy has resulted in a variety of job opportunities in the business sector. As a result, a Bachelor of Commerce degree can lead to a lucrative career.

faqs.question: How are the placements for RTMNU BA?
faqs.answer: RTMNU BA placement 2024 data has not been declared by the University. However, according to the students' reviews on the Shiksha page, about 50 BA (Hons) Hindi students from the batch of 2022 got placed. RTMNU BA the highest package offered was INR 3 LPA, and the lowest package offered was INR 2 LPA. Apart from that, from the batch of 2023, almost 70% of students got placed with the highest package offered was INR 10 LPA and, RTMNU BA average package was INR 4 LPA. The lowest package offered was INR 3 LPA. Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: How much does B.Pharma at The Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University cost?
faqs.answer: The cost of a four-year Bachelor of Pharmacy (Pharmacognosy) programme at Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University (RTMNU) is INR 65,340. NIRF Pharmacy Ranks places the university at #51 out of 125, but despite this, it offers a comprehensive pharmaceutical sciences education. A variety of pharmacy topics are likely covered in the course material, with pharmacognosy—the study of pharmaceuticals derived from plants and animals—getting special attention. After completing this specialisation, students will be equipped to work in manufacturing, quality control, research, and other departments within the pharmaceutical industry. In addition, the university's ranking among India's top 100 pharmacy schools adds credibility to the curriculum's quality and the graduates' potential outcomes.

college_info.college_name: Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Candidates who get admission to the BSc programme offered at Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University are required to pay the fees for the RTMNU BSc course which range between INR 14,300 and INR 1.6 Lacs depending upon the college offering the BSc programme.
Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The cost of a four-year Bachelor of Pharmacy (Pharmacognosy) programme at Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University (RTMNU) is INR 65,340. NIRF Pharmacy Ranks places the university at #51 out of 125, but despite this, it offers a comprehensive pharmaceutical sciences education. A variety of pharmacy topics are likely covered in the course material, with pharmacognosy—the study of pharmaceuticals derived from plants and animals—getting special attention. After completing this specialisation, students will be equipped to work in manufacturing, quality control, research, and other departments within the pharmaceutical industry. In addition, the university's ranking among India's top 100 pharmacy schools adds credibility to the curriculum's quality and the graduates' potential outcomes.

Candidates who get admission to the BA programme offered at Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University are required to pay the fees for the RTMNU BA course which range between INR 8,000 and INR 1.4 Lacs depending upon the college offering the BA programme.

Yes, the prestigious Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Nagpur University (RTMNU) provides 100% Scholarships to its students. The University provides the following scholarships to deserving candidates of it's university - Eklavya Scholarship, Open Merit Scholarship, Maths & Physics Scholarship and Hindi Scholarship. The university also provides various many fellowship programs under its curriculum. Some of them are the Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Fellowship and Rashtrasant Tukadoji Maharaj Memorial Research Fellowship. Before applying for any of the above scholarships or fellowships, you are recommended to visit the University's official website for more details

highlights.summary: Greater Noida Institute of Technology, IPU admission is open to all courses for the academic year 2025-26. Students can apply directly through the official page.

table.details: Greater Noida Institute of Technology (GNIT IPU)

college_info.intro: GNIT Greater Noida offers BTech in Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Information Technology as its popular programmes. The Institute provides these programmes on the basis of merit and entrance. Candidates must qualify Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 55% with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics and English (core/ elective/functional) as primary subjects. Apart from this, GNIT College Noida considers JEE Main to be the primary point of selection for eligible candidates. GNIT IPU BTech fee structure entails a total course fees of INR 9.13 Lakh, including tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time payment. The Institute offers a BTech programme for the duration of 4 years. To learn more about GNIT Greater Noida popular programmes, check out the table given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: GNIT Indraprastha University offers full-time BTech at undergraduate level in four specialisations, namely Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics and Communication and Mechanical. The Institute also offers BTech in lateral entry to all the engineering aspirants in the same specialisations. The course duration of BTech and BTech (Lateral entry) is four and three years, respectively. The annual intake of all the specialisations of BTech is 60 each.

faqs.answer: A:    GNIT IPU is not very costly in comparison to other institutes offering the same set of courses. The Institute offers BTech in CSE, ECE, IT and ME with a total tuition fees of INR 5.72 Lacs for the duration of 4 years. GNIT IPU fee structure involves hostel fees and one-time payment as well which totals up to be INR 9.13 Lakh.
faqs.question: Is studying at GNIT IPU expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for the B.Tech programme at GNIT IPU is INR 3.3 Lacs for all specializations, excluding hostel charges. For the B.Tech (lateral entry) program, the total course fee is INR 2.5 lakh. Candidates must have passed the 12th class with a minimum of 55% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics to be eligible for admission to GNIT IPU. The admissions are based on the merit/rank in the JEE Main exam.
faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at GNIT IPU?

faqs.answer: A:    The GNIT IPU application process is conducted online. However, candidates must have a set of official documents to be submitted during the application process and verification process. Given below is a list of documents required to apply for the GNIT IPU admission process:LIST OF DOCUMENTS FOR ADMISSION B.Tech-1st YearIPU ADMISSION FORM PREFERENCE SHEET MEDICAL CERTIFICATE (Original) 10TH MARKSHEET 12TH MARKSHEET JEE ADMIT CARD JEE SCORECARD IPU ALLOTMENT LETTER IPU Rs.1000/- &1200/- COUNSELLING DETAILS IPU Rs.40000 FEE RECIEPT  COLLEGE FEE SLIP I-CARD FORMCHARACTER CERTIFICATE – ORIGINAL MIGRATION CERTIFICATE (OUTSIDE DELHI) 6 PASSPORT SIZE PHOTOGRAPHS  ADHAR CARD COPY 4 NON JUDICIAL STAMP PAPERS OF Rs.10/- EACH (2 IN THE NAMEOF STUDENT & 2 IN THE NAME OF PARENTS/GUARDIANS) 2 SET OF PHOTOCOPY OF ALL THE ABOVE MENTIONED DOCUMENTS
faqs.question: What all documents are required during GNIT IPU admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Greater Noida Institute of Technology, IPU does not specifies age limit to apply for a course. However, candidates do need to meet the eligibility criteria. Candidates must pass Class 12 of CBSE or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics provided the candidate has passed in each subject separately to apply for BTech. Aspirants must also pass English as a subject to apply.
faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply at Greater Noida Institute of Technology, IPU?

reviews_list.review_title: GNIT (IPU) has great infrastructure as well as educated teachers.

review_content.Placements: It depends on which course you are pursuing. Main Computer Science department students are getting more placements as always. There is no benchmark for sitting in the placement like in other colleges; you just have to be smart enough to crack the placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The structure is quite good. There is a lot of greenery as well as dedicated classrooms, common rooms, and sports facilities, which is impressive. All the labs are very advanced, and the library has a collection of more than fifty thousand books.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: There are good teachers here.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 50 LPA. College provide opportunities for internships in the 4th year and conduct seminars in the industry to make us aware of the job trends to meet industry experts, and gain insightful knowledge from them.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is fully working and the labs have all the facilities. They are computerized and there are AC labs, and computers are the latest. Classrooms are clean and have digital boards and AC. The library has having huge capacity for students and has lots of books and good space for learning.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: GNIM is the first choice for PGDM students.

review_content.Placements: 80% to 90% of students are placed in top MNCs. The average package is 6-7 LPA, the highest package is 9 LPA and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. Companies like Dabur, Amazon, Link-it, KPMG, and EY visit for placements. 100% of students get internships. The major roles offered in this course are business analyst, financial analyst, and financial advisor.
review_content.Infrastructure: All classrooms have AC, smart boards, and Wi-Fi facility. The library has all the books on management and magazines. The food quality in our hostel is very fine, and we get hygienic meals throughout the day. The medical first-aid services are provided on the hostel campus.

faqs.answer: GNIT IPU is not very hard to get, provided the candidates manage to qualify merit with entrance. The Institute offers BTech in various specialisations with a valid JEE Main score and Class 12 qualifications with a minimum aggregate of 55% with subjects, Physics, Chemistry, Maths and English primarily. The application process occurs online and candidates can register for candidature by visiting the official website of GNIT IPU.
faqs.question: Q: Is GNIT IPU hard to get?

faqs.answer: Yes, candidates do require IPU CET score for admission to BTech (lateral entry). Candidates applying for BTech programme do not required passing IPU CET. CET is conducted by GGSIPU in pen and paper mode annually. Aspirants also need to fulfill the eligibility requirements for admission to BTech (LE) programme.
faqs.question: Q: Is IPU CET required for admission at Greater Noida Institute of Technology, IPU?

faqs.answer: Greater Noida Institute of Technology IPU admission is entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for JEE Main Paper-I for admission to BTech programme. For admission to BTech (LE) course, aspirants have to pass IPU CET. Once the selection process is over, shortlisted candidates have to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at GNIT IPU?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee for the B.Tech programme at GNIT IPU is INR 3.3 Lacs for all specializations, excluding hostel charges. For the B.Tech (lateral entry) program, the total course fee is INR 2.5 lakh. Candidates must have passed the 12th class with a minimum of 55% marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics to be eligible for admission to GNIT IPU. The admissions are based on the merit/rank in the JEE Main exam.

overview_faqs.question: Which cultural events happen at Greater Noida Institute of Technology, IPU?
overview_faqs.answer: The following is a brief description of a few cultural events held at Greater Noida Institute of Technology. celebrates a wide range of cultural occasions, such as cultural dance competitions, singing competitions, theatre performances, singing festivals, rangoli competitions, tech-fests, painting and poster-making competitions, sporting events, and many more. Overall a good number of events are conducted over the year.

overview_faqs.question: What clubs, societies, and events are active on campus?
overview_faqs.answer: GNIT IPU organises various cultural and technical events with the students and for the students. Various events are organised by departments and the student body members. Apart from events, GNIT IPU has societies and committees that actively participate in Institute activities and keep the Institute ambience more vibrant. One of the major technical events that GNIT IPU conducts is the annual tech fest, Techinertia. Apart from this, GNIT Noida organises Carvaan which is a cultural fest. Apart from this, the faculty proactively engages in organising industry visits, seminars, workshops and visits to tech fairs and major events for the students to gain exposure.

review_summary.college_name: GNIT IPU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty and helpful environment .

content.Placements: GIMS maintains a strong 90–93 percent placement rate. The highest package is around 12.5 LPA, and the average package is 5.8–7 LPA. Top recruiters include Amazon, EY, and HDFC. About 90 percent of students also secure internships in companies like TCS, Demandbase, and NCS Private Limited.
content.Faculty: Faculty in our course is very supportive, qualified, and approachable. Their teaching style is easy to understand. They use real life examples. It makes learning easy. The curriculum is relevant and keeps us updated with industry skills if you attend classes regularly and study with consistency. It is a very good learning experience overall with supportive faculty and a helpful environment. The curriculum is great with good teaching quality.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges.

content.Placements: On average, approximately 60-70% of students get placed. The highest package is approximately 15 LPA. The recruiting companies are Samsung and Wipro. The average package on this campus is almost 3-5 LPA. The college gives you an internship in many companies and helps you get placed in a multinational company.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very good infrastructure and facilities. They have AC rooms and labs. A very high-protein food is available in the canteen and mess. There are good medical facilities and a good playing ground on this campus. All facilities are good, and it is one of the best colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: GNIT (IPU) has great infrastructure as well as educated teachers.

content.Placements: It depends on which course you are pursuing. Main Computer Science department students are getting more placements as always. There is no benchmark for sitting in the placement like in other colleges; you just have to be smart enough to crack the placement.
content.Infrastructure: The structure is quite good. There is a lot of greenery as well as dedicated classrooms, common rooms, and sports facilities, which is impressive. All the labs are very advanced, and the library has a collection of more than fifty thousand books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: There are good teachers here.

content.Placements: The highest package is 50 LPA. College provide opportunities for internships in the 4th year and conduct seminars in the industry to make us aware of the job trends to meet industry experts, and gain insightful knowledge from them.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is fully working and the labs have all the facilities. They are computerized and there are AC labs, and computers are the latest. Classrooms are clean and have digital boards and AC. The library has having huge capacity for students and has lots of books and good space for learning.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: GNIM is the first choice for PGDM students.

content.Placements: 80% to 90% of students are placed in top MNCs. The average package is 6-7 LPA, the highest package is 9 LPA and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. Companies like Dabur, Amazon, Link-it, KPMG, and EY visit for placements. 100% of students get internships. The major roles offered in this course are business analyst, financial analyst, and financial advisor.
content.Infrastructure: All classrooms have AC, smart boards, and Wi-Fi facility. The library has all the books on management and magazines. The food quality in our hostel is very fine, and we get hygienic meals throughout the day. The medical first-aid services are provided on the hostel campus.

admission_process.title: GNIT IPU Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Admissions are currently open at GNIT. Candidates can apply for admission provided they fulfill the eligibility. The application forms are available online on the institute's website. Below are the steps to get a seat at Greater Noida Institute of Technology:
1: GNIT Application Process 2025

Candidates must register with the basic details on the institute's website to generate login credentials. Aspirants then need to login and fill out the application form. Candidates must pay the application fee to fill out the form. Aspirants can download the form for Management Quota.
2: Selection

Aspirants are selected for admission to the BTech course based on their JEE Main score. Candidates need to appear in JEE Main Paper 1, conducted by the National Testing Agency for admission. GGSIPU does not conduct its own CET for admission, but uses the merit of JEE Main Paper-I for admission to GNIT BTech course. Aspirants need to pass IPU CET for lateral entry to the BTech programme. Further, the institute releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates.
3: Document Verification & Reporting

Selected candidates receive a call from the institute. Aspirants need to report at the campus with the documents for verification. Aspirants also need to pay theGNIT IPU feesto confirm their seat. Check below the documents required:
For a complete list download,documents required for GNIT admission

faqs.question: Does Greater Noida Institute of Technology IPU offers lateral entry to BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes,  GNIT offers three-year BTech (lateral entry) course. Candidates who have passed a three year Diploma in Engineering/ Technology with at least 60% aggregate can apply for Greater Noida Institute of Technology IPU BTech (LE) programme. Aspirants must pass IPU CET for admission to the course.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Greater Noida Institute of Technology IPU with 65% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pass a minimum of Class 12 to apply for admission at Greater Noida Institute of Technology IPU. The minimum aggregate required for BTech is 55%. Hence, aspirants with 65% in Class 12 can get admission provided they also hold a valid score in JEE Main Paper-I. Aspirants need to complete Diploma in Engineering/ Technology with a minimum of 60% aggregate for lateral entry to the BTech programme.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at Greater Noida Institute of Technology IPU?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates applying for admission at Greater Noida Institute of Technology IPU must have a valid score in JEE Main Paper-I for BTech programme. For lateral entry to the BTech course, aspirants need to pass IPU CET. Besides, aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility requirements for admission. Selected candidates have to confirm their seat by paying the course fee after completion of the selection process.
